title: Kale and White Bean Power Bowls
description: These kale and white bean power bowls are full of flavor, texture, protein, fiber, and other nutrients. Perfect for meal prep!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Begin cooking the rice first. The remaining bowl ingredients can be prepared while the rice is cooking. Add the rice and 2 cups water to a saucepot. Place a lid on top and bring the water up to a full boil. Once boiling, turn the heat down to low and let the rice simmer for 40 minutes. After 40 minutes, turn the heat off and let the rice sit with the lid in place for an additional 5 minutes. Fluff just before serving.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: While the rice is cooking, make the vinaigrette so the flavors have a little time to blend. In a jar or bowl, combine the olive oil, red wine vinegar, Dijon, Italian seasoning, garlic powder, salt, and pepper. Whisk to combine, or close the jar and shake until combined. Set the dressing aside.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Add the cooking oil and minced garlic to a large pot or skillet. Sauté the garlic over medium heat for about one minute. Add the chopped kale and salt. Sauté for a few more minutes, or just until the kale is wilted. Set the kale aside.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Finally, prepare the rest of the toppings. Rinse and drain the white beans. Chop the sun dried tomatoes and walnuts. Crumble the feta.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: When the rice has finished cooking, it's time to assemble the bowls. Add about ¾ cup rice to each bowl or container, followed by ½ cup sautéed kale, ⅓ cup beans, and a tablespoon each of sun dried tomatoes and walnuts. Sprinkle a little feta over each bowl. Divide the vinaigrette between four small containers. Refrigerate until ready to eat.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Reheat the bowls using a microwave just before serving, then drizzle with vinaigrette, stir, and enjoy!

title: Cinnamon Pecan Cauli Oats
description: Adding a scoop of riced cauliflower to your morning oatmeal is an easy and delicious way to add more vegetables to your day!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Microwave Instructions

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Stove Top Instructions

title: Nutella Frosting
description: This homemade Nutella frosting is unbelievably creamy and made from 6 simple ingredients. It holds its shape when piped and tastes fantastic on chocolate cupcakes, pumpkin cake, vanilla cake, and so much more.

ingredients.name: (16 Tbsp; 226g) unsalted butter, softened to room temperature

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: In a large bowl using a handheld or stand mixer fitted with a paddle attachment, beat the butter on medium speed until smooth, about 2 minutes. Stop the mixer and add confectioners’ sugar, Nutella, heavy cream, and vanilla extract. Beat on low speed for 30 seconds, then increase to medium-high speed and beat for 2 full minutes. Add up to 1/2 cup more confectioners’ sugar if frosting is too thin or another Tablespoon of cream if frosting is too thick. Add a pinch of salt if frosting is too sweet. (I always add 1/8 teaspoon salt.)

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Use immediately or cover tightly and store for up to 1 week in the refrigerator or up to 3 months in the freezer. After freezing, thaw in the refrigerator then beat the frosting on medium speed for a few seconds so it’s creamy again. After thawing or refrigerating, beating in a splash of heavy cream or milk will help thin the frosting out again, if needed.

title: Broccoli Cheddar Pizza
description: This broccoli cheddar pizza starts with a super creamy herb-filled white sauce then is topped with tender broccoli florets and cheddar.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Prepare the herby white sauce first. Combine the butter, cream cheese, milk, garlic powder, onion powder, basil, oregano, salt, and pepper in a small saucepot. Heat and stir over medium until the cream cheese has fully melted and the sauce is thick and creamy.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Preheat the oven to 450ºF. Stretch your pizza dough over a pizza pan. Spread the herby white sauce over the surface of the pizza dough.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Chop the thawed frozen broccoli into smaller pieces. Sprinkle the chopped broccoli over the herby white sauce on the pizza. Top with the shredded cheddar cheese.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Bake the pizza for 10-15 minutes, or until the pizza crust is golden brown and the cheddar on top is melted. Cut into eight pieces and serve!

title: My Favorite Blueberry Scones
description: These better-than-the-bakery blueberry scones are bursting with juicy blueberries. They're buttery and moist with crisp, crumbly edges and soft, flaky centers. Read through the recipe before beginning.

ingredients.name: (250g) all-purpose flour (spooned & leveled), plus more for hands and work surface
for topping: coarse sugar and vanilla icing

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Whisk flour, sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt together in a large bowl. Grate the frozen butter using a box grater. Add it to the flour mixture and combine with a pastry cutter, 2 forks, or your fingers until the mixture comes together in pea-sized crumbs. See video for a closer look at the texture. Place in the refrigerator or freezer as you mix the wet ingredients together.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Whisk 1/2 cup heavy cream, the egg, and vanilla extract together in a small bowl. Drizzle over the flour mixture, add the blueberries, then mix together until everything appears moistened.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Pour onto the counter and, with floured hands, work the dough into a ball as best you can. Dough will be sticky. If it’s too sticky, add a little more flour. If it seems too dry, add 1–2 more Tablespoons heavy cream. Press into an 8-inch disc and, with a sharp knife or bench scraper, cut into 8 wedges.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Brush scones with remaining heavy cream and, for extra crunch, sprinkle with coarse sugar. (You can do this before or after refrigerating in the next step.)

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Place scones on a plate or lined baking sheet (if your fridge has space!) and refrigerate for at least 15 minutes.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Meanwhile, preheat oven to 400°F (204°C).

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Line a large baking sheet with parchment paper or silicone baking mat. After refrigerating, arrange scones 2–3 inches apart on the prepared baking sheet.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Bake for 22–25 minutes or until golden brown around the edges and lightly browned on top. Remove from the oven and cool for a few minutes before topping with vanilla icing.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Leftover iced or un-iced scones keep well at room temperature for up to 2 days or in the refrigerator for up to 5 days.

title: Curry Roasted Vegetable Bowls
description: These curry roasted vegetable bowls are colorful, full of vibrant flavors, and the leftovers pack up well for your weekly meal prep!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Begin the rice first because it takes the longest to cook. Combine the uncooked rice in a pot with 2 cups water. Place a lid on top, turn the heat onto high, and allow the water to come up to a full boil. Once boiling, turn the heat down to low and let the rice simmer for 45 minutes (no stirring). After 45 minutes, turn the heat off and let it rest with the lid in place for an additional five minutes.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Once the rice is started, move on to the curry roasted vegetables. Preheat the oven to 400ºF. Chop the cauliflower into bite-sized florets. Peel and slice the carrots. Slice the red onion into ¼-inch wide slices.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Place the cauliflower, carrots, and red onion on a parchment lined baking sheet. Drizzle the olive oil over top, then add the curry powder and salt. Toss the vegetables until everything is evenly coated in oil and spices. Spread the vegetables out over the baking sheet in a single layer.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Transfer the seasoned vegetables to the oven and roast for 20 minutes. After 20 minutes give them a good stir, then roast for another 15 minutes. Next, add the frozen peas and toss together with the roasted vegetables, then return the baking sheet to the oven for the an additional 5 minutes. Taste the vegetables and add additional salt, if needed.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: While the rice is simmering and the vegetables are roasting, make the lemon tahini dressing. Place the tahini, water, lemon juice, minced garlic, cumin, cayenne, and salt in a blender then blend until smooth. Set the dressing aside.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: When the rice has finished cooking, fluff with a fork. Place about ¾ cup rice into each bowl or meal prep container. Top with ¼ of the roasted vegetables. Drizzle with a few tablespoons of dressing just before serving.

title: Beef Cheek Ragu Pasta
description: Made with leftover Slow Cooked Beef Cheeks in Red Wine, this pasta part of a series where leftovers are transformed into 2 sensational meals. Using leftover beef cheeks, this luscious pasta is on the table in 15 minutes.

ingredients.name: leftover beef from Slow Cooked Beef Cheeks in Red Wine (, shredded)
Sauce of Slow Cooked Beef Cheeks in Red Wine

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Bring a large pot of salted water to boil. Add pasta and cook for 6 minutes or until just before al dente (i.e. slightly undercooked, very firm to touch). The pasta will be cooked more in the pasta sauce.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Meanwhile, heat olive oil in large pan over medium high heat. Add onion and garlic and sauté for 3 minutes.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Add remaining ingredients. Bring to rapid simmer, stirring occasionally. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper. If the sauce seems too thick, add a splash of the pasta cooking water.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Use tongs and transfer the pasta straight from the pot of boiling water into the pan with the ragu sauce. Add 1/2 cup of pasta cooking water and gently toss the pasta in the sauce for 1 to 2 minutes. The pasta is ready when the spaghetti is al dente (cooked but slightly firm to touch) and the sauce has thickened and is tossed through the pasta.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Serve immediately, sprinkled with freshly grated parmesan cheese and parsley if desired.

title: Champagne Frosting
description: Homemade champagne frosting is a delightfully spiked and sparkly addition to any dessert such as vanilla cupcakes or white cake. Reduce champagne on the stovetop for intensified flavor.

ingredients.name: (180ml) champagne or sparkling wine (use your favorite)
(16 Tbsp; 226g) unsalted butter, softened to room temperature

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: In a small saucepan, bring the champagne to a boil over medium-high heat. Once boiling, reduce to medium heat and allow to simmer until reduced down to 1/4 cup, about 7-10 minutes. Set aside to cool completely. You want it room temperature or cold.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: In a large bowl using a handheld or stand mixer fitted with a whisk attachment, beat the butter on high speed until completely smooth and creamy, about 2-3 minutes. Add the confectioners’ sugar 1 cup at a time, beating on low at first then increasing to high speed. Once incorporated, add the next cup. Once creamy and combined, beat in 3 Tablespoons of the reduced champagne and the vanilla extract. Taste. Add the remaining reduced champagne if needed, then a pinch of salt if you’d like.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Frosting can be made 2 days in advance, covered, and stored in the refrigerator until ready to use.

title: Sirloin Steak with Pesto, Bell Peppers (Capsicum) & Flatbread
description: Beef is like wine. You get what you pay for. So if you invest in a good steak, keep it simple and concentrate on the sides to serve up a dinner that will make any meat lover beam with pleasure.

ingredients.name: x 10oz / 300g sirloin beef steak (, 2.5 cm/ 1 inch thick (the best you can afford))
red bell pepper ((capsicum), deseed, halved and sliced into strips)
Pesto ((preferably homemade - see notes for recipe))
Flatbreads ((see recipe Easy Soft Flatbread (No Yeast)))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preferably bring your steak to room temperature. This will take 30 minutes if the air temperature is warm/hot, or an hour if it's cool.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Season steaks generously with salt and pepper. Do this just before you cook it.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Heat 1 tbsp oil in a heavy based fry pan over high heat until it starts to smoke.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Place steaks in the fry pan. Cook each side for 2 minutes for medium rare. See notes for cooking times.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Remove steaks from the fry pan onto a plate and cover loosely (not tightly) with foil. Allow to rest for 5 minutes, up to 10 minutes.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: While the steak is resting, return the fry pan to the stove over medium high heat with 1 tbsp oil.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Add the bell pepper (capsicum) and cook, stirring occasionally, until nicely charred. Remove from heat.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Serve the steaks topped with the bell pepper and with Pesto and Flatbread on the side.

title: Tomato Basil Vinaigrette
description: This tangy and slightly sweet tomato basil vinaigrette only requires a few simple ingredients and tastes great over salad and pasta alike.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Combine the tomato paste, red wine vinegar, basil, garlic powder, sugar, salt, and pepper in a bowl or a blender. Whisk or blend until smooth.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Begin whisking in the olive oil, one tablespoon at a time, making sure it's fully incorporated before adding more. This allows the oil to emulsify into the tomato mixture, creating a smooth dressing. The dressing may separate slowly as it sits, but a quick whisk before drizzling over your salad will bring it back to a thick mixture.

title: Loaded Caramel Dipped Pretzels
description: Salty pretzels covered in caramel and topped with your favorite candies. These loaded caramel dipped pretzels are kid-friendly, perfect for gift-giving and bake sales, and satisfy your salty/sweet tooth!

ingredients.name: assorted toppings (crushed M&Ms, nuts, mini chocolate chips, sprinkles, Heath bar, etc)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Make the salted caramel and allow it to thicken and cool for 20 minutes.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: While cooling, get your toppings ready. Place each into separate bowls.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Line a large cookie sheet with parchment paper or a silicone baking mat. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Once caramel has cooled, hold each pretzel rod by one end and dip the pretzel into the caramel, swirling it around to get it coated well. Shake of any excess caramel. Immediately sprinkle toppings onto pretzel, twirling the pretzel to get all sides covered. Do this over a plate to catch any extras.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Place pretzels onto prepared baking sheet to allow the caramel to set, about 15 minutes. I rotated them every 2 minutes so they didn’t end up with a completely flat side.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Cover and store leftovers at room temperature for 2-3 days. In hot months, store pretzels in the refrigerator for up to 4 days. Bring to room temperature before serving.

title: Tomato Basil Chicken
description: A garlicky marinade and tangy tomato pan sauce make this Tomato Basil Chicken an easy and flavorful option for dinner.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: In a small bowl, combine the olive oil, red wine vinegar, minced garlic, ½ tsp dried basil, salt, and pepper.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Use a sharp knife to fillet the chicken breasts into two thinner pieces each.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Place the chicken breast pieces in a shallow dish and pour the marinade over top. Flip the chicken a couple of times to make sure all surfaces are coated. Marinate the chicken for 30 minutes, or up to one day (refrigerated), flipping once or twice throughout.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Heat a large skillet over medium. Once the pan is hot, transfer the chicken pieces to the skillet. There should be enough oil from the marinade to prevent sticking. Cook the chicken for about five minutes on each side, or until golden brown and cooked through, then remove it to a clean plate.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Add the tomato paste, chicken broth, the remaining ½ tsp dried basil, and sugar to the skillet. Use a whisk to combine the ingredients and dissolve any browned bits off the bottom of the skillet.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Let the sauce simmer over medium-low heat for about five minutes, or until slightly thickened. Return the chicken to the skillet and spoon the sauce over top. Serve and enjoy.

title: Mexican Pork Rolls
description: Soft white rolls piled high with shredded pork mixed with enchilada sauce, topped with gooey melted cheese and caramelized onions.

ingredients.name: Enchilada Sauce ((preferably homemade - here is my Easy Classic Enchilada Sauce))
brown onions (, halved and finely sliced)
grated mozzarella cheese ((or any other good melting cheese))
Fresh parsley (, finely chopped, for garnish (optional))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Melt butter in a fry pan over medium heat. Add onions and cook for 7 minutes, stirring every now and then so they cook evenly. Add remaining Caramelized Onion ingredients and cook for a further 5 minutes, stirring occasionally until sticky and caramelised. Remove onion from pan and set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Brown Pork Carnitas: Wipe pan clean and return to stove. Heat 1/2 tbsp oil over high heat. Add Pork Carnitas and press down lightly with a spatula to help crisp up. When the Pork Carnitas are heated through and the underside is golden brown and crisp (about 1 to 1/2 minutes), remove from pan (do not flip).

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Place Pork Carnitas and Enchilada Sauce and mix to combine.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Preheat grill (broiler) on high.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Split rolls in half. Divide the Filling between them and pile onto the bottom half of the roll. Top with cheese then grill (broil) for 3 minutes until melted.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Remove from the grill, top with caramelised onion and sprinkle with parsley (if using).

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Sandwich with the other half of the bread roll and serve immediately.

title: Giant Hash Brown
description: When you need to feed a crowd, why slave over the stove making batch after batch of hash browns when you can make one giant one?

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Peel and grate the potatoes, placing the grated potato into a large bowl of water (this stops the potato from going brown while you continue grating).

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Using a large colander, rinse the potato until the water comes clear (to remove the starch which keeps the potato from going brown as well as making it crispy).

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Working a handful at a time, squeeze out the excess water and place into the bowl.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Mix in 1 tbsp of olive oil, salt and pepper.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Heat 2 tbsp olive oil in a 22cm/9 inch non stick pan over medium high heat.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Place shredded potato mixture in pan, spread out and lightly pat down with a spatula. It should be about 1.5cm/0.6" thick.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Cook for 5 to 8 minutes until golden brown and crispy. Use a spatula to lift a corner to check for doneness.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Get a large plate and slide the hash brown onto it.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Place the pan on top of the plate, then quickly flip upside down. Use a tea towel if you need so you can hold onto the fry pan when flipping. Don't worry if it breaks when you flip it, it's salvageable!

steps.title: Step 10
steps.description: Drizzle the remaining 1 tbsp of oil around the edges of the fry pan. If your hash brown broke when you flipped it, use a spatula to lightly pat it back into shape.

steps.title: Step 11
steps.description: Cook until golden brown and crispy, about 4 to 6 minutes. Use a spatula to lift up to check.

steps.title: Step 12
steps.description: Slide out of the plan onto a serving plate. Season with additional salt if required. To serve, garnish with chopped parsley (optional) and cut into wedges.

title: Chocolate Chip Scones
description: These chocolate chip scones are crispy chocolate chip cookies in scone form! They're buttery and moist with crisp crumbly edges and soft flaky centers. Read through the recipe before beginning.

ingredients.name: (250g) all-purpose flour (spooned & leveled), plus more for hands and work surface
(100g) packed light or dark brown sugar
optional: coarse sugar for sprinkling on top before baking
optional: confectioners’ sugar for sifting on top after baking

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Whisk flour, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt together in a large bowl. Grate the frozen butter using a box grater. Add it to the flour mixture and combine with a pastry cutter, two forks, or your fingers until the mixture comes together in pea-sized crumbs. See video above for a closer look at the texture. Place in the refrigerator or freezer as you mix the wet ingredients together.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Whisk 1/2 cup heavy cream, brown sugar, the egg, and vanilla extract together in a small bowl. Drizzle over the flour mixture, add the chocolate chips, then mix together until everything appears moistened.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Pour onto the counter and, with floured hands, work dough into a ball as best you can. Dough will be sticky. If it’s too sticky, add a little more flour. If it seems too dry, add 1-2 more Tablespoons heavy cream. Press into an 8-inch disc and, with a sharp knife or bench scraper, cut into 8 wedges.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Brush scones with remaining heavy cream and for extra crunch, sprinkle with coarse sugar. (You can do this before or after refrigerating in the next step.)

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Place scones on a plate or lined baking sheet (if your fridge has space!) and refrigerate for at least 15 minutes.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Meanwhile, preheat oven to 400°F (204°C).

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Line a large baking sheet with parchment paper or silicone baking mat. After refrigerating, arrange scones 2-3 inches apart on the prepared baking sheet(s).

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Bake for 22-25 minutes or until golden brown around the edges and lightly browned on top. Remove from the oven and cool for a few minutes before enjoying. Dust with confectioners’ sugar if desired.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Leftover scones keep well at room temperature for 2 days or in the refrigerator for 5 days.

title: Muffin Tin Breakfast Croque Madame Toastie Cups
description: A fresh take on the classic French grilled ham and cheese! Adapted from a recipe by Rachel Khoo.

ingredients.name: milk ((full fat works best, though low fat does work))
grated gruyere cheese ((or tasty or cheddar), plus extra for sprinkling)
large slices of fresh white bread ((Notes 1 and 2))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Turn the oven on to 180C/350F.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Cut the crusts off the bread, then roll out with a rolling pin until flattened.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Press the bread into Texas muffin tins to form cups. Place into the oven (even if it is still heating up) for 5 minutes, just to dry the bread out a bit (Note 3). Don't let it brown.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Bechamel Cheese Sauce

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Assemble Toast Cups

title: Spinach and Mushroom Quesadillas
description: These Spinach and Mushroom Quesadillas are filled with melty, creamy cheese, sautéed mushrooms, and a healthy dose of spinach.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Slice the mushrooms and add them to a skillet with the cooking oil, garlic powder, crushed red pepper, and half of the salt and pepper. Sauté over medium until the mushrooms have release all of their water and it has evaporated out of the skillet. Set the mushrooms aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: While the mushrooms are cooking, thaw the frozen spinach then squeeze out as much of the water as possible. You should have about one cup of spinach (loosely packed) once squeezed.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Add the mushrooms, spinach, shredded mozzarella, sour cream, and another ⅛ tsp each of salt and pepper to a bowl, then stir to combine.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Add about ½ cup of the cheesy spinach mushroom mixture to each tortilla, spread it out to cover one side of the tortilla, then fold to close.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Cook the quesadillas in a skillet over medium heat until brown and crispy on the outside and melty on the inside (I do not use butter or oil in the skillet, but can if you want a more fried texture).

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Slice the quesadillas and serve!

title: Gingerbread Swirl Fudge
description: You only need a few simple ingredients and 1 pan to make this super creamy and easy gingerbread swirl fudge!

ingredients.name: and 1/4 cups (585g) white chocolate chips, divided
(45ml) unsulphured or dark molasses (do not use blackstrap; I prefer Grandma’s brand)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Line an 8-inch square baking pan* with aluminum foil or parchment paper, leaving enough overhang on the sides to easily remove the fudge once it has set. Set aside. Have 2 pans/pots ready: a medium saucepan and a small saucepan.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Combine condensed milk and 3 cups (540g) of white chocolate chips in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Stir constantly until the chocolate chips are melted. Once the mixture is smooth, remove from heat and stir in the vanilla extract. Transfer half of the mixture to a smaller saucepan over medium heat. (Leave the other half aside.) Stir in the 1/4 cup (45g) of white chocolate chips and the remaining ingredients over medium heat until smooth.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Now you have half plain white fudge and half gingerbread fudge. Spread a thin layer of white fudge into the bottom of the lined baking pan. (If the white fudge has thickened too much, gently re-heat it over the stove for a few seconds. It’s important that white fudge is the base of the fudge!) Pour some gingerbread fudge on top, followed by more white fudge, more gingerbread fudge, etc until everything is used up. Using a toothpick, gently swirl the two fudges together.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Cover with aluminum foil and refrigerate for 5 hours or overnight until completely set. Once set, remove the fudge from the baking pan by lifting out the aluminum foil or parchment paper. Peel away foil and cut into 1-inch squares.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Fudge stays fresh covered at room temperature for 1 week or in the refrigerator for 2-3 weeks. I always stack it in a Tupperware between layers of parchment paper.

title: Sausage and Vegetable Skillet
description: This super fast and easy Sausage and Vegetable Skillet is the ultimate busy-day meal and is perfect for meal prep!

ingredients.name: seasoning salt or seasoning blend (or to taste) ($0.05)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Add the cooking oil and sausage to a skillet. Cook the sausage over medium heat until brown and crispy.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Add the cauliflower, peppers and onions, and kale to the skillet with the sausage. Continue to stir and cook until the vegetables are heated through.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Add a liberal amount (or to taste) of your favorite seasoning salt or seasoning blend and stir to combine. Serve hot.

title: Creamy Peanut Butter Frosting
description: This is the creamiest peanut butter frosting and tastes unbelievable on chocolate cupcakes, chocolate cake, or fudge brownies!

ingredients.name: (71g) unsalted butter, softened to room temperature

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: With a handheld or stand mixer fitted with a paddle or whisk attachment, beat the butter on medium speed until creamy, about 2 minutes. Add the peanut butter, confectioners’ sugar, heavy cream, vanilla extract, and salt with the mixer running on low. Increase to high speed and beat for 3 full minutes. Add up to 1/4 cup more confectioners’ sugar if frosting is too thin or another Tablespoon of cream if frosting is too thick.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Cover tightly and store for up to 1 week in the refrigerator.

title: Mini Strawberry French Toast
description: Super fast to make, and a great breakfast in bed because it's crumb and cutlery free!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Combine the sugar and strawberries in a bowl and set aside to macerate (it sweats to form a bit of syrup).

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Lightly whisk the eggs, milk and salt in a shallow bowl.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Melt butter in a large fry pan over medium high heat.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Dip each side of the bread slices into the egg, 3 seconds on each side. Place in the pan and fry each side for 2 1/2 minutes, until it is nicely browned.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Remove from the fry pan, and serve, topped with the strawberries (use the syrup created), maple syrup and confectioners sugar (icing sugar), if using.

title: Huevos Rancheros Tortilla Bowls
description: Something different for breakfast this weekend! This recipe makes just enough for 3 - I have tried to stretch it to 4 but it was not quite enough (I thought). Or it is for 2 very hungry people!

ingredients.name: small onion ((red, brown, white, yellow), halved and sliced)
coriander/cilantro ((leaves and stems roughly chopped) (loosely packed))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Tortilla bowls

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Tomato Filling

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Cook eggs

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Assemble

title: Curry Chickpea Salad
description: This Curry Chickpea Salad is a fast and easy no-cook lunch that's perfect for summer. Light, fresh, filling, tangy, and flavorful!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Prepare the dressing first. Stir together the yogurt, Dijon, honey, curry powder, and salt. Set the dressing aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Rinse and drain the canned chickpeas. Chop the cilantro and finely chop the red onion. If you'd like to soften the flavor of the red onion, first slice it and then let the slices soak in cold water for about five minutes. Drain the onion, then finely chop.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Combine the chickpeas, chopped cilantro, chopped red onion, and the prepared dressing in a bowl. Stir to combine. If you prefer, you can slightly mash the chickpeas to create a different texture. Taste and adjust the salt or other ingredients to your liking. Serve cold.

title: Ultimate Birthday Cupcakes
description: The ultimate birthday cupcakes start with a funfetti cupcake and are topped with marshmallow frosting and a chocolate shell!

ingredients.name: and 1/2 Tablespoons canola or vegetable oil

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Set the eggs out that you’ll need for the frosting. By the time you bake and cool the cupcakes, the egg whites will be room temperature.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Make the confetti cupcakes. Allow them to completely cool.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Place egg whites, sugar, and cream of tartar in a heatproof bowl. Set bowl over a saucepan filled with two inches of simmering water. Do not let it touch the water. (You can use a double boiler if you have one.) Whisk constantly until sugar is dissolved, about 4 minutes. You can use a candy thermometer to make sure they’re ready; it will register 160°F (71°C).*

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Transfer the mixing bowl to an electric mixer fitted with a whisk attachment. Add the vanilla. Beat on high speed for 5-6 minutes until soft, glossy peaks form. (See photo above.) Taste. Add a pinch of salt if needed. I like to add 1/8 teaspoon of salt.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Pipe frosting onto each cooled cupcake. I use a Wilton 1M tip. You may have an extra cupcake or 2 leftover if you use a lot of frosting on each cupcake. Chill cupcakes in the refrigerator or freezer until frosting is completely firm. I freeze mine for 20 minutes.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: melt the chopped chocolate and oil together in the microwave in 20 second increments, stirring after each until completely melted. You can also melt in a double boiler if you have one. Let the chocolate cool down for 5-10 minutes before dipping.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Holding the cupcake by its bottom, carefully and very quickly dip each into chocolate to coat the frosting. Place on a wire rack on top of a baking sheet in case any chocolate drips off. The perfect shape of the piped frosting may slightly deflate—that’s ok! Add any additional sprinkles on top. Refrigerate cupcakes for 30 minutes to set the chocolate.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Cover and store cupcakes at room temperature for 1 day or in the refrigerator for up to 1 week. Finished cupcakes do not freeze well.

title: Quickie Black Eyed Peas and Greens
description: Ring in good luck for the new year with this quick pot of black eyed peas and greens. Vegetarian and meat options included!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Dice the onion and mince the garlic. Add both to a large soup pot with the olive oil and sauté over medium heat until the onions are soft and translucent.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Drain the canned black eyed peas, then add them to the pot along with the oregano, smoked paprika, cayenne pepper, black pepper, and vegetable broth. Stir to combine.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Place a lid on the pot, turn the heat up to medium high, and bring the pot up to a boil. Once boiling, reduce the heat to medium-low, and allow the peas to simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: After the peas have simmered for about 15 minutes, use the back of a spoon to smash some of the peas against the side of the pot to thicken the broth (or use an immersion blender to blend a small portion of the peas).

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Add the fresh spinach to the pot and stir until it has wilted into the peas. Give the peas a taste and adjust the salt or seasoning to your liking. Serve hot with bread or rice.

title: Homemade Teriyaki Sauce
description: Teriyaki sauce is so easy to make at home, once you've made it once you'll never buy the bottled stuff again!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Teriyaki Sauce Marinade ("Marinade")

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: To Use

title: Dark Chocolate Chip Raspberry Banana Bread
description: My reader-favorite recipe for the best banana bread gets *fancy* with the addition of dark chocolate chips and juicy raspberries.

ingredients.name: (8 Tbsp; 113g) unsalted butter, softened to room temperature
(80g) plain Greek yogurt or sour cream*
(150g) halved raspberries, tossed in 1 Tablespoon (8g) all-purpose flour to prevent sinking*

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Adjust the oven rack to the lower-third position and preheat the oven to 350°F (177°C). Lowering the oven rack prevents the top of your bread from browning too much, too soon. Grease a metal 9×5-inch loaf pan with nonstick spray. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Whisk the flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon together in a medium bowl. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Using a handheld or stand mixer fitted with a paddle or whisk attachment, beat the butter and sugar together on high speed until smooth and creamy, about 2 minutes. With the mixer running on medium speed, add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Then beat in the yogurt, mashed bananas, and vanilla extract until combined.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: With the mixer running on low speed, slowly beat the dry ingredients into the wet ingredients until no flour pockets remain. Do not over-mix. Fold in the chocolate chips and floured raspberries.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Pour and spread the batter into the prepared baking pan. Bake for 60–75 minutes, making sure to loosely cover the bread with aluminum foil halfway through to prevent the top from getting too brown. The bread is done when a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean with only a few small moist crumbs. This may be after 70 minutes depending on your oven, so begin checking every 5 minutes around the 60-minute mark.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Remove banana bread from the oven and allow the bread to cool in the pan set on a wire rack for 1 hour. Remove bread from the pan and cool bread directly on the wire rack until ready to slice and serve.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Cover and store banana bread at room temperature for 2 days or in the refrigerator for up to 1 week. Banana bread tastes best on day 2, after the flavors have settled together.

title: One Pot Veggie Rice Bowl
description: This simple veggie rice bowl can be made with just one pot and a hot plate, or a rice cooker. It's a simple meal when resources are limited!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Add the rice, garlic, and frozen vegetables to a small saucepot.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Combine the water with 1 teaspoon soy sauce, then pour that into the pot. Stir to combine with the rice, vegetables, and garlic.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Wash one large egg well, then place it in the center of the pot, on top of the rice.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Place a lid on the pot, turn the heat on to high, and allow the water to come up to a boil. Once it reaches a full boil, turn the heat down to low, and allow the water to continue to simmer for 15 minutes without removing the lid or stirring.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: After 15 minutes of simmering, turn the heat off. Remove the egg from the pot and replace the lid right away. Allow the rice to rest with the heat turned off and the lid in place for another five minutes.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: After removing the egg from the pot, place the egg in a bowl of ice water or place it under cold running water for a few minutes to stop the cooking process.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: After letting the rice and veggies rest for five minutes, remove the lid and fluff with a fork. Season the rice and veggies with the sesame oil and another 1 teaspoon soy sauce, or to taste.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Transfer the rice and vegetables to a bowl. Peel the egg and slice it in half or into quarters, then place it on top of the rice. Top the bowl with sliced green onion and a drizzle of sriracha.

title: Wilted Spinach Salad
description: Wilted spinach salad with bacon, white beans, and a tangy Dijon vinaigrette is a quick, easy, and light summer meal.

ingredients.name: 15oz. cans cannellini beans, rinsed and drained ($1.78)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Cook the bacon in a skillet over medium heat until it is brown and crispy. Transfer the cooked bacon to a paper towel-lined plate, leaving the bacon grease in the skillet.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Add the minced garlic to the skillet and sauté over medium heat for about one minute.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Add the rinsed and drained beans, vinegar, Dijon, sugar, pepper, and salt to the skillet. Continue to cook and stir over medium heat until the beans are heated through and a sauce has formed.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Add the fresh spinach to the skillet, carefully stirring it into the hot beans until it is partially wilted. Remove the skillet from the heat.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Crumble the bacon over top and fold to combine. Taste and add salt or pepper to your liking. Serve warm!

title: Homemade Stuffed Crust Pizza
description: This is a simple recipe for homemade stuffed crust pizza on top of from-scratch homemade pizza dough. Feel free to use store-bought dough if needed. Yields one 12-inch pizza or you can make two pizzas from the whole dough recipe.

ingredients.name: recipe homemade pizza dough (or 1 lb. store-bought pizza dough)
and 1/2 cups (6oz or 168g) shredded mozzarella cheese
big handful pepperoni (or any other toppings you like)
optional: sprinkle of dried herbs such as basil, oregano, or an Italian seasoning blend

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Prepare pizza dough through step 3. If using store-bought frozen pizza dough, make sure it’s thawed.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Preheat oven to 475°F (246°C). Allow it to heat for at least 15–20 minutes as you shape the pizza in the next step. If using a pizza stone, place it in the oven to preheat as well. Lightly grease a large baking sheet or pizza pan with 1/2 Tablespoon of olive oil. Sprinkle lightly with cornmeal, which gives the crust extra crunch and flavor.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: When the homemade dough is ready, punch it down to release any air bubbles. Divide the dough in half and freeze half the dough for another time—see freezing instructions in the pizza dough recipe. On a lightly floured work surface using lightly floured hands or rolling pin, gently flatten the dough into a disc. Place on prepared pan (if using a pizza stone, place the dough directly on a baker’s peel dusted with cornmeal) and, using lightly floured hands, stretch and flatten the disc into a 12-inch circle, about 1/2-inch thick. If the dough keeps shrinking back as you try to stretch it, stop what you’re doing, cover it lightly and let it rest for 5–10 minutes, then try again. Once shaped into a 12-inch circle, lift the edge of the dough up to create a lip around the edges. I simply pinch the edges up to create the rim.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Arrange the string cheese around the edges of the crust, leaving a 3/4-inch space. Fold the edges of the dough over the string cheese, pinching down to seal. Do your best to completely seal the string cheeses inside. Let the dough rest for a couple minutes if you’re having trouble sealing it completely.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Cover dough lightly with plastic wrap or a clean kitchen towel and allow to rest for a few minutes as you gather the pizza toppings.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Using your fingers, push dents into the surface of the dough to prevent bubbling. Brush remaining olive oil all over the dough. Top with pizza sauce, the mozzarella cheese, then the pepperoni. Sprinkle lightly with dried herbs, if desired.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Bake for 14–16 minutes or until the crust is golden brown. Remove from the oven.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Slice hot pizza and serve immediately. Cover leftover pizza tightly and store in the refrigerator for up to 1 week. Freezing and reheating instructions below.

title: Ranch Broccoli Pasta
description: This Ranch Broccoli Pasta just takes minutes to make and is full of deliciously creamy, tangy, herby ranch flavor!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Bring a large pot of water to a boil for the pasta. Once boiling, add the pasta and continue to boil until the pasta is tender (about 7-10 minutes).

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: When the pasta is just tender, add the frozen broccoli florets to the boiling water with the pasta, and let it sit for about one minute. Reserve a ¼ cup of the starchy pasta water, then drain the pasta and broccoli in a colander.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Return the drained pasta and broccoli to the pot with the burner turned off. Add the butter and ranch seasoning and stir until the butter is melted and everything is coated in the seasoning. If the pasta becomes dry while stirring, add a splash of the reserved pasta water.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Finally, season the pasta with salt and pepper to taste. Serve warm.

title: Watermelon Salad
description: As strange as it sounds, sweet, juicy watermelon with feta, red onion and mint is a winning combination. This summery, light salad is refreshing and is perfect for a summer barbeque.

ingredients.name: small Spanish red onion (, finely sliced)
/ 3 oz Danish feta cheese (, crumbled into medium size pieces)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Cut the flesh from the melon and cut into bite size pieces, removing and discarding the seeds, and set aside. Peel and halve the onion, and thinly slice.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: In a small bowl, combine the vinegar, salt, pepper, and whisk until salt is dissolved. Slowly whisk in the olive oil, a few drops at a time. Add in the chopped mint, taste, and adjust seasonings.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: In a large bowl, combine the melon, onion, and feta. Pour the dressing over the melon mixture and toss gently until everything is coated and evenly mixed. Garnish with mint sprigs.

title: Creamy Small Batch Cheesecake
description: If you don't want to make a big regular cheesecake, try this easy creamy small batch cheesecake with only 5 slices!

ingredients.name: and 1/3 cups (160g) graham cracker crumbs (about 10–11 full sheet graham crackers)
(452g) full-fat brick cream cheese, softened to room temperature
optional for serving: strawberry topping, cherry topping, or even salted caramel!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Lower the oven rack to the lower third position and preheat oven to 325°F (163°C). Line a 9×5-inch loaf pan with parchment paper with enough overhang on the sides to easily remove the cheesecake from the pan. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Mix all of the crust ingredients together. Pour into prepared loaf pan and using medium pressure, press the crust mixture down with your hand so it’s compact in the pan. Bake the crust for 20 minutes or until lightly golden brown on the edges and top.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: While the crust is pre-baking, prepare the filling. In a large bowl using a hand mixer or a stand mixer fitted with a paddle attachment, beat the cream cheese on high speed until completely smooth. Beat in the sugar, egg, vanilla, and lemon juice until completely combined and smooth, about 2 minutes. Scrape down the sides and up the bottom of the bowl and beat again as needed.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Pour the batter on top of the warm crust and smooth into an even layer. It will look like a lot of cheesecake batter, but it will sink down as it bakes.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Bake the cheesecake for 40–45 minutes, until the entire surface is set. A toothpick inserted into the center of the cheesecake should come out *mostly* clean.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Remove from the oven and allow to cool completely in the pan set on a wire rack. Once cool, refrigerate the cheesecake for 4 hours and up to 1 day.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Remove the chilled cheesecake from the pan using the overhang on the sides. Slice and serve with optional toppings, if desired.

title: Pesto Mozzarella Roll Ups
description: Pesto mozzarella roll ups combine melty mozzarella cheese and flavorful basil pesto rolled up in a flour tortilla then baked to perfection!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat the oven to 400ºF. Stack the tortillas on a plate and cover with a damp paper towel. Microwave for 30 seconds to soften the tortillas.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Slice the string cheese in half length-wise. Spread ½ Tbsp pesto over the lower half of each tortilla, staying away from the edges. Place one piece of mozzarella on top of each.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Fold the sides of the tortilla in on top of the cheese, then begin rolling up from the bottom until the cheese is completely rolled up in the tortilla.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Place the roll ups on a parchment-lined baking sheet, seam side down. Brush the roll ups with a light coating of cooking oil.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Bake the roll ups in the preheated oven for about 13 minutes, or until they're lightly golden brown on the edges and the cheese is melted.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: While the roll ups are in the oven, prepare the creamy tomato dip. Stir together the mayonnaise, tomato paste, and minced garlic.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Let the roll ups cool just enough to handle, then serve with the creamy tomato dip.

title: KFC Oven Baked "Fried" Chicken Tenders
description: Crunchy and perfectly seasoned, it really does taste like KFC! It is a mash up of my own recipe, the "11 Secret Herbs and Spices" from the Homemade KFC recipe by Every Nook & Cranny, and the coating recipe from this Best Baked "Fried"…

ingredients.name: paprika ((not smoked, use sweet or plain))
cayenne pepper or ground pure chili ((optional - for KFC "Zinger" flavour!))
buttermilk OR 1/3 cup plain yoghurt + 2/3 cup milk ((Note 3))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Combine the Spice Mix in a bowl.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Place 1 tbsp of Spice Mix in a ziplock bag with the chicken and buttermilk. Set aside to marinate for at least 2 hours, preferably 3 but ideally overnight.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: To Cook

title: Crispy Chinese Rice Paper Wrapped Fish (5 Ingredients)
description: 5 ingredient magic - on a budget! (I get salt and pepper for free ;) ) I saw this on a Chinese cooking show years ago. Make these bite size like I have - or larger by using overlapping pieces of rice paper to encase the fish.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Cut the fish into 2"/5cm long x 1"/3cm wide pieces, about 16 pieces. (Note 4)

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Combine Chinese Five Spice Powder, salt and pepper.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Sprinkle with with spice mix.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Fill a large bowl with hot tap water. Dunk the rice paper into the water for 3 seconds, then transfer it to a work surface. (Note 5)

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Place a piece of fish at the bottom of the rice paper, per the photo below. Top with 2 coriander leaves, then roll up to enclose the fish with the rice paper. Repeat with remaining fish.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Heat oil in a skillet over medium high heat. Add the fish and cook for 2 minutes or until dark golden brown and crispy. Turn and cook the other side. Repeat with remaining fish (I cook them in 2 batches).

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Transfer to a paper lined plate.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Serve immediately, while hot and crispy!

title: Summer Vegetables in Red Sauce
description: Colorful summer vegetables simmered in a red sauce and spooned over warm polenta make a hearty and inexpensive summer meal.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Dice the onion and mince the garlic. Add the onion, garlic, and olive oil to a large pot. Sauté over medium heat until the onions have softened.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: While the onion and garlic are cooking, dice the eggplant into ½-inch pieces. Add the eggplant to the pot with the Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper, and continue to sauté over medium heat.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Dice the red bell pepper. Once the eggplant has softened, add the diced bell pepper to the pot and continue to sauté.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Slice the zucchini into ¼-inch thick quarter-rounds, then add them to the pot. Continue to sauté just a couple minutes more, or until the zucchini just begin to soften.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Add the red sauce and 1/4 cup water to the pot and stir to combine. Let the vegetables simmer in the sauce for 5-10 minutes, or until they reach your desired level of tenderness.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: While the vegetables are simmering, bring a separate pot of water to a boil.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Once boiling, stir in the salt, then pour in the cornmeal while whisking. Continue to cook and whisk until the cornmeal thickens (this should happen quickly).

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Once the cornmeal has thickened, stir in the butter until melted, then add the grated Parmesan. Stir to combine, then taste and adjust the seasoning to your liking.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: To serve, spoon ⅔ cup cornmeal into a bowl then top with one cup of the vegetables and red sauce. Garnish with chopped parsley if desired.

title: Jamie Oliver's Chicken in Milk {Seriously Delish}
description: Though the ingredients list might seem odd, this is actually one of the best chicken dishes I have ever had. Possibly the best roast chicken I've ever had.

ingredients.name: lemons (, zest only (avoid grating the pith which is bitter))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 190C/375F.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Wash the chicken under water and pat dry with paper towels.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Sprinkle over the salt and 5 grinds of black pepper and pat all over the chicken, concentrating on the top and sides.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Heat oil in a heavy based pot over high heat. (Note 1)

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Brown the chicken all over as best you can. I find the easiest way to do this (and minimising skin tearing) is with tongs stuck in the rear of the chicken and a wooden spoon to lift and leverage the chicken. Tilt the chicken as required to brown as much of the skin as you can. (Note 2)

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: If you can manage it (or if you have a helper), pour the excess fat out of the pot with the chicken still in it. If you can't, remove the chicken onto a plate, then drain the fat.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Add the remaining ingredients into the pot (return the chicken to the pot if you removed it).

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Bake covered for 40 minutes, then bake uncovered for 50 minutes (1.5 hrs in total).

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Let stand for 5 minutes or so before removing the chicken from the pot onto a serving plate. Serve the sauce on the side. I prefer not to strain it because I want the bits of curd and garlic on my chicken, as well as bits of sage.

title: Maple Almond Cranberry Granola
description: Feel refreshed and recharged with this fall-inspired, wholesome, and crunchy maple almond cranberry granola recipe!

ingredients.name: and 1/2 cups (213g) old-fashioned whole rolled oats
or 1 teaspoon ground cinnamon (I always use a full teaspoon!)*

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 300°F (149°C). Line a large baking sheet with parchment paper or a silicone baking mat.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Toss the oats, almonds, cranberries, cinnamon, and salt in a large bowl. Add the maple syrup, coconut oil, and vanilla extract and stir to combine. Make sure all of the oats are moistened.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Spread onto the prepared baking sheet and bake for 30-35 minutes, stirring every 10 minutes. Allow granola to cool completely—the air will help the granola obtain a crunchy texture.

title: Loaded Hummus Pitas
description: Loaded hummus pitas are a quick and easy no-cook meal for summer, and a great way to use up leftovers in the fridge.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Dice the cucumber into small ¼-inch pieces. Slice the grape tomatoes in half. Dice the red onion. Roughly chop the parsley and crumble the feta.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: To assemble the pitas, spread ¼ cup hummus over the surface of each pita. Top with cucumber, tomato, red onion, and a pinch of salt and pepper. Finish with a little crumbled feta, chopped parsley, and a light drizzle of olive oil.

title: Easy Chai Spice Donuts
description: Baked and completely easy chai spice donuts are extra delicious and ready in under 30 minutes!

ingredients.name: (8 Tbsp; 113g) unsalted butter, melted and slightly cooled (divided)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 350°F (177°C). Spray donut pan or 24-count mini muffin pan with non-stick spray. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Whisk the granulated sugar, cinnamon, ginger, cardamom, and allspice together. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Whisk the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt together in a medium bowl. Set aside. Whisk 3 Tablespoons of melted butter, egg, 1/3 cup of the sugar/spice mix (the rest is for the coating), sour cream, milk, and vanilla together until completely combined. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and mix until just combined. Do not overmix. The batter will be thick.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Spoon the batter into the donut cavities—I highly recommend using a large zipped-top bag for ease. Cut a corner off the bottom of the bag and pipe the batter into each donut cup, filling 2/3 – 3/4 of the way full. (You can see me doing this in my pumpkin donuts post.) Or, if making donut holes, spoon the batter into the mini muffin pan, filling each 3/4 of the way full. You’ll only need a couple teaspoons of batter for each.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Bake the donuts or donut holes for 9–10 minutes or until the edges are lightly browned and when poked lightly with a finger, they spring back. Once done, transfer to a wire rack set on a large piece of parchment paper or on a large baking sheet. Bake the remaining donut batter (there is usually enough batter for 1-2 more donuts) and once baked, transfer to the wire rack. Allow donuts to cool down until you can handle them.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Re-melt the remaining butter if it has solidified by now. Dip the donuts in the melted butter, then dunk into the remaining sugar/spice mixture, making sure to coat all sides. Donuts are best served immediately. Leftovers keep well covered tightly at room temperature for up to 2 days.

title: Syrian Chicken
description: This is a simple but exotic dish of chicken with a spiced crispy skin baked with a rich tomato broth.

ingredients.name: / 1 kg chicken thigh fillets (, bone in and skin on (4 to 5 pieces) (see notes))
birds eye chilis (, finely chopped (or to taste) (see notes))
(combined) mint and coriander leaves, roughly chopped
of thyme or 1 tsp dried thyme leaves
/ 250 g giant couscous ((Israeli or Pearl Couscous))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 180C/350F.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Place chicken on a plate or in a large bowl. Sprinkle with Chicken Spices and use your hands to coat the chicken.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Heat olive oil in a large, oven proof fry pan over high heat.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Add chicken, skin side down, and sear until the skin is nicely browned. Turn chicken over and cook the other side until browned. Remove chicken from pan. Drain pan of excess oil.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Add onion, garlic, ginger and chili into the pan. Saute for 2 minutes until the onion is translucent and starting to brown.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Add canned tomato, chicken stock/broth, saffron powder, cumin powder and thyme. Bring to simmer, then turn the stove off. Nestle the chicken into the tomato broth, then cover with foil (or lid) and place into the oven. Bake for 25 to 35 minutes.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Meanwhile, cook the Giant Couscous according to packet instructions. Usually it just needs to be boiled in salted water for around 4 minutes, then drain it.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: When the chicken is dark golden brown and cooked, remove from oven. Stir through dried currents (if using), lemon juice and half the mint and coriander. Then sprinkle over remaining mint and coriander.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Serve on Giant Couscous with a dollop of yoghurt, if using.

title: Healthy Chocolate-Covered Date & Almond Truffles
description: When you bite through the soft chocolate shell coating and into the sweet and chewy center, you won't believe these dark chocolate date & almond truffles are made from whole, natural ingredients like dates, nuts, and seeds.

ingredients.name: Medjool dates (about 300–325g), soaked in warm water for 10 minutes
(21g) unsweetened Dutch-process or natural cocoa powder
(226g) semi-sweet or bittersweet chocolate, finely chopped (two 4-ounce baking bars)
optional: 1/2 teaspoon vegetable oil or coconut oil
optional for garnish: flaky sea salt

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Line a large baking sheet with parchment paper or a silicone baking mat. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Place pitted and soaked dates, vanilla extract, cocoa powder, almonds, and sunflower seeds into your food processor. Blend/pulse until a moist dough forms, as pictured above. This will take a minute or two of processing. If the dough is too dry and crumbly, add a teaspoon of warm water.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Once dough is formed, roll into 1-Tablespoon-size balls and place onto prepared baking sheet. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: You can melt it in a double boiler or use the microwave. If using the microwave: place the chocolate and oil (if using) in a medium heat-proof bowl. I recommend using a glass 2-cup liquid measuring cup because its depth makes dipping really easy. Microwave for 20-second increments, stirring after each, until chocolate is completely melted and smooth.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Working with one ball at a time, submerge into the melted chocolate and swirl to coat; carefully lift out using a fork or dipping tool. Tap the fork/tool gently on the side of the bowl/measuring cup to let excess chocolate drip off. Use a toothpick to help slide the truffle off of the fork and onto a lined plate or baking sheet; or, if using the candy dipping tool, turn upside down to release. If desired, sprinkle each with flaky sea salt while the chocolate is still wet.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Refrigerate coated truffles for at least 30 minutes to set the chocolate. Once chocolate is set, you can store them in an airtight container in the refrigerator, layered with parchment or wax paper, for up to 10 days.

title: Pea Soup with Seasoned Flatbread
description: This pea soup with seasoned flatbread is a simple and comforting meal that you can make using ingredients from the dollar store.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat the oven to 400ºF Drain the canned peas and add them to a blender with 2 cups of chicken broth. Purée until smooth. Add more chicken broth until the peas reach a thick soup consistency, or your desired consistency. We used 3 cups of broth total.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Cut the bacon into smaller pieces, then add them to a soup pot. Cook over medium heat until the bacon is brown and crispy. Remove the bacon from the pot.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Brush some of the bacon fat from the pot over the surface of the pizza crust. Season the pizza crust with an additional ¼ tsp steak seasoning.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Pour the puréed peas into the soup pot. Heat and stir over medium, using a wooden spoon or whisk to help dissolve the browned bits off the bottom of the pot.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Season the soup with steak seasoning, starting with 1 tsp and adding more to your liking. Make sure to taste as you go because steak seasoning often contains salt and you want to avoid over-salting the soup.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: While the soup is heating, bake the pizza crust for about 5 minutes or until browned and crispy. Tear or cut the bread into pieces for serving.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Serve the soup in a bowl, topped with the browned bacon, and a couple pieces of the flatbread for dipping.

title: Honey Wheat Pizza Dough
description: This honey wheat pizza dough has extra flavor, nutrients, and texture. It's soft on the inside and crispy on the outside!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: In a small bowl, stir together the water (warm), honey and yeast. Let it sit 3-5 minutes or until very frothy on top.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Stir the olive oil and salt into the yeast mixture. Next, stir one cup of whole wheat flour into the wet ingredients until evenly mixed. Stir in the all purpose flour, 1/2 cup at a time, until you can no longer stir it with a spoon.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Turn the ball of dough out onto a floured surface and continue to add in and knead the all purpose flour until the ball of dough is stretchy and soft but not sticky (about 3-5 minutes). The total amount of flour needed will depend on how much moisture is already in your flour but it should be between 1-2 cups of all purpose flour.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Spray a large bowl with nonstick spray and place the ball of dough inside. Loosely cover with plastic wrap and let sit for about 45 minutes or until doubled in size.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: To shape the dough, remove it from the bowl it was rising in and place it on a floured surface. Press the dough down into a large circle. This should be fairly easy since it was pretty circular in shape as it rose. Next, pick the dough up with your hands and transfer it to a pizza pan (coated in non-stick spray or sprinkled with corn meal). Press the dough out even further until it reaches the edges of the pan. Alternatively, you can pick the dough up and stretch it with your fists (this can take practice).

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Top the pizza then bake in a fully preheated, 450 degree oven for about 15 minutes or until the edges are golden brown.

title: Raspberry Chocolate Chip Banana Muffins
description: A low-fat muffin bursting with juicy raspberries, mashed bananas, and a sprinkle of chocolate chips. No oil or butter, just bananas and Greek yogurt for a moist texture!

ingredients.name: and 1/2 cups (313g) white whole-wheat flour (spooned & leveled), or a mix of whole-wheat and all-purpose flours
(100g) light or dark brown sugar, loosely packed
(230g) mashed bananas (about 3 medium or 2 large ripe bananas)
(60g) nonfat vanilla or plain Greek yogurt
(90g) semi-sweet chocolate chips (or less, depending on your taste)
and 3/4 cups (220g) fresh or frozen raspberries

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 350°F (177°C). Grease a 12-count muffin pan with cooking spray or grease liners (muffins will stick to liners if not greased with a little cooking spray first!). This recipe yields about 15 muffins, so you will have a 2nd batch with only 3 muffins.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: In a large bowl, gently toss the flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon together until combined. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: In a separate bowl, whisk the honey and brown sugar together – it will be thick and lumpy. Try to get out as many lumps as you can. Add the mashed banana, yogurt, and beaten egg. Slowly pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients. Gently begin to fold it all together. It will be very thick. Add the milk slowly and continue to gently mix the ingredients together. The milk will thin everything out, but the batter will still remain thick. Fold in the chocolate chips. Fold in the raspberries last. Be very gentle not to dye the batter pink from the raspberry juices. Try to not overmix the batter, which will lend tough, dry muffins.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Divide the batter between 15 muffin tins. Fill all the way to the top. Sprinkle a few more chocolate chips on top if desired. Bake the first 12, then the last three in another batch. Fill the empty muffin tins halfway with water in the 2nd batch to ensure even baking and prevent your pan from warping. Bake for 17-18 minutes until very lightly browned on the edges. A toothpick inserted in the center should come out clean.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Allow the muffins to cool for 10 minutes in the muffin pan, then transfer to a wire rack to cool until ready to eat.

title: Lemon Pepper Pork
description: A complete meal on the table in just 15 minutes! Made from scratch, so fresh and easy.

ingredients.name: pork cutlets (, at room temperature (200g/7oz each, bone in) (see notes))
boiling water ((or chicken or vegetable stock/broth))
Lemon wedges or cheeks (, to serve (optional))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Combine couscous and boiling water in a bowl, cover with cling wrap and set aside for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Sprinkle lemon pepper on both sides of each cutlet and pat to make it stick.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in fry pan over high heat. Place pork in fry pan and cook the first side for 2 minutes and the second side for 1 1/2 minutes or until cooked to your liking. I like mine medium rare. Remember the pork will continue to cook while resting.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Remove pork from the fry pan onto a plate, cover loosely with foil and set aside to rest.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Heat remaining 1 tbsp olive oil in the fry pan still on high heat. Add onion and capsicum and sauté for 1 minute, then add the zucchini. Stir and cook the vegetables until charred and just cooked through. Remove pan from heat.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Fluff up the couscous with a fork. Add the vegetables and mint leaves. Squeeze over a drizzle of lemon juice and season to taste with salt and pepper. Toss gently to combine.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Divide couscous between plates, scatter over feta cheese. Top with pork cutlet and drizzle over resting juices. Serve with lemon cheeks or wedges on the side, if using.

title: Slow Cooker Marinara Sauce
description: A good marinara sauce is an essential for everyone. I love this one because you just dump the ingredients into a slow cooker then leave it to work it's magic.

ingredients.name: medium brown onion ((or white or yellow), diced)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Combine all ingredients in a slow cooker. Set for 6 to 8 hours on low.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Optional step: Remove bay leaves, then use a handheld blender to puree until smooth (or to your liking).

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Cool before refrigerating or freezing.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: To use for pasta

title: Bún chả
description: Bún chả (Vietnamese Meatballs) are simple, light, fresh, and perfect for a hot summer day or as a make-ahead meal.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: For the Meatballs:

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: For the Sauce:

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: For the Bowls:

title: Sweetheart Swirl Valentine's Day Bark
description: An easy recipe for Valentine's Day sweetheart swirl bark filled with pure chocolate, pink swirls, festive sprinkles, and lots of conversation hearts!

ingredients.name: candy hearts and sprinkles for topping

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Line a large baking sheet with parchment paper or a silicone baking mat. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Melt the white chocolate and pink candy melts together. Use a double boiler or microwave. If using microwave, stir the chocolate every 20 seconds to help avoid seizing. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Melt the semi-sweet chocolate. Pour onto prepared baking sheet and spread out into a large rectangle. Drizzle the white chocolate mixture on top. Use a toothpick or knife to swirl the layers together. Decorate the top of the bark with candy hearts and sprinkles.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Allow the chocolate to set uncovered at room temperature or in the refrigerator. (Usually takes about 45 minutes in the refrigerator.) Once hardened, break into pieces as large or as small as you want.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Store bark in an airtight container at room temperature in a cool, dry place for up to 1 week or in the refrigerator for up to 2 weeks.

title: Butternut Squash Curry
description: This butternut squash curry is easy, inexpensive and so deliciously warm, cozy, and filling. It's the perfect vegetarian comfort meal!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Peel and dice the butternut squash into ½-inch pieces. Dice the onion, mince the garlic, and grate the ginger.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Heat a large skillet over medium. Add the olive oil, onion, garlic, and ginger, and sauté for a few minutes, or until the onions are translucent. Add the curry powder and cumin and sauté for one minute more.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Add the diced tomatoes and water to the skillet. Stir to combine and dissolve any browned bits off the bottom of the skillet.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Add the diced butternut squash and stir to combine. Place a lid on the skillet and let the squash simmer in the sauce for about 10 minutes, or just until fork-tender.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Add the coconut milk to the skillet, stir to combine, and heat through.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Once the sauce is hot again, add the fresh spinach. Stir to combine and allow the spinach to wilt in the hot sauce. Season the curry to taste with salt, then enjoy!

title: Dark Chocolate Sea Salt Almonds
description: A chocolate treat to feel good about!

ingredients.name: bittersweet or semi-sweet high quality chocolate
and 1/2 cups whole almonds (raw and unsalted)
coarse sea salt or flaky sea salt

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Line a large baking sheet with parchment paper or a silicone baking mat. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Melt the chocolate in a double boiler or (carefully!) use the microwave. For the microwave, place the chocolate in a medium heat-proof bowl. Melt in 30 second increments, stirring after each increment until completely melted and smooth. Alternatively, you can temper the chocolate. If tempering, do not store finished nuts in the refrigerator.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Stir the almonds into the chocolate, making sure to coat each one. Using a dipping tool or a fork, lift the almonds out of the chocolate one by one or only a couple at a time (you don’t want them all sticking together!), gently tap the tool/fork against the side of the bowl to release excess chocolate, and place onto prepared baking sheet. Repeat with remaining almonds.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Sprinkle almonds with a little sea salt and turbinado sugar, then allow chocolate to completely set. I placed the baking sheet in the refrigerator to speed it up!

title: Dan Dan Noodle Soup (Vegetarian)
description: This Chinese noodle soup is a flavour explosion in a bowl, is <300 cal per serving and only takes just over 10 minutes to make.

ingredients.name: (32 oz/1 litre) vegetable or chicken stock (broth)
chilli bean sauce ((or substitute with another chilli paste or sauce). Adjust to taste!)
medium carrots (, peeled and sliced diagonally)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Combine stock ingredients in a large pot and bring to boil.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Meanwhile, mix the Stock Sauce ingredients together in a small bowl and cut all the vegetables into bite size pieces.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Add the Stock Sauce and mix well to dissolve into the soup. Adjust seasoning as required.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: When the stock comes to a boil, place rice stick noodles in the stock, then 1 minute later add the carrots and broccoli, then 1 minute later remove from heat and add the bok choy stems.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Divide the noodles and vegetables between bowls, top with the bok choy leaves and bean sprouts.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Ladle soup into bowls over the vegetables and noodles, and garnish with spring onions.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Optional: finish with chilli oil and more chilli paste - if you can handle the heat!

title: Creamy Tomato Pasta with Sausage
description: A few simple add-ins make this Creamy Tomato Pasta with Sausage a level up from your usual weeknight spaghetti dinner.

ingredients.name: lb. Italian sausage (hot, mild or sweet) ($2.25)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Add the Italian sausage to a deep skillet or pot and cook over medium heat, breaking it up into pieces as it cooks. Mince two cloves of garlic, add it to the browned sausage, and sauté for 1 minute more.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Next, add the tomato paste, crushed tomatoes, Italian seasoning, and water. Stir to combine and dissolve the browned bits off the bottom of the skillet. Allow the sauce to come to a simmer. Once simmering, place a tilted lid on top (to allow steam to escape while blocking splatter) and turn the heat down to medium-low. Let the sauce simmer, stirring occasionally, while you cook the pasta.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Bring a large pot of water to a boil for the pasta. Once boiling, add the pasta and continue to boil until the pasta is tender (7-10 minutes, depending on the variety). Drain the pasta in a colander.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: After the pasta has cooked and the sauce has simmered a while, stir the heavy cream into the pasta sauce. Add the fresh spinach and stir it into the sauce just until wilted.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Finally, add the cooked and drained pasta to the sauce and stir to combine. Serve and enjoy!

title: Spam Stir Fry Noodles
description: This quick Spam stir fry is a dollar store dinner that only requires a few simple ingredients: ramen noodles, frozen vegetables, and luncheon meat.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Slice the luncheon meat into strips.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Add about a tablespoon of oil to a large skillet and heat over medium. Add the sliced luncheon meat and fry until brown and crispy.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Meanwhile, bring a small pot of water to a boil for the ramen noodles. Add the noodles (without the seasoning packet) and boil for about 3 minutes, or just until tender. Drain the noodles and set them aside.

steps.title: Step 4
