steps.description: Once the luncheon meat is crispy, turn the heat under the skillet up to medium-high and add the frozen vegetables. Continue to stir and cook until the vegetables are heated through.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Add the drained noodles and about half of the ramen seasoning packet to the skillet. Toss until everything is combined and coated in seasoning. Taste and add more seasoning if desired. Serve hot.

title: Spinach Quiche
description: This cheesy spinach quiche uses my favorite quiche recipe as the base. It's savory, creamy, and baked in a deliciously flaky homemade pie crust. Impress all your guests with this brunch recipe!

ingredients.name: unbaked flaky pie crust (what I use) or all-butter pie crust*
(25g) freshly grated or shredded parmesan cheese

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: I like to make sure my pie dough is prepared before I begin the quiche. Make pie dough the night before because it needs to chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before rolling out and par-baking.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: On a floured work surface, roll out one of the discs of chilled dough (save the second pie crust for another recipe). Turn the dough about a quarter turn after every few rolls until you have a circle 12 inches (30cm) in diameter. Carefully place the dough into a 9-inch (23cm) pie dish. Tuck it in with your fingers, making sure it is completely smooth. To make a lovely edge, I do not trim excess dough around the edges. Instead, fold the excess dough back over the edge and use your hands to mold the edge into a rim around the pie. Crimp the pie crust edges with a fork or use your fingers to flute the edges. Chill the pie crust in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes and up to 5 days. Cover the pie crust with plastic wrap if chilling for longer than 30 minutes.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Line the chilled pie crust with parchment paper. Fill with 2 packs of pie weights, or use dried beans. Make sure the weights are evenly distributed around the pie dish. Bake until the edges of the crust are starting to brown, about 15–16 minutes. Remove from the oven and carefully lift the parchment paper (with the weights) out of the pie. Prick holes all over the bottom crust with a fork. Return the pie crust to the oven. Bake until the bottom crust is just beginning to brown, about 7–8 minutes. Remove from the oven and set aside. (Crust can still be warm when you pour in the filling, or you can par-bake the crust up to 3 days ahead of time. Cover cooled par-baked crust tightly and refrigerate until ready to fill.)

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Reduce oven temperature to 350°F (177°C).

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: If your frozen spinach is not already thawed, thaw it in the microwave per package directions. Drain the spinach in a colander while you prepare the rest of the ingredients.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: In a large skillet, heat the oil over medium-high heat. Add the sliced mushrooms, garlic, and a sprinkle of salt and pepper to hot skillet (just a sprinkle of each, you’ll use 1/4 teaspoon each in the next step). Stir and sauté the mushrooms until they release all of their moisture and no more water remains on the bottom of the skillet, about 6–7 minutes.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Whisk the eggs, milk, parmesan cheese, and 1/4 teaspoon each salt and pepper together until combined.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Blot and squeeze the rest of the water out of the thawed spinach. Spread spinach on par-baked pie crust. Add the cooked mushrooms and shredded cheese. Pour the egg mixture on top. If desired, sprinkle the top with a little more parmesan cheese.

steps.title: Step 10
steps.description: Bake the quiche until the center is just about set, about 50–60 minutes. Don’t over-bake. Use a pie crust shield to prevent the pie crust edges from over-browning. Cool for 15 minutes before slicing and serving. Or you can cool the quiche completely before serving—it’s fantastic at room temperature, too.

steps.title: Step 11
steps.description: This quiche makes great leftovers! Cover tightly and store in the refrigerator for up to 4 days.

title: Quick Taco Soup with Pork Carnitas
description: Enchiladas in a bowl! A thick, chunky soup on the table in 15 minutes with amazing flavours.

ingredients.name: shredded Mexican pulled pork ((Pork Carnitas) (or shredded chicken))
/ 680 g tomato puree passata ((or crushed tomatoes - see Note 1))
(1 litre / 2 pints) chicken or vegetable broth / stock

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Heat the oil in a large saucepan over high heat.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Add the pulled pork and cook for 1 minute until parts of it are browned, then remove from the saucepan. Do this step even if you are using shredded chicken or another meat.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Add garlic and onion, sauté until onion becomes translucent (2 minutes), then add the capsicum (bell pepper) and cook for 1 minute until softened.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Return the pulled pork into the saucepan and add all other ingredients except salt and pepper. If you are making this ahead to FREEZE, see below for instructions.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Stir to scrap the brown bits from the pulled pork off the bottom of the pan to mix in with the soup flavours.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Bring to boil then turn down heat slightly and allow to simmer rapidly for 3 minutes so the flavours can come together. If you are using crushed tinned tomatoes instead of passata, let it simmer for a further 5 minutes to let the tomatoes breakdown a bit. If the soup gets too thick to your liking, just add a bit more water.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Do a taste test, then season with salt and pepper. It is important to season last because different stock brands have different levels of saltiness.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Serve with toppings of choice. The more toppings = more delicious!

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Freezer Friendly Instructions

title: Chicken and Vegetable Meal Prep
description: This simple chicken and vegetable meal prep is an easy way to prepare meals ahead to save time and money, plus it's customizable!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat the oven to 400ºF. Rinse the Brussels sprouts and slice them in half. Place them on a parchment-lined baking sheet, drizzle with 1 Tbsp oil, and add a pinch of salt and pepper. Toss to coat.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Wash the sweet potato then slice it in half lengthwise. Prick the outside surface with a fork. Rub 1 Tbsp oil over all surfaces of the sweet potato. Place the sweet potato, cut sides down, on the baking sheet with the Brussels sprouts.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Transfer the baking sheet to the oven and roast for 20 minutes. After 20 minutes, stir the Brussels sprouts, then return the baking sheet to the oven for 10-15 minutes, or until the Brussels sprouts have reached your desired level of browning. If the sweet potato is not softened all the way through at this point, just remove the sprouts and return the sweet potato to the oven.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: While the vegetables are roasting, prepare the chicken breast. Combine the steak seasoning, smoked paprika, and sweet paprika in a bowl. Coat the chicken breasts in the seasoning mixture.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Heat the remaining tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium-low heat. Once hot, add the chicken breasts.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Cook the chicken breasts, without flipping, for about 8 minutes, or until well browned on the bottom. Flip the breasts and cook on the second side until well browned and cooked through (internal temperature 165ºF). Cooking time will vary with the thickness of the chicken.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Transfer the cooked chicken breast to a clean cutting board to rest for five minutes before slicing.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Cut the sweet potato halves in half once again to create four portions. Divide the sweet potatoes, Brussels sprouts, and sliced chicken between four containers. Add a pat of butter to each piece of sweet potato. Refrigerate up to four days.

title: Lemon Blueberry Cheesecake Bars
description: Creamy lemon cheesecake bars studded and swirled with blueberries. They're prepared on my simple graham cracker crust and will absolutely be your new favorite dessert!

ingredients.name: full-sheet graham crackers (to yield 1 and 1/2 cups (180g) graham cracker crumbs)
(452g) full-fat brick cream cheese, softened to room temperature
and 1/2 cups (210g) fresh or frozen blueberries (do not thaw)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 350°F (177°C). Line a 9-inch square baking pan with parchment paper with enough overhang on the sides to easily lift the chilled bars out as a whole. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: If you’re starting out with full graham crackers, use a food processor or blender to grind them into fine crumbs. You can also place them in a zip-top bag and crush them into fine crumbs with a little arm muscle and a rolling pin. Stir the graham cracker crumbs and granulated sugar together in a medium bowl, and then stir in the melted butter. The mixture will be thick, coarse, and sandy. Try to smash/break up any large chunks. Press into the bottom of the lined pan.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Bake the crust for 8 minutes. Cool for a few minutes as you prepare the filling in the next step.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Using a handheld or stand mixer fitted with a paddle attachment, beat the cream cheese for 1 minute on medium speed until smooth. On medium speed, beat in the egg, sugar, lemon zest, lemon juice, and vanilla extract together until smooth and creamy, about 3 full minutes. Gently fold in the blueberries. Pour/spoon filling evenly onto the warm crust.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Bake for 30–35 minutes, or until the cheesecake has set up and the edges are lightly browned. The bars will be very puffy, but will sink down slightly as they cool. Remove from the oven and allow to cool for 30 minutes at room temperature on a wire rack and then chill in the refrigerator for at least 3 hours.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Lift the parchment paper out of the pan and cut into squares.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: The bars stay fresh in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 5 days.

title: Strawberry Lemon Poppy Seed Scones
description: These strawberry scones are bursting with juicy strawberries, delicious lemon zing, and poppy seeds. They're buttery and moist with crisp crumbly edges and soft flaky centers. Read through the recipe before beginning.

ingredients.name: (250g) all-purpose flour (spooned & leveled), plus more for hands and work surface
heaping cup (170g) fresh or frozen chopped strawberries (do not thaw)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Whisk flour, sugar, lemon zest, baking powder, poppy seeds, and salt together in a large bowl. Grate the frozen butter using a box grater. Add it to the flour mixture and combine with a pastry cutter, two forks, or your fingers until the mixture comes together in pea-sized crumbs. See video above for a closer look at the texture. Place in the refrigerator or freezer as you mix the wet ingredients together.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Whisk 1/2 cup heavy cream, the egg, and vanilla extract together in a small bowl. Drizzle over the flour mixture, add the strawberries, then mix together until everything appears moistened.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Pour onto the counter and, with floured hands, work dough into a ball as best you can. Dough will be sticky. If it’s too sticky, add a little more flour. If it seems too dry, add 1-2 more Tablespoons heavy cream. Press into an 8-inch disc and, with a sharp knife or bench scraper, cut into 8 wedges.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Brush scones with remaining heavy cream and for extra crunch, sprinkle with coarse sugar. (You can do this before or after refrigerating in the next step.)

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Place scones on a plate or lined baking sheet (if your fridge has space!) and refrigerate for at least 15 minutes.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Meanwhile, preheat oven to 400°F (204°C).

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Line a large baking sheet with parchment paper or silicone baking mat. After refrigerating, arrange scones 2-3 inches apart on the prepared baking sheet(s).

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Bake for 22-25 minutes or until golden brown around the edges and lightly browned on top. Remove from the oven and cool for a few minutes as you prepare the icing.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Whisk the icing ingredients together. Drizzle over warm scones.

steps.title: Step 10
steps.description: Leftover iced or un-iced scones keep well at room temperature for 2 days or in the refrigerator for 5 days.

title: Middle Eastern Shredded Lamb
description: I can't say with certainty that this is authentic because it's a recipe I created. But it uses classic Middle Eastern ingredients, so possibly it is!

ingredients.name: - 2 kg / 3 - 4 lb lamb shoulder (bone in, trimmed of excess fat)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 150C/300F.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Combine the Spice Mix ingredients in a small bowl. Set aside 1 1/2 tbsp of the Spice Mix for later (to pan fry the lamb).

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Add the olive oil and garlic into the Spice Mix, then rub all over the lamb.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Place the lamb on a roasting rack set in a roasting dish (Note 1). Pour the water in the base of the dish. Cover with a lid or double layer of foil.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Roast for 3 1/2 hours or until the meat is tender enough to pull off with a fork.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Remove the lid. Turn the oven up as high as it will go and roast for 15 - 20 minutes until the lamb is browned.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Remove the lamb from the oven. Allow to rest for 20 minutes, then shred coarsely with two forks.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Skim excess fat off the juices in the roasting dish then set aside. (Note 2)

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Browning the Shredded Lamb

title: Slow Cooker Cabbage and Sausage
description: Slow cooker cabbage and sausage is an easy, hands-free way to make a delicious, filling, and cozy meal. Perfect for meal prep!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Chop the onion into 1-inch pieces. Place the baby potatoes and onions in the bottom of a 5 quart or larger slow cooker.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Chop the cabbage into 1-inch pieces. Add the cabbage and steak seasoning to the slow cooker.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Slice the sausage into ½-inch thick rounds. Add the sausage to the slow cooker along with the chicken broth. Stir slightly to nestle the sausage down into the cabbage. It's okay if the broth does not cover all the ingredients.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Place the lid on the slow cooker and cook on high for 4 hours or low for 8 hours.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: After 4 hours on high or 8 hours on low, stir to combine the ingredients. Taste and adjust the seasonings to your liking. Top with chopped parsley, if desired, then serve hot.

title: Beef and Mushroom Pie (3 in 1)
description: This is comfort food at its best because it's so fast to prepare. Made using leftover Slow Cooked Beef Cheeks in Red Wine, this pie takes just 15 minutes to prepare to pop into the oven to bake until puffed and golden.

ingredients.name: sheet ready rolled puff pastry ((25cm x 25cm / 10" x 10"), thawed)
shredded beef cheeks from Slow Cooked Beef Cheeks in Red Wine leftovers
leftover sauce from Slow Cooked Beef Cheeks in Red Wine
carrots (, diced roughly to the size of peas (about 1 1/2 cups))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat the oven to 180C/350F.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: You will need 4 x 1 2/3 cup capacity ramekins.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Place 1 ramekin on the puff pastry and use it as a guide to cut rounds out of the puff pastry. Cut 4 rounds.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Heat oil in large heavy based pan over medium high heat.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Add onion and garlic, and sauté for 2 minutes.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Add carrots and sauté for 1 minute. Then add mushrooms and sauté for another minute.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Add remaining Pie Filling ingredients. Let simmer for 3 minutes to bring the flavours together.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Divide the Pie Filling between the 4 ramekins. Top with puff pastry rounds and cut a small slash in each (steam vents).

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Brush with egg, then place into the oven to bake for 20 to 25 minutes until the pastry is dark golden and puffed.

steps.title: Step 10
steps.description: Remove from oven, let stand for 5 minutes before serving.

title: Shepherd's Pie Potato Skins
description: Don't save the potato you scoop out for another dish - mash it and pile it on top to make these irresistible Shepherd's Pie Potato Skins!

ingredients.name: / 8 oz lamb or beef mince ((ground meat))
frozen mixed vegetables ((pea, corn, carrots) (or fresh))
beef stock/broth ((or 1 stock / bouillon cube dissolved in hot water))
to 1 cup milk ((full or low fat))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 180C/350F.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Prepare the Potatoes and Mash

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Filling

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Assemble Potatoes

title: Honey Roasted Peanut Butter Granola
description: If you like peanut butter and honey, this easy homemade granola is for you.

ingredients.name: optional: 1/2 cup (100g) mini or regular size M&Ms

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 300°F (149°C) degrees. Line one large baking sheet with parchment paper or a silicone baking mat.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: In a large heat-proof bowl, microwave the coconut oil and honey together for about 30 seconds. Alternatively, you may melt these ingredients together in a small pan on the stovetop. Remove from the microwave and using a fork or silicone spatula, stir until they are melted together and smooth. You may need to microwave it for 10 more seconds or so. Stir in the peanut butter and vanilla until smooth. Add the oats, peanuts, and cinnamon. Toss the mixture to coat everything. Make sure all of the oats are moistened.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Spread onto the prepared baking sheet (it usually always fits onto just one—if too crowded, use two baking sheets and bake at the same time on different racks) and bake for 35 minutes, stirring every 10 minutes or so. Remove from the oven and allow the granola to cool for 10 minutes, then sprinkle the peanut butter chips and M&Ms on top. Stir everything together gently on the baking sheet. Allow to cool completely before enjoying.

title: Meal Prep Noodle Soup Jars
description: These easy meal prep noodle soup jars are a fast, convenient, and budget-friendly make-ahead lunch idea. Just add hot water, mix, and enjoy!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: To each 16oz. jar add the following: 1 tsp bouillon, ½ tsp soy sauce, ¼ tsp sesame oil, ⅛ tsp garlic powder, ⅛ tsp ginger powder, ½ tsp sesame seeds, and ½ tsp sriracha.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Peel and shred the carrot. Clean and slice the mushrooms and green onion. Divide the carrots, mushrooms, and green onions between the jars.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Bring a pot of water to a boil for the ramen noodles. Discard the seasoning packets or save them for another use later. Add the noodles to the boiling water and boil only for about 2 minutes, or just until the noodles are tender but still slightly firm. Drain the noodles in a colander and rinse briefly with cold water to cool. Drain well.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Divide the noodles between the four jars, then top with a handful of fresh spinach for each jar.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Close the jars and refrigerate until ready to eat (up to five days). When ready to eat, warm the jars slightly (use your hands or let sit at room temperature for about 10 minutes), and then add 1-1.5 cups boiling water. Close the jars and shake them to dissolve the broth. Let sit for a few minutes, then stir once more with a spoon or fork before enjoying.

title: Confetti Sprinkle Cheesecake
description: This creamy vanilla cheesecake is bursting with rainbow sprinkles and is baked atop my favorite graham cracker crust. Perfect for any day requiring celebration.

ingredients.name: and 1/2 cups (180g) graham cracker crumbs (about 12 full sheet graham crackers)
(678g) full-fat brick cream cheese, softened to room temperature
(240g) full-fat sour cream (or plain yogurt), at room temperature
optional: additional sprinkles and whipped cream for garnish

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Adjust oven rack to the lower third position and preheat the oven to 350°F (177°C). Spray a 9-inch springform pan with nonstick cooking spray. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Review these handy graham cracker crust tips before you get started. If you’re starting out with full-sheet graham crackers, you can use a food processor or blender to grind them up. Or crush them in a zipped top bag with a rolling pin. Mix the graham cracker crumbs, melted butter, and granulated sugar together with a rubber spatula in a medium bowl until combined. The mixture will be thick, coarse, and sandy. Press into a 9-inch springform pan and halfway up the sides. Make sure the crust is very compact and tight. It will be thick. Wrap aluminum foil on the bottom and tightly around the outside walls of the springform pan, which is how to prep the pan for the water bath in step 4. Bake the crust for 10 minutes. Allow to slightly cool as you prepare the filling.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Using a handheld or stand mixer fitted with a paddle attachment, beat the cream cheese and granulated sugar together on medium speed in a large bowl—about 3 full minutes until the mixture is smooth and creamy. Add the sour cream, vanilla, and almond extract and beat until combined. On low speed, add the eggs one at a time, beating after each addition until just blended. Do not over-mix the filling after you have added the eggs. Very gently fold in the sprinkles, being careful as they may bleed their color a little. I usually start with 3/4 cup and add a little more (around 1/4 cup) if I think the batter could use a little extra.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: If needed for extra visuals, see my How to Make a Cheesecake Water Bath; the visual guide will assist you in this step. Boil a pot of water. You need 1 inch of water in your roasting pan for the water bath, so make sure you boil enough. I use an entire kettle of hot water. Place the pan inside of a large roasting pan. Pour the cheesecake batter on top of the crust. Use a rubber spatula or spoon to smooth it into an even layer. Carefully pour the hot water inside of the pan and place in the oven. (Or you can place the roasting pan in the oven first, then pour the hot water in. Whichever is easier for you.)

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Bake for 50–60 minutes or until the center is almost set.* Turn the oven off and open the door slightly. Let the cheesecake sit in the oven for 1 hour. Remove from the oven and allow to cool completely to room temperature.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Refrigerate for at least 6 hours or overnight (preferred). Loosen the cheesecake from the rim of the pan and remove the rim. Cut into slices and serve chilled. Top with additional sprinkles and whipped cream, if desired. Cover leftover cheesecake and store in the refrigerator for up to 4 days.

title: Mexican Couscous Express
description: The most ridiculously easy and fast mid week meal that's darn tasty and wonderfully light.

ingredients.name: diced jalapeño ((fresh is better, but tinned also ok))
(15 oz / 400 g) black beans (or red kidney beans)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Place salt, cumin, onion powder and couscous in a bowl, quickly toss to combine.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Add boiling water, cover and set aside for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Fluff with fork, add tomato paste and stir to evenly coat the couscous.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Add remaining ingredients.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Serve with optional toppings.

title: Chili Con Carne Corn Bread Pie
description: These pies are filled with Chili Con Carne and topped with corn bread! The corn bread batter only takes a few minutes to make. You can make on large pie or individual pies.

ingredients.name: self raising flour ((or 3 tsp baking powder plus 1 1/4 cups + 3 tbsp of plain flour))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 180C/350F.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Place 1 cup of Shredded Beef Chili Con Carne into 4 individual pie dishes, or 1 large pie dish.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Combine Corn Bread Topping dry ingredients in a bowl and given them a quick stir to combine.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Add Corn Bread Topping wet ingredients and mix to combine until lump free.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Pour corn bread mixture over filling so it is about 1.5 cm / 1/2" thick.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Place pie in the oven and bake for 20 to 30 minutes until golden brown on top. If making one large one, it will take closer to 35 minutes. To test for doneness, insert a skewer in the middle of the corn bread and make sure it comes out clean. If there is batter on the skewer, return to oven.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Allow to rest for 5 minutes before serving, garnished with fresh parsley.

title: Southwest Tofu Scramble
description: This southwest tofu scramble is a super fast and filling meal that easy to customize and can be served several different ways.

ingredients.name: 10oz. can diced tomatoes with green chiles ($0.85)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Remove the tofu from the package and drain the excess liquid (no need to press the tofu). Place the tofu in a bowl and use your hands to break it into crumbles.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: In a small bowl, combine the turmeric, cumin, chili powder, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Sprinkle the spice mix over the crumbled tofu and then gently stir until the tofu is evenly coated in spices.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Heat a large non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add the cooking oil to the skillet, swirl to coat the surface, then add the tofu.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Cook the tofu for about five minutes, stirring occasionally, or until heated through. The color of the turmeric will brighten as it cooks.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Drain the canned tomatoes well, then add them to the skillet. Stir to combine, then cook another five minutes or until heated through.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Taste the tofu and adjust the seasonings to your liking. Sprinkle the sliced green onions over top, then serve.

title: Master Bakery Style Muffin Recipe
description: This kitchen tested muffin batter creates extra large bakery style muffins with big muffin tops and dense, moist centers. Create plenty of flavors using this as the base-- 1 muffin batter with endless options.

ingredients.name: (5 Tbsp; 71g) unsalted butter, melted and slightly cooled
(80g) sour cream or yogurt, at room temperature*
1-2 cups add-ins (see blog post above for suggestions)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 425°F (218°C). Generously grease a 6-count jumbo muffin pan with butter or nonstick spray (nonstick spray recommended) or line with muffin liners. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Whisk the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon (if using) together in a large bowl. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Whisk the melted butter, oil, sugar, and eggs together until combined. Then whisk in the sour cream, milk, and vanilla extract. Mixture will be pale yellow. Pour wet ingredients into dry ingredients and fold together with a rubber spatula or wooden spoon until completely combined. Use a whisk to rid any large lumps of flour, if needed. Avoid overmixing. The batter will be thick. Fold in the add-in(s).

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Divide batter between each muffin cup, filling all the way to the top. Sprinkle with coarse sugar (for added crunch, recommended!). Bake at 425°F for 5 minutes, then, keeping the muffins in the oven, reduce the oven temperature to 350°F (177°C) and continue to bake for 25-30 minutes or until the tops are lightly golden brown and centers are set. Stick a toothpick in the center of a muffin to test for doneness. If it comes out clean, the muffins are done.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Allow to cool for 10 minutes in pan before serving.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Cover leftover muffins and store at room temperature for 5 days or in the refrigerator for 1 week. Muffins freeze well for up to 3 months. Thaw in the refrigerator or on the counter.

title: Oven Roasted Corn with Honey Chili Butter
description: Super sweet and juicy oven-roasted corn slathered with sweet and spicy honey chili butter is a true summer treat.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat the oven to 350ºF. Prepare the ears of corn by cutting off the very tip of the ear to remove most of the silk, and removing the outer husks (the thicker bright green layers), leaving the inner layers (the thinner lighter green husks).

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Transfer the prepared ears of corn to the fully preheated oven, placing them directly on the oven rack. Roast for 35 minutes.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: While the corn is roasting, prepare the honey chili butter. In a small bowl, combine the butter, chili powder, honey, and salt. Whip the mixture with a fork until smooth and evenly combined.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: After 35 minutes the husks on the corn should be slightly browned and papery in appearance. Carefully remove the corn from the oven using oven mitts or a thick towel. Let them rest for about five minutes, then carefully pull back the husks and remove any remaining silk.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Serve hot with the bowl of honey butter for smearing over the kernels just before eating.

title: Birthday Cake Cinnamon Rolls (Like Funfetti Cake!)
description: These birthday cake cinnamon rolls are like a cross between cinnamon rolls and confetti cake. The powdered coffee creamer is a non-negotiable in the filling, because it adds a creamy-like texture.

ingredients.name: and 1/2 Tablespoons (14g) active dry or instant yeast (2 standard size packets)*
(113g) unsalted butter, softened to room temperature and cut into 4 pieces
pure vanilla extract or vanilla bean paste
and 1/2 cups (563g) all-purpose flour or bread flour (spooned & leveled), plus more as needed
canola, vegetable, or olive oil for bowl (or use nonstick spray)
(113g) unsalted butter, softened to room temperature & divided
(50g) packed light or dark brown sugar
(16g) powdered coffee creamer or nonfat instant dry milk (do *not* omit)
(113g) full-fat brick cream cheese, softened to room temperature
pure vanilla extract or vanilla bean paste

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Whisk the warm milk, 2 Tablespoons sugar, and the yeast together in the bowl of your stand mixer fitted with a dough hook or paddle attachment. Cover and allow mixture to sit for about 5 minutes or until foamy on top. *If you do not own a mixer, you can do this in a large mixing bowl and in the next step, mix the dough together with a large wooden spoon/silicone spatula. It will take a bit of arm muscle. A hand mixer works, but the sticky dough repeatedly gets stuck in the beaters. Mixing by hand with a wooden spoon or silicone spatula is a better choice.*

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: On medium speed, beat in the remaining sugar (which should be 1/2 cup/100g) and the softened butter until it is slightly broken up. Add the eggs, vanilla, and salt and beat on medium speed until combined. The butter won’t really be mixing into the mixture, so don’t be alarmed if it stays in pieces. Switch the mixer down to low speed and with it running, add 1 cup of flour at a time, making sure it’s fully incorporated before adding the next. After 4 cups have been added, add the last 1/2 cup and beat until the dough comes together and pulls away from the sides of the bowl, about 3 minutes. Dough will be soft.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Keep the dough in the mixer (and switch to the dough hook if you used the paddle) and beat for an additional 5 full minutes, or knead by hand on a lightly floured surface for 5 full minutes. (If you’re new to bread-baking, my How to Knead Dough video tutorial can help here.) If the dough becomes too sticky during the kneading process, sprinkle 1 teaspoon of flour at a time on the dough or on the work surface/in the bowl to make a soft, slightly tacky dough. Do not add more flour than you need because you do not want a dry dough. After kneading, the dough should still feel a little soft. Poke it with your finger—if it slowly bounces back, your dough is ready to rise. You can also do a “windowpane test” to see if your dough has been kneaded long enough: tear off a small (roughly golfball-size) piece of dough and gently stretch it out until it’s thin enough for light to pass through it. Hold it up to a window or light. Does light pass through the stretched dough without the dough tearing first? If so, your dough has been kneaded long enough and is ready to rise. If not, keep kneading until it passes the windowpane test.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Lightly grease a large bowl with oil or use nonstick spray. Place the dough in the bowl, turning it to coat all sides in the oil. Cover the bowl with aluminum foil, plastic wrap, or a clean kitchen towel. Allow the dough to rise in a relatively warm environment for 2 hours or until double in size. (I always let it rise on the counter and it takes about 2 hours. For a tiny reduction in rise time, see my answer to Where Should Dough Rise? in my Baking with Yeast Guide.)

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Grease the bottom and sides of a metal or glass 9×13-inch baking dish or line with parchment paper.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Punch down the dough to release the air. Place dough on a lightly floured work surface and using a lightly floured rolling pin, roll dough into a 12×18-inch rectangle. Make sure the dough is smooth and evenly thick. If the dough keeps shrinking as you roll it out, stop what you’re doing, cover it lightly, and let it rest for 10 minutes to relax the gluten. When you return to the dough, it should stretch out much easier.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Melt 2 Tablespoons (28g) of the butter. Reserve the rest for step 8. Whisk the flour, sugar, brown sugar, powdered coffee creamer, and salt together. Using a fork, mix in the melted butter and the vanilla extract until crumbly. Mix in the sprinkles. (*You will use the cinnamon in the next step.*)

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Spread dough with the remaining butter (6 Tablespoons). Sprinkle evenly with the cinnamon, and then the sprinkle filling mixture evenly on top. Tightly roll up the dough to form an 18-inch-long log. With an extra sharp knife, cut into 12 even rolls, about 1.5 inches each. Arrange in the prepared baking pan.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Cover the rolls tightly and allow to rise until puffy, about 1 hour. (Or use the overnight option in the Notes below.)

steps.title: Step 10
steps.description: Preheat the oven to 350°F (177°C).

steps.title: Step 11
steps.description: Bake for about 25–28 minutes or until they are lightly browned on top. About halfway through baking time, tent a piece of aluminum foil over the pan to prevent the tops from browning too quickly. Remove pan from the oven and place pan on a wire rack for about 10 minutes as you make the icing.

steps.title: Step 12
steps.description: In a medium bowl using a handheld or stand mixer fitted with a paddle or whisk attachment, beat the cream cheese on medium speed until smooth and creamy. Add the confectioners’ sugar, cream/milk, and vanilla. Beat on low speed for 30 seconds, then switch to high speed and beat for 1 minute. Spread the icing over the warm rolls, garnish with extra sprinkles if desired, and serve immediately.

steps.title: Step 13
steps.description: Cover leftover frosted or unfrosted rolls tightly and store at room temperature for up to 2 days or in the refrigerator for up to 5 days.

title: Easy French Onion Soup Dip
description: Throw back from the 80's! This French Onion Dip is the ONLY recipe I make using a store bought packet mix. I can't let it go - it brings me right back to my childhood!

ingredients.name: / 14 oz sour cream ((full fat is better))
mayonnaise ((Mayo labelled “whole egg” mayo is best))
/ 1.4 oz French Onion Soup Mix (store bought) (, salt reduced is best)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Mix ingredients together in a bowl. Rest for 5 minutes or until onion bits in the soup mix become softened.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Serve with your favorite chips!

title: One Pot Chili Pasta
description: This super hearty One Pot Chili Pasta is bursting with southwest chili flavor, protein, and fiber. It's a meal in a bowl that the whole family will love.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Dice the onion and mince the garlic. Cook both in a large pot with olive oil over medium heat for 1-2 minutes, or until soft and transparent. Add the ground beef and continue to stir and cook until it is fully browned. If using a high fat ground beef, drain off the excessive after it is browned.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Add the flour and chili powder to the pot and stir to coat the meat. Continue to stir and cook the coated meat for 1-2 minutes more. The flour and chili powder may coat the bottom of the pot, but that's okay. Just be careful to not let it burn.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Drain and rinse the black and kidney beans. Add the beans, tomato sauce, diced tomato, and corn kernels to the pot. Stir well and dissolve the flour/chili powder mixture from the bottom of the pot.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Add the dry macaroni and two cups of beef broth to the pot and stir to combine. Place a lid on top, turn the heat up to high, and let the pot come to a boil. Once it reaches a boil, give it a quick stir to loosen any pasta stuck to the bottom of the pot, replace the lid, and turn the heat down to medium-low. Let the pot simmer on medium-low for about 15 minutes, or until the pasta is soft and has absorbed most of the liquid. Stir the pot one or two times during the 15 minutes to loosen any pasta stuck to the bottom.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Once the pasta is fully cooked, turn the heat off and add the cheese. Stir the cheese into the pasta until it has melted in and become slightly creamy. Serve hot.

title: Reese's Pieces Peanut Butter White Chocolate Bark
description: Easy white chocolate bark filled with a creamy peanut butter filling. Feel free to use semi-sweet/dark chocolate instead of white chocolate. See recipe Note below.

ingredients.name: (454g) white chocolate, coarsely chopped and divided*
(4 Tbsp; 56g) unsalted butter, softened to room temperature

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Line a 9×13-inch baking pan with parchment paper, leaving enough parchment overhang to lift the bars out of the pan. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Place half (8 ounces/227g) of the chopped white chocolate and 1/2 teaspoon of oil in a medium microwave-safe bowl or liquid measuring cup. Melt in 20-second increments, stirring with a silicone spatula or spoon after each increment, until completely melted and smooth. White chocolate can overheat easily, so it’s important to do this in increments. Pour the melted white chocolate into the prepared pan and spread it evenly with an offset spatula to cover the bottom of the pan. Place the pan, uncovered, in the refrigerator to chill for 10–15 minutes, to soft-set the white chocolate.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: In a medium bowl with a hand mixer or in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment, beat the peanut butter and butter until smooth and creamy, about 2 minutes. Scrape down the sides and up the bottom of the bowl as necessary. Add the confectioners’ sugar, vanilla, and salt, and beat until combined, about 1 minute. Spoon dollops of the peanut butter mixture onto the bottom layer of white chocolate, and spread it evenly with an offset spatula as best you can. Place the pan back in the refrigerator while you melt the remaining white chocolate.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Repeat step 2 to melt the remaining white chocolate and 1/2 teaspoon oil. Pour and spread it evenly with an offset spatula to cover the peanut butter layer. Sprinkle chopped Reese’s Pieces on top.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Place the pan in the refrigerator, uncovered, for at least 30 to 60 minutes to set the white chocolate. (You can also leave it in the refrigerator for up to 1 day, but cover it loosely after an hour. If refrigerating it for more than 1 hour, you may notice the top white chocolate layer cracks when you’re cutting the bark into pieces. This is normal and expected, because the layer is quite cold.)

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Lift the bark out of the pan by holding onto the edges of the parchment paper, and place it on a cutting board. Use a sharp knife to cut the bark into pieces.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Cover and store bark in the refrigerator for up to 1 week, or in the freezer for up to 3 months.

title: Marinated White Beans
description: Marinated White Beans are a fast, easy, and versatile side dish that comes together in minutes with bold flavors like lemon and garlic.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Drain the beans and rinse them with cool water in a colander. Let the excess water drain away.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Rinse and drain the parsley. Pull the parsley leaves from the stems, then chop them roughly.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Combine the rinsed beans, chopped parsley, olive oil, lemon juice, minced garlic, oregano, a pinch of salt, and some freshly cracked pepper in a bowl. Stir until everything is well mixed. Taste the beans and adjust the salt if needed. Refrigerate until ready to eat.

title: Snickers Cheesecake Bars
description: Thick and creamy cheesecake bars on top of an Oreo cookie crust and stuffed with Snickers bars.

ingredients.name: (452g) full-fat brick cream cheese, softened to room temperature

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 350°F (177°C). Line the bottom and sides of a 9-inch square baking pan with parchment paper, leaving an overhang on the sides to lift the finished bars out (makes cutting easier!). Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: In a food processor or blender, pulse 22 Oreos (including the cream filling) into a fine crumb. You should have about 2 cups (packed) crumbs, or 250g. Pour crumbs into a large bowl. Add the melted butter and stir to combine. The mixture will be thick and quite wet. Try to smash/break up any large chunks. Pour the mixture into prepared pan. With medium pressure using your hand, pat the crumbs down into the bottom to make a compact, thick crust. Bake for 10 minutes, and then cool for 10 minutes before spreading the filling on top. Leave oven on.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Beat cream cheese, egg, sugar, and vanilla extract together with a hand or stand mixer until smooth and creamy, about 3 full minutes. Fold in the Snickers and spread the mixture over your slightly cooled crust. Top with chocolate chips.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Bake for 30–35 minutes, or until the cheesecake has set up and the edges are lightly browned. Allow to cool for 30 minutes on the counter and then completely in the refrigerator for at least 3 hours. Lift the parchment paper out of the pan and cut the cheesecake into squares.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Store bars in a covered container for up to 10 days in the refrigerator.

title: Tomato Spinach One Pot Pasta
description: All the ingredients for this Tomato Spinach One Pot Pasta cook together to make an incredibly fast, flavorful, and easy weeknight meal.

ingredients.name: freshly cracked black pepper to taste ($0.05)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Add four cups of vegetable broth to a large pot. Break the fettuccine in half and add it to the pot along with the canned tomatoes (with juices), olive oil, frozen spinach, onion, garlic, basil, oregano, red pepper, and some freshly cracked black pepper.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Make sure the ingredients are submerged under the liquid, place a lid on top of the pot, and then turn the heat on to high. Allow the pot to come up to a full boil over high heat, then remove the lid and turn the heat down to medium.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Allow the pot to continue to boil over medium heat, without a lid, for 10-15 minutes, or until the pasta is cooked and most of the liquid has been absorbed. Stir the pot every few minutes as it cooks to prevent the pasta from sticking to the bottom, but avoid over stirring which can cause the pasta to become sticky.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Sprinkle with shaved Parmesan just before serving.

title: S'mores Puppy Chow
description: Sinfully delicious and addicting snack mix made with peanut butter, marshmallows, Golden Grahams cereal, and a ton of chocolate.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Pour confectioners’ sugar into a large zipped-top bag. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: In a large saucepan, melt the chocolate chips and peanut butter on low heat. Constantly stir to avoid the chocolate from burning. Once completely melted, add in 3/4 cup marshmallows. Stir them into the chocolate/peanut butter mixture until they begin to slightly melt (the semi-melted marshmallow gives you the big chunks in the puppy chow!). Once marshmallows begin to slightly melt, remove pan from heat.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Stir in Golden Grahams Cereal and the other 3/4 cup marshmallows. Stir until each piece is covered in the melted chocolate/peanut butter/marshmallow mixture. Pour the contents into the prepared zipped-top bag. Shake everything together for at least 60 seconds to ensure each piece/chunk is coated with powdered sugar.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Allow to cool and enjoy! Puppy chow is good up to 1 week at room temperature, but trust me—it won’t last that long.

title: Hummus with Lamb
description: Hummus topped with aromatic lamb mince. A starter or a small meal, this is a show stopper hummus. If you haven't tried this before, you're in for a real treat! This recipe makes 2 starter size plates (double what you see in the photo).

ingredients.name: Juice of ½ a small lemon

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Place a pan over medium high heat. Add pine nuts and toast until golden. Remove pine nuts from pan and set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Lamb mince

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Hummus

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Assemble

title: Cheese Truffles (Mini Cheese Balls)
description: These mini cheese balls are cute and a nice change up from the usual giant cheese balls you see.

ingredients.name: grated cheese ((tasty, cheddar or any other cheese with flavour))
grated cheese ((tasty, cheddar or any other cheese with flavour))
sour cream ((or approximately 2 tsp of milk or water))
finely chopped fresh herbs ((I used parsley and dill))
parmesan cheese (, finely shredded or grated)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Cream Cheese Filling - place ingredients in a bowl and mix well until combined. Adjust salt to taste.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Feta Cheese Filling - place ingredients in a bowl and mix well until combined.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Make the balls - measure out 1 tbsp of filling and use a teaspoon to scoop the filling out of the tablespoon and place onto a tray or cutting board. Once you have scooped out all the filling, use your hands to roll into balls. Refrigerate for 3 to 4 hours.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Place the Coatings into small bowls.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Roll the cheese balls in the Coatings.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Refrigerate the cheese balls until ready to serve.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Take them out of the fridge around 15 minutes before serving (so they are spreadable).

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Serve with crackers or pieces of toasted bread.

title: Leftover Mashed Potato Cheese & Bacon Cakes
description: This might be called "Leftover Mashed Potato" cakes but most of the time, I will make mashed potatoes especially to make these! Great for breakfast, lunch OR dinner!

ingredients.name: panko breadcrumbs OR 3/4 cup plain flour

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Mix together the Potato Cake ingredients in a bowl until just combined.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Spread the panko or flour out on a large plate or baking tray (to fit 6 patties).

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Measure out 1/4 cup level amount of potato mixture OR a slightly heaped ice cream scooper (this is what I use because using the lever, it pops out easily) and drop onto panko/flour. Repeat to fill plate / baking tray (don't crowd, difficult to handle).

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Use an egg flip (or base of cup) to pat it down to 1.5cm/2/3" thick patties, then flip and pat to coat the other side with panko/flour. Set aside and repeat with remaining potato mixture.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Heat 1/2 the oil in a large skillet over medium high heat. Cook 6 patties at a time until golden brown on each side - around 2 minutes, then flip and cook the other side.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Remove onto a paper towel lined baking tray. Cook remaining patties.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Serve hot!

title: Triple Chocolate Crunch Granola
description: Super crunchy triple chocolate granola. When your chocolate craving hits, satisfy it with this wholesome breakfast or snack!

ingredients.name: (255g) old-fashioned whole rolled oats (not quick or instant)
optional: additional add-ins like nuts, seeds, or dried fruit

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat the oven to 325°F (163°C). Line a large cookie sheet with parchment paper or a silicone baking mat. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Pour oats into a large bowl, set aside. In a smaller bowl, mix melted coconut oil, cocoa powder, and dark brown sugar until combined. Add honey and salt and mix until a liquid-y paste forms. Pour over oats and mix until all oats are moistened. Add more honey if needed.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Bake for 30 minutes, stirring + flipping every 10 minutes. Remove from oven and sprinkle with chocolate chips while the granola is still warm. Stir. The chocolate chips will melt, creating larger clusters of granola. Once cooled, add in chocolate covered raisins and any additional add-ins you prefer. Store covered at room temperature for up to three weeks.

title: Broccoli Shells and Cheese
description: Broccoli shells and cheese is a classic American comfort food. Serve it as a hearty side with dinner, or as a light main dish.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Bring a large pot of water to a boil for the pasta. Once boiling, add the pasta and continue to boil until the pasta is tender. Drain the pasta in a colander and set it aside until ready to use.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Meanwhile, allow the broccoli to thaw. Once partially thawed, chop the florets into smaller, bite-sized pieces, and set them aside to fully thaw while you prepare the rest of the dish.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: While the pasta is cooking, begin the cheese sauce. Finely dice the onion and add it to a sauce pot with the butter. Cook the onion and butter over medium heat until the onions are softened (about 2-3 minutes).

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Add the flour to the butter and onion. The flour and butter will form a paste, or roux. Whisk the roux over medium heat for 1-2 minutes more taking care not to let it scorch. This slightly cooks the flour preventing the cheese sauce from having an overly flour or paste-like flavor.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Whisk the milk into the roux until no lumps remain. Add some freshly cracked pepper to the sauce. Bring the mixture up to a simmer, stirring often (you may need to raise the heat just slightly). When the sauce reaches a simmer, it will begin to thicken. When it is thick enough to coat the back of a spoon, it’s time to add the cheese.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Turn the burner off and whisk in the shredded cheddar, one handful at a time, until it is fully melted in. Next, stir in the grated Parmesan. Give the cheese sauce a taste and add salt, pepper, and hot sauce to taste.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Once you have the cheese sauce seasoned to your liking, return the drained pasta to its large pot, add the chopped broccoli, and pour the cheese sauce over top. Stir until everything is combined and coated in the wonderfully cheesy sauce. Serve hot.

title: Lemon Garlic Baked Ricotta
description: Super fast and easy to make, a fabulous dip / spread for your next party! Keep the topping garnishes simple or as creative as you want - I've provided some suggestions below.

ingredients.name: of full fat ricotta (, the best you can afford)
to 3 tbsp full fat cream or milk (, optional (only required if you aren't using fresh Italian ricotta))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 180C/350F.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Place the ricotta in a bowl. If you are using supermarket ricotta (as opposed to fresh Italian ricotta), it might be a bit dry. Use the cream or milk to loosen the ricotta into creamy "peanut butter" type consistency (ie. easily spreadable).

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Add the lemon, garlic and salt and mix to combine.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Get to 1 cup capacity ramekins or any other oven proof dish (I used tapas dishes). Divide the ricotta between the dishes and drizzle over 1 tbsp olive oil (reserve other tbsp for after baking).

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Bake for 15 to 20 minutes until the top is lightly browned.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Remove from oven, drizzle with remaining 1 tbsp olive oil then serve immediately with toasted pieces of bread (tip: rub lightly with garlic - it's amazing!).

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Garnish options (optional)

title: Cake Batter Rice Krispie Treats
description: An easy recipe for cake batter rice krispie treats!

ingredients.name: boxed yellow or white cake mix (the dry cake mix, not the batter)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Spray a 11×7-inch baking pan with nonstick spray. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: In a large saucepan over low heat, melt the butter. Add the marshmallows and stir constantly. Once the marshmallows are completely melted, stir in the dry cake mix. Remove pan from heat.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Stir in the cereal until it is completely coated with the marshmallow mixture. Mix in half of the sprinkles. Press into prepared baking pan and top with the remaining sprinkles. When I press rice krispie treats into a pan, I use a spatula sprayed with nonstick spray, making it easier to press down. Press down lightly, as too much pressure will create hard rice krispie treats.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Chill for at least 30 minutes and cut into squares. Squares stay fresh at room temperature for up to 1 week.

title: Creamy Salsa Chicken Skillet
description: A simple jar of salsa is the key to making dinner fast and easy. Just try this Creamy Salsa Chicken Skillet and see for yourself.

ingredients.name: handful fresh cilantro or sliced green onions ($0.12)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Pat the chicken dry with a paper towel. Place the chicken on a cutting board and cover it with a piece of plastic wrap. Use a mallet or rolling pin to gently pound the chicken to an even thickness (about 1/2-inch thick). This step is very important to make sure the chicken cooks quickly and evenly, without drying out.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Combine the chili powder, cumin, garlic powder, and salt in a small bowl. Sprinkle the spices over both sides of the chicken, and then rub it over the surface to make sure it's evenly coated.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Heat a large deep skillet over medium heat. Add the cooking oil and swirl to coat the surface. Once the skillet is very hot, add the chicken and cook on both sides until browned and cooked through (about 5 minutes each side. Cooking time will vary with the size of your chicken pieces and type of cookware).

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: While the chicken is cooking, rinse and drain the black beans. Roughly chop the cilantro or slice the green onions, depending on which you prefer to use.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Transfer the cooked chicken to a clean cutting board and let it rest while you prepare the creamy salsa. Turn the burner down to medium low. Pour the salsa into the skillet and stir to dissolve the browned bits from the bottom of the skillet. Add the black beans and frozen corn kernels and allow the sauce to heat through.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: To prevent the sour cream from curdling when added to the salsa, first add a few spoonfuls, one at a time, to the sour cream to slowly increase it's temperature and acidity. Once the sour cream is slightly warm, add it back to the rest of the salsa in the skillet and stir to combine. Turn the heat off.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Slice the chicken breast into strips, then place it on top of the creamy salsa sauce in the skillet. Top the skillet with crumbled cheese and cilantro or green onion. Serve over a bed of cooked rice.

title: Fudge Brownie Cupcakes with Cookie Dough Frosting
description: Fudgy homemade brownie cupcakes with cookie dough frosting on top. One incredible dessert that you'll want to make again and again!
tags: fudge brownie cupcakes with cookie dough frosting

ingredients.name: (8 Tbsp; 113g) unsalted butter, cut into cubes
(8 Tbsp; 113g) unsalted butter, softened to room temperature

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 325°F (163°C). Line a 12-count muffin pan with cupcake liners or spray with nonstick spray. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Melt the chopped chocolate and sliced butter together in the microwave in 30-second increments, stirring after each until completely smooth and combined. Allow to cool for a few minutes. Stir in sugar, then vanilla. Add in eggs, 1 at a time, mixing well after each addition. Mix in the flour and salt.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Divide the batter evenly among the muffin cups and bake for 20–23 minutes. Mine took 22 minutes. A toothpick inserted in the center will have moist crumbs. Be careful not to overbake the cupcakes.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: While the cupcakes are cooling in the pan, make the frosting. With an electric handheld mixer or stand mixer fitted with a paddle attachment, cream together the butter and sugar at medium speed. Add the vanilla and beat well. Stir in the flour and salt until doughy. Stir in the milk and beat until fluffy. Gently fold in chocolate chips. Frost cooled cupcakes.

title: Cheese and Bacon Muffin Tin Hash Browns
description: A great way to make hash browns for a crowd!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 180C/350F.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Heat 1/2 tbsp of olive oil in a pan over high heat. Add the bacon and sauté until crispy. Remove and drain on a paper towel.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Peel and grate the potatoes and place in a colander. Rinse under cold water for a few seconds (to remove starch which helps make them fluffy inside and also stops the potatoes from browning).

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Working a handful at a time, squeeze out the excess water and place into the bowl.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Add most of the bacon (reserve some to garnish), 2 tbsp olive oil, salt, pepper and cheese. Mix well to combine.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Spray a 12 hole muffin tray with oil.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Place 1/3 cup (packed) of the mixture into each hole. Pat down lightly with the back of a spoon.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Bake for 30 minutes until dark golden brown on top.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Let stand for a few minutes before turning out from the muffin tray.

steps.title: Step 10
steps.description: Garnish with parsley and remaining bacon, and serve immediately.

title: Muffin Tin Spaghetti Nests (Using Leftover Pasta)
description: This is a great way to use up leftover pasta - you can use any type, whether it's tomato or cream based. It's kid friendly, and you can use it as an opportunity to add hidden vegetables, like grated carrot and zucchini.

ingredients.name: Leftover pasta and sauce mixed together
egg per 3 packed cups of pasta ((see notes))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 350F/180C.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Mix the egg and pasta together.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Spray muffin tins with oil, then pack tightly with pasta. If you don't pack the pasta in, it will fall apart.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Bake until the pasta goes crunchy and golden on top - around 5 to 8 minutes.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Remove from oven and sprinkle on cheese, then return to oven until cheese melts.

title: Fire Roasted Salsa
description: Roasting the vegetables in the oven until blackened gives this homemade Fire Roasted Salsa a subtle sweetness and deliciously smoky flavor.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat the oven to 450ºF and line a baking sheet with foil. Cut the stems off the tomatoes, then cut them in half. Peel the cloves of garlic and chop the onion into large chunks. Place the tomatoes, onion, garlic, poblano and jalapeño (leave the peppers whole for now) on the baking sheet and drizzle with 2 Tbsp of olive oil. Toss all of the vegetables around in the oil until they are completely coated.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Place the vegetables in the 450ºF oven and roast for 30 minutes, stirring once half way through. The vegetables should be shriveled, blistered and slightly brown after 30 minutes (see photos below). After roasting, remove them from the oven and allow to cool.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Place the poblano and jalapeño peppers on a cutting board. Remove the thick skin from the poblano (it should peel away easily). Slice off the stems, then slice the peppers open lengthwise. Scrape the seeds out of the peppers. The peppers should be very soft and easy to work with (see photos below).

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Transfer the peppers and everything left on the baking sheet (including juices) into a blender or food processor. If the vegetables are still warm, you can place the blender into the refrigerator until they have cooled down.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Add the fresh cilantro leaves, juice from the lime (about 1/4 cup), salt, sugar, and cumin to the blender with the roasted vegetables. Pulse the ingredients until they are well mixed but still slightly chunky. Don’t over puree on the first round so that you can taste the mixture, adjust the seasonings, and blend again if needed.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Serve immediately or let refrigerate over night for a more mellow flavor.

title: Hawaiian Pizza
description: My pizza dough recipe yields about 2 pounds of dough, which is enough for two 12-inch pizzas. Toppings listed below are enough for one 12-inch pineapple & ham pizza.

ingredients.name: recipe homemade pizza dough (or 1 lb. store-bought pizza dough)
and 1/2 cups (6oz or 168g) shredded mozzarella cheese
(75g) cooked ham or Canadian bacon, sliced or chopped

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Prepare pizza dough through step 3. If using store-bought frozen pizza dough, make sure it’s thawed.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Preheat oven to 475°F (246°C). Allow it to heat for at least 15–20 minutes as you shape the pizza in the next step. If using a pizza stone, place it in the oven to preheat as well. Lightly grease a large baking sheet or pizza pan with 1/2 Tablespoon of olive oil. Sprinkle lightly with cornmeal, which gives the crust extra crunch and flavor.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: When the homemade dough is ready, punch it down to release any air bubbles. Divide the dough in half and freeze half the dough for another time—see freezing instructions in the pizza dough recipe. On a lightly floured work surface using lightly floured hands or rolling pin, gently flatten the dough into a disc. Place on prepared pan and, using lightly floured hands, stretch and flatten the disc into a 12-inch circle, about 1/2-inch thick. If the dough keeps shrinking back as you try to stretch it, stop what you’re doing, cover it lightly and let it rest for 5–10 minutes, then try again. Once shaped into a 12-inch circle, lift the edge of the dough up to create a lip around the edges. I simply pinch the edges up to create the rim. If using a pizza stone, place the dough directly on a baker’s peel dusted with cornmeal. Cover dough lightly with plastic wrap or a clean kitchen towel and allow to rest for a few minutes as you gather the pizza toppings.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Using your fingers, push dents into the surface of the dough to prevent bubbling. Brush remaining olive oil all over the dough. Top the dough evenly with pizza sauce, then add the cheese, ham, pineapple, and bacon.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Bake for 14–15 minutes or until the crust is golden brown. Remove from the oven.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Slice hot pizza and serve immediately. Cover leftover pizza tightly and store in the refrigerator for up to 1 week. Freezing and reheating instructions below.

title: Moroccan Lentil and Vegetable Soup
description: Warm intoxicating spices make this vegetable filled Moroccan Lentil and Vegetable Soup perfect for cold Autumn nights.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Dice the onion and mince the garlic. Sauté both in a large pot with olive oil over medium heat until softened. Dice the celery while the onions and garlic are sautéing, then add to the pot and continue to sauté for 2-3 minutes more.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Add the cumin, turmeric, cinnamon, and cayenne pepper to the pot. Stir and cook the spices with the vegetables for 1-2 minutes.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Add the diced tomatoes (with juices), chickpeas (rinsed and drained), and cauliflower florets (no need to thaw). Stir the pot until everything is well mixed.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Add the vegetable broth and bay leaf, turn the heat up to high, place a lid on the pot, and allow it to come to a boil. Once it reaches a boil, add the lentils. Stir and let it come back up to a boil, then turn the heat down to low. Let the soup simmer on low, with the lid, for 30 minutes.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: After simmering for 30 minutes, the lentils should be tender. Remove the bay leaf and give the soup a taste. Add salt if needed (this will depend on the type of vegetable broth used. I did not add any additional salt), then serve.

title: Baked Italian Chicken with Potatoes
description: Turn every day ingredients into something special! The chicken does not need to be marinated because this recipe makes a wonderful sauce, but if you do then it will be even more tasty.

ingredients.name: - 5 chicken thigh fillets (, skin on and bone in (about 6oz/200g each))
(around 1.5lb/ 750g in total) medium size potatoes (, peeled and cut into bite size pieces)
mozzarella cheese (, grated (or any other good melting cheese))
each dried rosemary and thyme ((OR oregano) leaves (or 2 tbsp fresh))
red wine or white wine vinegar ((Note 1))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 350F/180C.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Mix together Italian Dressing ingredients.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Boil or microwave the potatoes until slightly undercooked - about 5 minutes boiling / 5 minutes on high in a steamer in the microwave. Use a fork to rough the potatoes up a bit - this allows the potatoes to absorb more of the dressing flavour - and sprinkle with a pinch of salt and pepper.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Meanwhile, season the chicken on both sides with salt and pepper. Heat 1/2 tbsp olive oil in large oven proof skillet over high heat.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Add chicken and brown well on both sides - around 5 minutes each side.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Remove skillet from heat, and pour off the excess fat.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Place potatoes around the chicken and pour over the crushed tomatoes. Season with a pinch of salt and pepper and drizzle the Italian Dressing all over.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Place cherry tomatoes on top and bake for 25 - 30 minutes or until chicken is cooked through.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Remove from oven and sprinkle on cheese, then bake for a further 5 minutes until the cheese is melted and golden.

steps.title: Step 10
steps.description: Let stand for 5 to 10 minutes before serving. Garnish with basil leaves if you wish.

title: Penne Pasta with Sausage and Greens
description: This super easy and satisfying, "sweep the kitchen" Penne Pasta with Sausage and Greens is an entire meal in one pot. Cook once, eat all week.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Cook the pasta according to the package directions (boil for 7-10 minutes, or until al dente). Drain the pasta in a colander.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: While the pasta is cooking, add the sausage links to a large pot along with one tablespoon of olive oil. Cook the sausage over medium heat for about five minutes, or until they are slightly browned and firm enough to slice.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: While the sausage is cooking, mince the garlic and dice the onion. Remove the sausage from the pot and add the onion and garlic in its place. Sauté the onion and garlic in the pot for 2-3 minutes, allowing the moisture to dissolve the brown bits from the bottom of the pot. Meanwhile, slice the sausage into medallions. Once the onions are soft and transparent, add the sliced sausage back to the pot and cook for about 5 minutes more, or until the sausage is cooked through.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Add the can of crushed tomatoes, tomato paste, basil, salt, pepper, and brown sugar to the pot. Stir until the tomato paste is evenly combined with the tomato sauce.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Add the frozen broccoli and spinach to the pot, stir to combine, and allow to heat through, stirring occasionally. By this time the pasta should be fully cooked and drained. Add the drained pasta to the pot and stir to combine. Crumble the feta into the pot, stir to combine, then serve.

title: Honey Lemon Chicken
description: Succulent chicken with a lip smacking honey-lemon sauce. Dinner in a snap - 5 minutes prep, 4 minutes to cook the chicken, 3 minutes for the sauce = 12 minute dinner!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Slice each chicken breast horizontally to form 4 steaks in total. OPTIONAL (for more even cooking): Pound to even thickness about 1cm/ 2/5" thick.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Sprinkle each side generously with salt and pepper.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Place flour in shallow dish. Coat the chicken in the flour, shaking off excess.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Mix 1 tsp of the flour (reserved from step 3) with the water. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Cooking

title: Super Quick Chicken Dinner: Crumbed Chicken with Mashed Potatoes
description: With few clever shortcuts and a bit of multi tasking, you'll get this complete dinner on the table in 15 minutes. The crunchy crumbed chicken is sensational.

ingredients.name: / 13oz chicken breast minute steaks ((4 pieces x 100g/3oz each) (Note 1))
to 1/2 cup milk ((full fat or low fat))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Turn grill/broiler on high and place the shelf about 20cm/8" from the heat source.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Place potatoes in the microwave and cook on high for 3 minutes. Then turn the potatoes over and cook on high for a further 2 minutes (or until cooked). Squeeze the potatoes to check if they are cooked.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Mix the mayonnaise and parmesan cheese in a small bowl.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Place the chicken in a large oven proof fry pan (Note 5). Using the back of a spoon, spread the mayonnaise mixture over each chicken breast.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Sprinkle panko breadcrumbs over each piece of chicken. Use your fingers to pat the panko so it sticks to the chicken. (Note 6)

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Place chicken under the grill/broiler for 8 minutes, or until just cooked through and the crumbs are golden. Check it once at around 6 minutes and rotate the fry pan if necessary so the crumb cooks evenly all over. When cooked, set aside to rest for a few minutes before serving.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: While the chicken is cooking, get the potatoes out of the microwave (use a dishcloth). Cut each potato in half, then use a dessert spoon to scoop the flesh out into a bowl. Add milk, butter, salt and pepper. Use a potato masher to mash. Add more milk to achieve the desired consistency.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Salad: Use a potato peeler to make ribbons from the cucumber. Cut the cherry tomatoes in half. Pile the cucumber and cherry tomatoes onto a plate, then drizzle over lemon juice, olive oil and scatter with salt and pepper.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: To Serve: Place mashed potato on each plate then top with the chicken. Drizzle with extra olive oil and garnish with finely chopped fresh parsley, if desired. Serve the Salad on the side.

title: Rotisserie Flavoured Chicken and Potato Bake & a Giveaway!
description: A one pan meal - TWO dishes in one pan! By baking the potato gratin with chicken on top, the chicken juices mix into the potato gratin, creating incredible flavour.

ingredients.name: chicken thigh fillets (, skin on and bone in (about 1.5lb/750g))
/ 750g potatoes ((Note 1), peeled and sliced into 1/8" / 0.3cm slices)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 350F/180C.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Combine the Rub ingredients in a small bowl. Rub onto the chicken, using most on the skin side.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Heat olive oil over medium heat in a large fry pan. (Note 2) Place chicken in the pan, skin side down. Cook for 10 minutes - this renders the fat. Then turn and cook the other side for 2 minutes. Remove chicken onto a plate.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Pour out and discard all the fat but do not wipe the pan. Return the pan to the stove and turn up the heat to medium high.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Add the onion and garlic together and sauté for 2 minutes.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Add half the milk and bring to simmer. Use a wooden spoon to scrape the bottom of the pan to mix the brown bits into the milk.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Place half the potatoes in the pan. Scatter over 1/2 tsp salt, black pepper and half the parmesan.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Repeat with remaining potato, salt and parmesan, then pour over the remaining milk.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Use a egg flip to press the potatoes into the milk while it simmers for 10 minutes and some of the milk has evaporated.

steps.title: Step 10
steps.description: Place chicken on the potato, then place in the oven and bake for 40 to 50 minutes, until the chicken is cooked and the potatoes are golden brown on top.

steps.title: Step 11
steps.description: Allow to rest for 5 minutes before serving.

title: One Pot Spinach and Artichoke Pasta
description: This delicious and simple One Pot Spinach and Artichoke Pasta that takes less than 30 minutes to make and is packed with vegetables.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Rinse the mushrooms to remove any dirt or debris, then slice them thinly. Drain the can of artichoke hearts and roughly chop them into bite-sized pieces. Thinly slice the onion and garlic (you can mince the garlic and dice the onion if you don't like large pieces).

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Place the vegetable broth, olive oil, mushrooms, artichoke hearts, onions, and garlic in a large pot. Break the fettuccine in half and add it to the pot along with the oregano, thyme, and some freshly cracked pepper (10-15 cranks of a pepper mill). Push the ingredients down under the broth as much as possible. Place a lid on the pot and bring it up to a rolling boil over high heat.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: As soon as it reaches a boil, stir the pot to evenly distribute the ingredients and prevent the pasta from sticking. Turn the heat down to low so that the pot is simmering. Allow the pot to simmer, with the lid on, stirring every couple of minutes, for 10-15 minutes, or until the pasta is tender and most of the liquid has been absorbed. Make sure the broth is simmering the entire time, turning the heat up slightly, if needed, to maintain a simmer.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Once the pasta is cooked through, add the spinach and stir it into the pasta, allowing the heat to wilt the spinach (if using frozen, stir until the heat has thawed the spinach).

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Serve the pasta hot with a pinch of crushed red pepper and some crumbled feta on top, if desired).

title: Taco Stack
