description: Stacked tacos! These are made with layers of tortillas, Pork Carnitas (Mexican Shredded Pork) or Chicken, Corn and Tomato Salsa and melted cheese. Fun, fabulous and easy.

ingredients.name: small tortillas (, corn or flour (around 6" / 12 cm rounds))
shredded Pork Carnitas or Quick Mexican Chicken ((see below))
grated cheese ((I used Monterey Jack. See Note 1 for other suggestions))
corn kernels (, fresh, frozen or canned (drained) (I used frozen))
punnet cherry tomatoes (, diced (or 2 medium tomatos, deseeded and diced, around 1 1/2 cups (Note 2)))
shallots / scallions (, green part only, sliced)
lime (, juice only (add more or less to taste))
/ 600g chicken thigh fillets (, skinless and boneless, cut into 1cm / 2/5" slices (Note 3))
garlic powder ((or add 1 minced garlic clove into the oil in the fry pan))
Pinch of cayenne or chili powder ((for heat - adjust to taste))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 180C/350F.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Prepare either the Pork Carnitas or Quick Mexican Chicken.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Place the corn tortillas in the oven (I do it directly on the shelf) and bake for 3 to 5 minutes on each side, just to make them a bit stiff but not browned.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Place a tortilla on a baking tray. Scatter 1/6th of the Pork Carnitas or Quick Mexican Chicken on the tortilla and top with Salsa (reserve some for Topping) then cheese. Place another tortilla on top and repeat, then again (so you end up with 3 layers of meat. Place the 4th tortilla on top. I don't put anything on it, but you could sprinkle some cheese if you want.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Repeat with remaining 4 tortillas.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Bake for 10 minutes until heated through and cheese is melted (it does not take long).

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Remove from oven.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Top with remaining Salsa and Toppings of choice (I used sour cream, avocado, jalapeño and coriander/cilantro)

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Salsa

steps.title: Step 10
steps.description: Pork Carnitas

steps.title: Step 11
steps.description: Quick Mexican Chicken

title: Indian Style Creamed Spinach
description: Rich and fragrant, this Indian Creamed Spinach makes a delicious side dish or, with a few additions, a simple vegetarian meal.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Add the coconut milk and spinach to a large pot. Stir and cook over medium heat until the coconut milk is warmed through and has wilted the spinach. Remove from the heat as soon as the spinach has wilted to avoid over cooking the spinach.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Transfer the warm coconut milk and spinach to a blender and pulse until the spinach is in small pieces (you can choose to blend until smooth, if you prefer). Set this mixture aside.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Dice the onion, mince the garlic, and grate the ginger. Add the onion, garlic, and ginger to a large skillet along with the olive oil. Sauté over medium heat until the onions are soft (about 5 minutes).

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Add the cumin, garam masala, turmeric, and cayenne to the skillet. Stir and cook the spices with the onion, garlic, and ginger for about two minutes more.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Dice the tomato and add it to the skillet along with about 1/4 cup water. Stir and cook the tomato with the other ingredients, dissolving any browned bits off the bottom of the skillet, until the tomato has broken down (5-8 minutes).

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Finally, add the coconut and spinach mixture to the skillet and stir to combine. Allow the mixture to heat through, stirring occasionally.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Taste the creamed spinach and add salt to taste. Start with 1/4 tsp, adding more as needed until the flavors pop (I added 3/4 tsp).

title: Vanilla Almond Granola
description: Sweet, sticky, and crunchy granola exploding with vanilla and almond flavors. Ditch store-bought, because healthy homemade granola is easy! This recipe is vegan, egg free, and gluten free (if using certified GF oats).

ingredients.name: and 1/2 cups (213g) old-fashioned whole rolled oats

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 300°F (149°C). Line a large baking sheet with parchment paper or a silicone baking mat.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Toss the oats, almonds, cinnamon, and salt in a large bowl. Set aside. In a medium bowl, whisk the maple syrup and melted coconut oil together until combined. Whisk in the almond and vanilla extracts. Pour over the oats and toss to coat. Make sure all of the oats are moistened.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Spread out onto the prepared baking sheet and bake for 45 minutes, stirring every 15 minutes. Allow granola to cool completely—as the granola cools, it becomes crunchy.

title: Creamy Pesto Pasta with Chicken and Broccoli
description: A super fast creamy pesto sauce drenches tender pasta, chicken breast, and broccoli for an easy weeknight dinner.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Bring a large pot of water to boil for the pasta. Once it reaches a full boil, add the pasta and continue to boil just until the pasta is tender, but still slightly firm in the center (7-8 minutes). Once the pasta is tender, add the frozen broccoli florets to the water with the pasta and continue to cook for 2-3 more minutes, or until the broccoli is tender. Drain the pasta and broccoli in a colander.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: While the pasta is cooking, cut the chicken breast into ½-inch pieces. Heat one tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Once hot, add the chicken and continue to cook until the outside of the chicken pieces are white, but they're still tender in the center (they will continue to cook as more ingredients are added).

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Add the chicken broth to the skillet with the chicken and allow it to heat through. Once hot, add the cream cheese (cut into small pieces) and pesto. Continue to stir and cook until the cream cheese has melted and created a smooth, creamy sauce with the pesto and chicken broth.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Finally, add the cooked and drained pasta and broccoli to the skillet and stir to coat it in the cream sauce. If the sauce becomes too dry or thick, add another splash of chicken broth to loosen it up. Serve hot.

title: Chicken and Spinach Strata (Bread Bake)
description: Dinner in a snap! No chopping, and a great way to use up leftovers.

ingredients.name: french bread (, cut into 2 cm / 1 inch cubes)
grated cheese ((any melting cheese is fine - tasty, cheddar, mozzarella))
shredded or diced chicken (, or any other cooked protein, ham or bacon)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Defrost the spinach in the microwave (4 minutes on high), then squeeze out excess water.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Make Egg mixture: Place ingredients into a bowl and whisk until combined.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Spread half the bread into the base of a baking dish 25cm x 25cm (10" x 10").

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Layer with the spinach, then chicken then top with half the cheese.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Top with remaining bread. Squish the bread down to compress (this helps the egg mixture to be soaked up evenly).

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Pour over egg mixture - try to cover all the bread evenly.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Top with remaining cheese, then squish down to help the bread soak up the egg mixture.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Set aside for at least 15 minutes, preferably 30 minutes.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: To freeze: Cover tightly and place in freezer. Defrost completely before cooking.

steps.title: Step 10
steps.description: Preheat oven to 180C/350F.

steps.title: Step 11
steps.description: Cover baking dish with foil and bake for 20 minutes. Remove foil, then bake for a further 10 minutes until golden on top.

steps.title: Step 12
steps.description: Serve immediately, sprinkled with parsley if desired.

title: Healthy Peanut Butter Chunk Oatmeal Bars
description: Soft and chewy peanut butter oatmeal bars made with healthy, wholesome ingredients. The chocolate is optional. Sort of!

ingredients.name: (120ml) milk (I used almond milk, but use whichever you prefer)
(90g) dairy-free chocolate chips (or regular chocolate chips)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 350°F (177°C). Line an 8-inch square baking pan with parchment paper or spray with nonstick spray. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: With an electric or stand mixer fitted with a paddle attachment, mix the brown sugar and peanut butter on medium speed until light in color and fluffy, about 3 minutes. Mix in the vanilla, scraping down the sides as needed.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: On medium speed, add in the flour, oats, salt, and baking soda. The dough will be very thick and clumpy, but it will come together. Slowly add the milk in a steady stream, mixing until a dough forms. Fold in chocolate chips and raisins. Use your hands to make sure everything is combined, if needed.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Once dough is completely combined, press it lightly into the prepared baking dish. Bake for about 17-20 minutes until the bars are lightly golden and set. Allow to cool completely and cut into squares. I keep mine in the refrigerator in a covered container. Bars will be good stored up to 2 weeks.

title: Quick Chicken Pot Pie
description: This is how you make a pie from scratch in 20 minutes!

ingredients.name: sheet puff pastry ((25cm x 25cm / 10" x 10"), thawed)
g/13oz chicken thigh fillets ((or tenderloin or breast), cut into small bite size pieces)
onion ((small, brown, white or yellow), diced)
marsala ((or dry sherry, port or white wine) (see notes))
frozen mixed peas (, corn and carrots, thawed)
grated cheese ((any cheese that melts. I used tasty))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 200C/390F. Lightly spray baking tray with oil.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Cut puff pastry into 4 pieces and place on baking tray. Bake for 15 minutes until puffed and golden. Remove from oven and set aside.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Meanwhile, melt butter in large pan over high heat.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Add onion and garlic cloves and sauté for 1 minute.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Add bacon and chicken and cook for 2 to 3 minutes until chicken is lightly browned but still not cooked through inside.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Add marsala and cook for 30 seconds to allow the alcohol to cook out. Most of the marsala should evaporate.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Add the broccoli, peas, corn and carrots and stir to combine.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Sprinkle the flour over and add milk, stirring to dissolve the flour into the milk.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Bring to simmer then stir through cheese, salt and pepper. Adjust salt to your taste.

steps.title: Step 10
steps.description: Simmer, stirring for 30 seconds to 1 minute until the sauce is thickened, then remove from heat.

steps.title: Step 11
steps.description: To serve, divide the chicken filling between 4 plates and top with a piece of puff pastry.

title: Tomato Herb Soup
description: Use basic pantry staples to create this quick and easy Tomato Herb Soup. It's thick, rich, flavorful, and perfect for grilled cheese dipping!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Mince the garlic and add it to a sauce pot along with the olive oil, oregano, basil, thyme, rosemary, red pepper flakes, and freshly cracked pepper. Turn the heat on to medium-low and sauté for about 2 minutes, or until the garlic has softened.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Add the tomato paste and brown sugar. Stir until everything is mixed (the oil may stay partially separated). Cook the mixture while stirring continuously for 3-5 minutes, or until the tomato paste takes on a darker, almost burgundy hue.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Add the crushed tomatoes and vegetable broth. Whisk the mixture together until smooth. Turn the heat up to medium and heat through, stirring occasionally. Serve hot.

title: Classic Chocolate Covered Pretzels
description: Chocolate-covered pretzels are so simple to make, yet always a crowd-pleaser. Have fun with all the variations including different shaped pretzels, white chocolate and semi-sweet chocolate, and various toppings like sprinkles, crushed…

ingredients.name: (226g) semi-sweet or white chocolate (two 4-ounce bars), finely chopped*

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Line a large baking sheet with parchment paper. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: You can melt it in a double boiler or use the microwave. If using the microwave: place the chocolate and oil in a medium heat-proof bowl. I recommend using a glass 2-cup liquid measuring cup because its depth makes dipping really easy. Microwave for 20-second increments, stirring after each, until chocolate is completely melted and smooth.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Dip a pretzel in the melted chocolate. Use a fork to lift it out, and tap the fork on the side of the bowl to allow excess chocolate to drip off. Use a toothpick to help slide the pretzel off the fork and onto the lined baking sheet. Top with sprinkles (if using) while the chocolate is still wet. If you have leftover melted chocolate, you can reheat it (if needed to keep it fluid) and drizzle it on top of the coated pretzels. I usually use a squeeze bottle for drizzling.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Refrigerate to set the chocolate, about 20–30 minutes. Once chocolate is set, store the chocolate-covered pretzels in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 1 week, or in the refrigerator for up to 2 weeks.

title: Lemon Pepper Zucchini
description: Bright and peppery, this Lemon Pepper Zucchini is a simple and flavorful side dish for any dinner! Great for that summer zucchini bumper crop!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Cut the zucchini into halfrounds, about ¼-inch thick.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Add the zucchini to a large bowl and sprinkle the lemon pepper seasonin over top. Stir to coat the zucchini with the seasoning.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Heat a large skillet over medium-high. Once the skillet is very hot, add half of the olive oil and swirl to coat the surface of the skillet. Add half of the seasoned zucchini and sauté (stir often) for about five mintues, or until the outside of the zucchini is well browned.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Remove the cooked zucchini to a bowl or serving plate, add the remaining olive oil and zucchini, and cook in the same manner. Serve immediately.

title: Baby (Mini) Apple Banana Oat Muffins
description: Easy, quick, and healthy baby-friendly mini muffins made from banana, applesauce, and oats. Mixed in the blender and poured into muffin liners, this make-ahead recipe couldn't be easier.

ingredients.name: and 1/4 cups (106g) old-fashioned whole rolled oats or quick oats, plus extra for topping
(80g) unsweetened applesauce or fruit/veggie puree (see note)
or 3 Tablespoons coconut sugar, maple syrup, or other desired sugar*
add-ins such as peeled diced apple, pear, or berries*

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 350°F (177°C). Spray a 24-count mini muffin pan with nonstick spray or use mini muffin liners. If using liners, grease the liners.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Place all of the ingredients in a blender or food processor, in the order listed, except for the 3/4 cup of add-ins. Blend or process until combined. Stir in the add-ins. Divide evenly between muffin liners. Top with a few oats, if desired.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Bake for 13-15 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center of a muffin comes out clean. Allow to cool for 10 minutes in the pan. Remove and cool completely before serving.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Muffins stay fresh covered at room temperature for up to 2 days or in the refrigerator for up to 1 week.

title: Rosemary Pepper Drop Biscuits
description: Rosemary Pepper Drop Biscuits are an easy to make side for soups and stews. No kneading or cutting biscuits, just mix, drop, and bake!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat the oven to 400ºF. Roughly chop or crush the rosemary to prevent large, sharp pieces. In a large bowl, combine the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, salt, rosemary, pepper, sugar) until well combined.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Take the butter out of the refrigerator just prior to using it. Slice the butter into pieces, then add them to the dry ingredients. Work the butter into the flour mixture until no large pieces remain and it looks a little like damp sand. I use my hands for this, but you can also use a pastry cutter.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Starting with 3/4 cup, add just enough milk to moisten the mixture into a thick, slightly sticky dough (see photos below). There should be no dry flour left on the bottom of the bowl, but the dough should not be so wet that it appears glossy. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and scoop 8 dollops of the biscuit dough onto the paper (about 1/3 to 1/2 cup each).

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Bake the biscuits in the fully preheated 400ºF oven for 18-22 minutes or until they are golden brown on the edges. Serve warm.

title: Crispy Shredded Chicken Noodle Stir Fry
description: This is a super quick stir fry made using the chicken and braising liquid from my Slow Cooker Crispy Chinese Shredded Chicken. It freezes extremely well so is fantastic to have on hand for fast midweek meals.

ingredients.name: Slow Cooker Crispy Chinese Shredded Chicken (("Shredded Chicken"))
Slow Cooker Crispy Chinese Shredded Chicken braising liquid ((see note 3))
Sriracha sauce ((or any hot sauce or chili paste) (optional))
(tightly packed) Chinese broccoli, leaves separated from stems (cut stems vertically into thin sticks) (about 1 small bunch)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Cook / soak rice stick noodles according to packet instructions. Drain and set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Heat oil in wok or large fry pan over high heat.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Add garlic and stir fry for 30 seconds to flavour the oil. Remove and discard garlic.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Add the Chinese broccoli stems and Shredded Chicken and stir fry for 1 1/2 minutes.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Add the noodles, braising liquid and Sriracaha (if using) and stir fry, tossing the noodles rapidly to coat with the sauce for about 1 minute. The sugar in the braising liquid should make the noodles char a bit.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Add the Chinese broccoli leaves and toss to mix in with the noodles, then remove from heat. The Chinese broccoli leaves will continue to cook from the residual heat.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Serve immediately.

title: Seasoned Rice
description: Seasoned rice is an all-purpose side dish infused with garlic and herbs. Serve it as a side dish or as the bed for your favorite bowl meal.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Combine the rice, garlic powder, thyme, red pepper, salt, and water in a heavy bottomed pot. Give it a brief stir to evenly distribute the ingredients.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Place a lid on the pot and bring the water up to a boil over high heat. Once it reaches a full boil, turn the heat down to low and let it simmer for 40 minutes. After 40 minutes, turn the heat off and let it rest with the lid in place for 5 minutes more.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: After 5 minutes without heat, fluff the rice and serve, or refrigerate until ready to eat.

title: Pretzel Crusted Chicken Bites
description: Looking for a fun way to serve up some chicken? Coat in crushed pretzels and bake to crisp perfection. Tender on the inside, crunchy on the outside. Everyone loved these!

ingredients.name: and 1/2 pounds skinless, boneless chicken breasts or tenders
whole wheat flour or all-purpose flour (spooned & leveled)
and 1/2 cups finely crushed pretzels (or more, as needed)
nonstick spray like PAM, olive oil spray, or coconut oil spray (found mine at Trader Joes)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 400°F (204°C). Line a large baking sheet with a silicone baking mat or coat heavily with nonstick spray.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: If using chicken breasts, pound down and cut into little 1-1.5 inch pieces. If using boneless, skinless chicken tenders (chicken tenders are the lean strips of meat found attached to the underside of chicken breasts—they can also be purchased separately), simply cut into 1-1.5 inch pieces.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Combine flour, salt, and pepper in a shallow dish. Beat eggs in another shallow dish. Pour pretzels into a third shallow dish. Coat each chicken piece in flour, shaking off any excess. Then, dip in egg and let any excess drip off. Then generously roll in the pretzels, shaking off any excess. Add more crushed pretzels to the dish if you are running low. Place the chicken bites on the prepared baking sheet. Lightly spray each with nonstick spray to “seal” the breading, which will prevent the breading from staying raw and allows it to bake onto the chicken fingers.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Bake for 8 minutes. Turn each piece over and continue baking until the outside is crisp and the centers are cooked through, about 6-8 minutes more. Baking times may vary, just make sure yours are cooked through. If you like them more brown, bake longer. Serve chicken bites with toothpicks (if using as an appetizer), honey mustard, or this spicy cheese sauce. Store any leftovers in the refrigerator for up to 2 days. I chopped them up and put on top of a salad. It was so good!

title: The Bagel Lunch Box
description: This Bagel Lunch Box is an easy and affordable grab and go breakfast or lunch idea, perfect for work or school.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: To hard boil the eggs, place the eggs in a sauce pot and add water until the eggs are covered by one inch. Place the pot over high heat and allow the water to come up to a full boil. When it reaches a full boil, turn off the heat, place a lid on the pot, and let the eggs sit in the hot water for 15 minutes. After 15 minutes, transfer the eggs to a bowl of ice water to cool.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: To make the scallion herb cream cheese, combine the cream cheese, parsley, cilantro, green onion, garlic powder, salt, and lemon juice in a bowl. Stir together until evenly combined.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Place one bagel in each lunch box along with ¼ of the cucumber slices, ¼ of the grape tomatoes, ¼ of the cream cheese (1 oz.), and one hard boiled egg. Refrigerate up to five days.

title: Baked Banana Donuts with Dark Chocolate Glaze
description: Sweet banana donuts, baked not fried, then covered in a rich dark chocolate glaze.

ingredients.name: (67g) packed light or dark brown sugar

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 350°F (177°C). Spray a donut pan with non-stick spray. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Whisk the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg together in a medium bowl. Set aside. Whisk the egg and brown sugar together in a medium bowl until smooth. Whisk in the butter, mashed banana, vanilla, and buttermilk until smooth and combined. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and mix until just combined. Do not overmix.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Spoon the batter into the donut cavities—I highly recommend using a large zipped-top bag for ease. Cut a corner off the bottom of the bag and pipe the batter into each donut cup, filling 2 ∕ 3 –3 ∕ 4 of the way full. (See the photo in my chocolate frosted donuts post for a visual.)

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Bake for 9–10 minutes or until the edges are lightly browned. Allow to cool for about two minutes and transfer to a wire rack set on a large piece of parchment paper or on a large baking sheet. Bake the remaining donut batter (there is usually enough batter for 2-3 more donuts) and once baked, transfer to the wire rack. Allow donuts to cool down until you can handle them.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Place the chocolate chips, butter, corn syrup, and water in a medium bowl. Melt in 20 second increments in the microwave, stirring after each time, until completely melted and smooth. Dip the tops of the donuts into the chocolate glaze.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Donuts taste best eaten the same day, though they may be covered tightly and stored at room temperature for 2 days.

title: Garlic White Bean Mash In A Flash
description: Sometimes you've just gotta have mash but you simply don't have the energy (or time) to peel, cut, boil and mash potatoes.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Heat oil in pan over medium high, add garlic and sauté until fragrant.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Add beans, stock and lemon zest.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Simmer for 2 minutes, then use a fork or potato masher to mash.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Season to taste with salt and pepper.

title: Cuban Pork Sandwich (Cubanos) from Chef Movie
description: This is the cubanos sandwich recipe from the 2014 movie Chef. The food in the recipe was created by real life rock star chef Roy Choi. This is the actual recipe from the movie! It was published on thestar.com.

ingredients.name: large (, thin slices Mojo Marinated Pork)
of white baguettes (, 6 inch/15 cm in length, cut in half)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Heat skillet over medium heat. Add ham and pork slices, and cook each side until slightly browned then remove to a plate.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Butter cut sides of baguettes then place in the skillet, cut side down, for 2 minutes until lightly browned. Remove onto work surface.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Layer the bottom of the baguettes with pork, ham, then cheese and pickles. Cut, break or fold the ham, pork and cheese so they fit. Spread the cut side of the bun tops with mustard then place on the sandwich.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Butter the bottom AND top of the outside of the baguettes.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Heat skillet over medium high heat. Place the baguettes in the skillet, top with a sheet of baking paper then weigh it down with a heavy skillet or pot (use cans if necessary for extra weight so the sandwich compressed). Cook for 3 minutes on each side, until dark golden brown and crispy, and the cheese is melted.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Let sandwiches stand 1 minute before cutting in half. Serve IMMEDIATELY.

title: Pumpkin Cake Cheesecake
description: When pumpkin cake and cheesecake combine forces, we have pumpkin cake cheesecake! For a little something extra, top with a thin layer of cream cheese frosting and finish with chopped pecans.

ingredients.name: (452g) full-fat brick cream cheese, softened to room temperature
(200g) packed light or dark brown sugar
and 1/3 cups (318g) pumpkin puree (canned or fresh)*
(113g) full-fat brick cream cheese, softened to room temperature
(28g) unsalted butter, softened to room temperature

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Adjust oven rack to the lower third position and preheat the oven to 350°F (177°C). Spray a 9-inch springform pan with nonstick cooking spray. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Using a handheld or stand mixer fitted with a paddle attachment, beat the cream cheese and granulated sugar together on medium speed in a large bowl until smooth and creamy, about 2 minutes. Add the sour cream, vanilla extract, and flour and beat until combined. On low speed, add the eggs one at a time, beating after each addition until just blended. Do not over-mix the filling after you have added the eggs. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: In a medium bowl, whisk the oil, brown sugar, eggs, vanilla extract, and blotted-dry pumpkin (see notes) together until combined. In a large bowl, whisk the flour, baking soda, cinnamon, pumpkin pie spice, and salt together. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and whisk until no large lumps remain. Avoid over-mixing the pumpkin cake batter.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Spread 1 and 1/2 cups of the pumpkin cake batter into the bottom of prepared pan. On top of the pumpkin batter, begin dropping large spoonfuls of both the cheesecake batter and pumpkin batter, alternating one after the other. It doesn’t have to be neat or perfect. Do not swirl with a knife. See photo above of what my cake looked like before going into the oven.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: If needed for extra visuals, see my How to Make a Cheesecake Water Bath; the visual guide will assist you in this step. Boil a pot of water. You need 1 inch of water in your roasting pan for the water bath, so make sure you boil enough. I use an entire kettle of hot water. As the water is heating up, wrap the aluminum foil around the springform pan. Place the pan inside of a large roasting pan. Carefully pour the hot water inside of the pan and place in the oven. (Or you can place the roasting pan in the oven first, then pour the hot water in. Whichever is easier for you.)

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Bake for 65-75 minutes or until the center is almost set.* If you find the edges are browning, loosely place aluminum foil on top of the cake as it bakes. Once done, turn the oven off and open the door slightly. Let the cheesecake sit in the oven in the water bath for 1 hour. Remove from the oven, peel the aluminum foil off the bottom, wipe pan dry with a towel, then place in the refrigerator to chill for at least 6 hours or overnight (preferred).

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: After chilling, run a knife around the edge of the cake to loosen it from the rim. Remove the rim.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: (This can be made up to 2 days in advance – cover and store in the refrigerator until ready to use.) Using a handheld or stand mixer fitted with a paddle attachment, beat the cream cheese and butter together on medium-high speed in a medium bowl until smooth and creamy. Add the confectioners sugar, vanilla, and salt. Beat on low speed for 30 seconds, then turn up to high speed and beat until smooth and creamy. Beat in 1-2 Tablespoons of milk, depending how thick or thin you want the frosting. Spread onto chilled cheesecake. Top with pecans, if desired.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Cut into slices and serve cheesecake chilled. Cover leftover cheesecake and store in the refrigerator for up to 4 days.

title: Bacon French Toast Roll Ups
description: Crispy bacon rolled up in french toast that you can eat with your hands. Take it to an insane level by adding Nachos Cheese Dipping Sauce to dunk the roll ups in.

ingredients.name: fresh soft sandwich bread ((I used white, but you could use wholemeal, wholegrain etc) (note 1))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Cut crusts off the bread.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Use a rolling pin and roll back and forth 3 or 4 times on each piece of bread to flatten it out. Because it is fresh bread, it should become a bit sticky.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Combine egg, milk and salt in a dish or bowl that is large enough for a roll up to lie flat in (so you can roll it in the egg mixture). Whisk with a fork to combine.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Heat large pan over high heat (no oil required because the bacon is so fatty).

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Place bacon in the pan and sear each side until browned but not until it is crispy. If it is too crispy, it will just crumble when rolled up.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Place one piece of bacon in the middle of each piece of bread.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Roll up the bread, ending with the seam side down. Press down lightly to help it stay in place.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Wipe pan clean, place butter in pan and return pan to heat.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Roll a roll up in the egg mixture, then shake off excess. Enclose your fist around it (lightly) and twist the roll up a few times back and forth. This rubs the egg mixture into the roll up and helps ensure the seam remains sealed. Repeat with remaining roll ups.

steps.title: Step 10
steps.description: Place roll ups in the pan. Cook, rotating, for around 3 to 4 minutes until all sides are golden brown.

steps.title: Step 11
steps.description: Remove and serve immediately, with warmed Nachos Cheese Dip (if using).

title: The Tuna Salad Lunch Box
description: This Tuna Salad Lunch Box is an easy make-ahead lunch idea with plenty of vegetables and protein to keep you full.

ingredients.name: 12oz. cans chunk light tuna in water ($3.98)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Drain the tuna well. Finely dice the celery and slice the green onion. Combine the tuna, celery, green onion, walnuts, mayonnaise, lemon juice, salt, and pepper in a bowl. Stir until everything is evenly combined.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Slice the remaining celery into sticks. Cut each mini sweet pepper in half and scoop out the seeds.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Divide the tuna salad between four containers (about 1 cup each). Add celery sticks, mini sweet peppers, and crackers to each box with the tuna salad. For extra protection, either wrap the crackers in a sandwich baggie or pack them separately. Refrigerate the lunch boxes up to four days.

title: Mini French Toast Bites
description: This recipe uses a crusty baguette as the bread, so your French toast is bite-sized and perfect for little appetites. Kids love to help make these for breakfast!

ingredients.name: 1–2 Tablespoons (14-28g) unsalted butter, for greasing the pan

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Slice baguette into 1- to 1.5-inch-thick slices. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: In a medium bowl, whisk the eggs, half-and-half, milk, and cinnamon together until combined. The mixture will be thick and creamy. Pour into a pie dish or shallow baking pan.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Soak the bread slices in the egg mixture for about 2 minutes on each side.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Meanwhile, over medium-low heat, melt 1 Tablespoon of butter in a skillet. Place however many slices of bread fit into the pan and cook until golden brown on each side, about 3 minutes on each side. Melt more butter in skillet for the next batch, if needed.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Serve immediately with your favorite toppings like maple syrup, confectioners’ sugar, berries, whipped cream, blueberry sauce topping, or strawberry sauce topping.

title: The Cheese Board Lunch Box
description: This easy no-cook lunch idea is perfect for the cheese lovers of the world! The Cheese Board Lunch Box makes a meal out of savory nibbles.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Slice the cheese. Wrap sets of 5 crackers in fold-top sandwich bags or waxed paper.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Divide the cheese salami, wrapped crackers, dried apricots, and walnuts between four containers. Refrigerate until ready to eat, or up to five days.

title: Peanut Butter Caramel Corn
description: Salty, sweet, sticky, and easy-to-make peanut butter caramel corn. You won't be able to put this stuff down! A 20 minute recipe.

ingredients.name: unflavored popped popcorn (air-popped or 1 standard size bag)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Line a large baking sheet with parchment paper or a silicone baking mat. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Pop 10-12 cups of popcorn and pour it into a large bowl. Toss in the peanuts. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Over medium heat, warm the honey and sugar together in a medium sized saucepan. Stir occasionally. Once it begins to bubble, allow it to boil for about 3 minutes. Add the salt and peanut butter and stir until smooth. Remove from heat.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Pour the peanut butter mixture over the popcorn/nuts. Toss gently to coat practically every kernel. The popcorn will form large clusters. Spread the popcorn onto prepared baking sheet and allow to cool for about 10 minutes before serving.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Makes 10-12 cups. Popcorn remains fresh for up to 10 days covered at room temperature. If storing in a tight container, be sure to break up the popcorn as you serve it because it will form large clusters.

title: Aloo Paratha (Indian Potato Stuffed Flatbread)
description: Aloo Paratha is a very popular breakfast dish in India. The beauty of this recipe is how flexible it is - there are so many options and variations you can do and I've provided a bunch of suggestions in the notes.

ingredients.name: vegetable oil ((or any other cooking oil), ghee or butter)
fresh coriander/cilantro (, roughly chopped (optional - adds a nice burst of freshness))
Ajwain/ Carom seeds OR 1 tsp thyme ((Note 7))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Place the flour, water and salt in a bowl. Use a table knife to mix the ingredients together, then use your hands.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Once the dough is sort of formed, turn it out onto a work surface and knead it 60 times. It should be smooth and elastic, not sticky or crumbly.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Form the dough into a ball, cover with cling wrap and set aside for at least 20 minutes (up to a few hours). Do not refrigerate.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Meanwhile, make the Filling. Place all Filling ingredients into a bowl and mix to combine.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Preheat oven to very low (to keep Parathas warm because you can only cook one at a time).

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Cut the dough into 4 pieces with a knife.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Take one ball and use a rolling pin to roll it out into a round about 18cm/7" in diameter.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Place 1/3 cup of the Filling into the middle of the rolled out dough.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Gather the edges of the dough to enclose the Filling (see photo below). Remove as much air as possible from inside then pinch to seal.

steps.title: Step 10
steps.description: Flatten the ball slightly and shape the flattened disc into a circle using your hands.

steps.title: Step 11
steps.description: Turn the dough over so the "sealed" side is facing down. Use a rolling pin to roll it out to about 1 1/2 cm / 2/3" thickness. Repeat with remaining dough.

steps.title: Step 12
steps.description: Heat 1 tbsp of oil in a non stick fry pan over medium heat.

steps.title: Step 13
steps.description: Place one Paratha into the fry pan and cook the first side for 1 minute 45 seconds. Use an egg flip to check if it is ready to turn - the underside should be golden brown.

steps.title: Step 14
steps.description: Turn the Paratha over and cook the other side for 1 minute 30 seconds.

steps.title: Step 15
steps.description: Remove from fry pan onto a wire rack (this stops the underside from going soggy due to sweat) and place into a low oven to keep warm while you cook the remaining Parathas.

steps.title: Step 16
steps.description: Add a small drizzle of the remaining oil into the pan (you should not need much). Proceed to cook the remaining Parathas.

steps.title: Step 17
steps.description: Cut into 4 pieces and serve immediately. It can be served with chutney or yoghurt on the side. I find that the Filling has so much flavour that it doesn't need anything on the side.

title: CHICKEN CHOW MEIN
description: One of the most popular Chinese restaurant noodle dishes.

ingredients.name: g/7oz fresh chow mein egg noodles
g/4oz chicken ((or beef or pork) sliced against the grain)
Real Chinese All Purpose Stir Fry Sauce

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Prepare noodles according to packet instructions.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Heat oil in wok over high heat. Add garlic and sauté for 10 seconds, then add the chicken and sauté until just cooked and nicely browned.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Add the cabbage and carrot, stir fry for 30 seconds, then add the Sauce and water and let it cook for 30 seconds until the Sauce starts to thicken.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Then add the noodles and shallots and toss to coat with the sauce, then serve immediately.

title: The Hummus Lunch Box
description: This Hummus Lunch Box is a cold lunch classic. With almost zero prep work, this is the fastest, easiest no-cook lunch around.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Slice the cucumber and cut the pita bread into triangles.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Divide the hummus, cucumber, tomatoes, olives, and pita triangles between four containers. Refrigerate up to 5 days.

title: Caramel Snickers 7 Layer Bars
description: My caramel-infused, 7 layered version of a Snickers bar!

ingredients.name: graham cracker crumbs (about 6 full graham crackers ground up)
(4 Tbsp; 56g) salted or unsalted butter, melted
full size (58g each) Snickers bars, chopped
unwrapped Kraft caramels, chopped (or use 1/2 cup Kraft Caramel Bits)
sweetened condensed milk (a little more than half of a standard 14 oz can)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 350°F (177°C). Line an 8-inch or 9-inch square baking pan with parchment paper or aluminum foil. Spray generously with non-stick spray. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Stir together graham cracker crumbs and melted butter. Mixture will be relatively crumbly. Press onto the bottom of the prepared dish and slightly up the sides.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Layer chocolate chips and next 4 ingredients, in the order listed, into prepared baking pan. Drizzle with sweetened condensed milk.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Bake for 35-38 minutes or until center is set. Allow to cool completely and lift the bars out of the pan using the edges of the parchment paper. Cut into bars.

title: The Pizza Roll Up Lunch Box
description: These easy pizza roll up lunch boxes are a great no-cook lunch idea for your work week. No reheating required for this lunch meal prep!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Spread 1 Tbsp pesto over the surface of each tortilla (it does not need to cover the entire surface. Lay two slices of provolone over one half of each tortilla, followed by about 9 pepperoni. Lastly, add one handful of fresh spinach to each tortilla.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Roll each tortilla up, trying to keep the roll as tight as possible. With the seams facing down, slice the rolls into one-inch sections. Place the sliced roll-ups in your meal prep container. Pack them closely together to keep them from coming unrolled.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Slice the green bell peppers into strips. Divide the bell pepper strips between the four containers.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Fill four small containers with 2 Tbsp pizza sauce each. Refrigerate your roll ups, bell peppers, and pizza sauce for up to five days.

title: Amaretto Cheesecake
description: This unbelievably creamy amaretto cheesecake is baked in a thick almond graham cracker crust and flavored with sweet almond liqueur and chocolate chips. Garnish with fresh whipped cream for a truly epic ending to your meal!

ingredients.name: and 1/3 cups (160g) graham cracker crumbs (about 10–11 full sheet graham crackers)
(904g) full-fat brick cream cheese, softened to room temperature
(240g) full-fat sour cream, at room temperature
and 1/4 cups mini semi-sweet chocolate chips*
topping suggestions: toasted almonds, chocolate chips, chocolate ganache, whipped cream*

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Adjust the oven rack to the lower-middle position and preheat oven to 350°F (177°C).

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Using a food processor, pulse the graham cracker crumbs and almonds together until the almonds are crumbs. Pour into a medium bowl and stir in sugar until combined, and then stir in the melted butter. Mixture will be sandy. Try to smash/break up any large chunks. Pour into an ungreased 10-inch springform pan and with medium pressure using your hand, pat the crumbs down into the bottom and partly up the sides to make a compact crust. Do not pack down with heavy force because that makes the crust too hard. Simply pat down until the mixture is no longer crumby/crumbly. Tips: You can use a small flat-bottomed measuring cup to help press down the bottom crust and smooth out the surface, but do not pack down too hard. For more shaping technique tips, see the graham cracker crust recipe page.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Pre-bake the crust for 10 minutes. Remove from the oven and place the hot pan on a large piece of aluminum foil. The foil will wrap around the pan for the water bath or water bath alternative in step 5. Allow crust to slightly cool as you prepare the filling.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Using a handheld or stand mixer fitted with a paddle or whisk attachment, beat the cream cheese and granulated sugar together on medium-high speed in a large bowl until the mixture is smooth and creamy, about 2 minutes. Add the cornstarch, sour cream, amaretto, vanilla extract, and almond extract then beat until fully combined. On medium speed, add the eggs one at a time, beating after each addition until just blended. After the final egg is incorporated into the batter, stop the mixer. Fold in chocolate chips. Avoid over-mixing the batter.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: If needed for extra visuals, see my How to Make a Cheesecake Water Bath; the visual guide will assist you in this step. Boil a pot of water. You need 1 inch of water in your roasting pan for the water bath, so make sure you boil enough. I use an entire kettle of hot water. Place the pan inside of a large roasting pan. Pour the cheesecake batter on top of the crust. Use a silicone spatula or spoon to smooth it into an even layer. Carefully pour the hot water inside of the pan and place in the oven. (Or you can place the roasting pan in the oven first, then pour the hot water in. Whichever is easier for you.)

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: (Note: if you notice the cheesecake browning too quickly on top, tent it with aluminum foil halfway through baking.) Bake cheesecake for 60–75 minutes or until the center is almost set. When it’s done, the center of the cheesecake will slightly jiggle if you gently tap the pan. Turn the oven off and open the oven door slightly. Let the cheesecake sit in the oven as it cools down for 1 hour. (Inside the water bath or, if you used the alternative, with the water bath pan inside the oven.) Remove from the oven and allow to cool completely at room temperature. Then, refrigerate the cheesecake for at least 4 hours or overnight. I recommend overnight.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Use a knife to loosen the chilled cheesecake from the rim of the springform pan, then remove the rim. Garnish with toppings. I used toasted almonds, mini chocolate chips, and amaretto whipped cream. See recipe note about toasting almonds and for amaretto whipped cream. I used Wilton 8B piping tip for the pictured whipped cream. Using a clean sharp knife, cut into slices for serving. For neat slices, wipe the knife clean and dip into warm water between each slice.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Cover and store leftover cheesecake in the refrigerator for up to 5 days.

title: The Peanut Butter Lunch Box
description: This peanut butter lunch box is an easy no-cook lunch idea for school, work, picnics, or road trips! No reheating needed!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Wash and slice the celery into sticks. Slice each apple in half, remove the core, then cut into slices. Sprinkle the lemon juice over the apple slices to slow browning, if desired.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Add 3 tablespoons of peanut butter to each container. Add about 15 pretzels to each container, along with ½ an apple, some celery sticks, and two dates. Enjoy immediately or refrigerate up to five days.

title: Jerk Seasoned Collard Greens
description: Sweet, spicy, and savory, these Jerk Seasoned Collard Greens are a hearty and flavorful side dish that also makes great leftovers!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Slice the onion and mince the garlic. Add the onion, garlic, and cooking oil to a large pot. Sauté the onion and garlic over medium heat until the onions are soft and translucent (about 5 minutes).

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Add the jerk seasoning, orange juice, chicken broth, and collard greens to the pot. Stir to combine. Place a lid on the pot, turn the heat up to medium-high, and allow the broth to come up to a boil.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Once boiling, turn the heat down to medium-low and let the collard greens simmer, stirring occasionally, until they are tender (about 30 minutes, or to your liking). Keep the lid in place when not stirring. Serve hot.

title: Crispy Cheesy Sausage Hash Browns
description: Loaded hash browns! These are made with sausage and cheese mixed throughout the shredded potato, then panfried until golden. Great for make ahead and as finger food for parties! ! PS This is also sensational made with chorizo. Ugh.

ingredients.name: / 250g sausage (, remove from casings (the best quality you can afford))
grated cheddar cheese ((or any other melting cheese, but not mozzarella))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Peel and shred the potato using a standard box grater.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Place the potato in a colander and run under cold water for 10 seconds, or until the water runs clear.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Shake off excess water, then transfer the potato to a clean tea towel. Bundle it up and squeeze hard to remove excess water, then transfer to a bowl.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Heat 1/2 tbsp of oil in a skillet over high heat. Cook the sausage, breaking it up as you go (like cooking ground meat/mince).

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Add sausage to potatoes. Add remaining ingredients and mix to combine.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Wipe the skillet clean with a paper towel, discarding excess fat. Heat 1 tbsp oil in a skillet over medium high heat.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Place 1/4 cup of mixture in the skillet, and use the base of the cup measure to pat it down to about 8mm / 1/3" thickness. Repeat for however many you can fit in the skillet.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Cook until deep golden brown (about 3 minutes), then flip and cook the other side until golden brown and crispy.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Remove onto a rack and place in a low oven to keep warm while you cook the remaining hash browns.

steps.title: Step 10
steps.description: Serve hot, garnished with extra scallions/shallots if desired.

title: Easy Baked Macaroni and Cheese
description: This baked macaroni and cheese recipe combines delicious sharp cheddar and cream cheese for a flavorful and creamy cheese sauce. Before serving, top with breadcrumbs and bake.

ingredients.name: (450g) dry elbow pasta or pasta shells
and 1/2 cups (about 14 ounces) shredded cheddar cheese*
each: salt, ground mustard, smoked paprika, and garlic powder
optional for serving: finely chopped fresh parsley

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 400°F (204°C).

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: In a large pot of boiling water, add a pinch of salt and the pasta. Cook the pasta until al dente, about 1-2 minutes less than the package cook time. Drain the cooked pasta, pour into a large bowl and stir in 2 Tablespoons of butter. Set pasta aside.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: In a large saucepan or 12-inch oven-safe skillet, melt 2 Tablespoons of butter over medium heat. Once melted, whisk in the flour to form a thick paste. Cook and whisk the paste for 1 minute, then slowly whisk in the milk. Once all of the milk is added, continue to whisk. Bring to a simmer. Once simmering, whisk in the cheese until smooth. Whisk in the salt, ground mustard, smoked paprika, garlic powder, and hot sauce (if using). Cook for 2-3 minutes until thickened.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Pour the sauce over the buttered pasta. Add the cream cheese and stir everything together until the pasta is completely coated and cream cheese is melted. Scoop pasta back into skillet or a greased 9×13-inch pan.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Melt the remaining 2 Tablespoons of butter and mix with the Panko. Sprinkle over pasta.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Bake pasta for 30 minutes or until it is lightly browned on top and the sides are bubbling. I suggest covering the pasta halfway through bake time to prevent the top from burning.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Allow to sit for 5 minutes before serving with a little fresh parsley. Careful, it’s hot!

title: Cottage Cheese Crab Bowl
description: This Cottage Cheese Crab Bowl is the perfect light, fresh, and filling lunch for summer. It also meal preps well, so pack a few to take to work for lunch!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Add the cottage cheese, chopped cucumber, and crab meat to a bowl. Top with everything bagel seasoning and a light drizzle of sriracha.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Serve immediately, or refrigerate until ready to eat, up to four days.

title: Vietnamese Pork Chop
description: Pork is probably the most widely used meat in Vietnam. This lemongrass marinade is perfect for a pork cutlet to cook on the outdoor grill.

ingredients.name: chilli sauce ((sriracha, chilli paste) or 1 birds eye chilli, finely chopped)
stalk lemongrass (, white part only, bruised them sliced into 1cm/0.5" pieces)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Place the Marinade ingredients in a ziplock bag and massage the bag to mix the ingredients.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Add pork to the Marinade and massage the bag to coat all the cutlets with the Marinade.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Marinate for at least 4 hours, up to 24 hours.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Brush the outdoor grill with oil and heat to medium high (or pan on a stove).

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Remove pork from the marinade.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Place pork on the grill and cook each side for 2 minutes, or until cooked (depends on thickness of the cutlets). Remember that it will continue to cook while resting.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Remove pork from the grill onto a plate and cover loosely with foil. Rest for 5 minutes before serving.

title: Sausage and Egg Stuffed Potatoes
description: Breakfast favorites, assembled in a potato skin! This idea lends itself to many other possibilities such as adding bacon, mushroom, spinach, or finely chopped other greens with the sausage.

ingredients.name: - 8 oz / 200 - 250g sausages ((the best you can afford) meat removed from casings (Note 3))
grated cheese ((any melting cheese of choice, I used cheddar))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 180C/350F.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Cut the lid off the potatoes and scoop out the flesh. If the potatoes are cold, pop them in the oven to warm up while it is preheating. (Note 4)

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Heat 1/2 tbsp of olive oil in a fry pan over high heat. Add the sausage and cook until browned, using a wooden spoon to break the sausage up into little pieces (as small as you can).

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Optional step: Brush the outside of the potatoes with melted butter or olive oil - for extra flavour and crispiness.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Fill the potatoes with sausage, pressing down to compress as much as you can (this prevents egg sinking into the sausage).

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Crack the egg on top, sprinkle with cheese, then place in the oven to bake for 18 to 25 minutes, or until the egg whites are set and the yolks are still runny. Check it at 15 minutes then take a peek every 5 minutes - I find that it can go from uncooked to overcooked quickly. My oven was heated well and my potato was piping hot so it took 18 minutes.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Remove from the oven and serve immediately, sprinkled with parsley if using.

title: Italian Pizza Pasta Salad
description: Repurpose your leftover pizza toppings into this deliciously simple Italian style pizza pasta salad. Including a simple homemade Italian dressing!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Make the Italian dressing first so the flavors have a few minutes to blend. Add the olive oil, red wine vinegar, Dijon, garlic powder, Italian seasoning, salt, pepper, and Parmesan to a bowl or jar. Whisk the ingredients together, or place a lid on the jar and shake until combined. Set the dressing aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Cook the rotini according to the package directions (boil for 7-10 minutes, or until tender). Drain the pasta in a colander and rinse briefly with cool water. Let the pasta drain well, shaking the colander every few minutes to remove excess water from the pasta.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: While the pasta is cooking and draining, prepare the other pasta salad ingredients. Cut the pepperoni in half or into quarters, and chop the mozzarella into small cubes. Dice the bell pepper and red onion. Drain the banana pepper rings and black olives.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: When the pasta is cooked, cooled, and drained well, transfer it to a large bowl. Add the rest of the prepared ingredients (pepperoni, mozzarella, bell pepper, red onion, banana peppers, and black olives). Toss the ingredients to combine.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Give the dressing another shake or stir before drizzling it over the pasta salad. Toss the pasta salad once again to coat everything in the dressing. Serve immediately or refrigerate until ready to eat.

title: Hot Mushroom and Pepperoni Pizza Dip
description: If you love pizza, and you love dip, then you are going fall in love with this pizza dip! This makes ALOT of dip - it serves at least 8 to 12. I made it this big so it resembles a pizza in size.

ingredients.name: pizza sauce ((see notes for fast homemade pizza sauce recipe))
onion (, diced (brown, white, yellow or red))
tasty cheese (, grated (or any other melting cheese with flavour) (see notes))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 180C/350F.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Heat a non stick fry pan over high heat.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Add the diced pepperoni and fry for 1 minute until it starts to brown.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Then add the onions and sauté for 1 minute. Then add the mushrooms and cook for 30 seconds.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Remove onion mixture from the fry pan and place onto a plate with a paper towel (to drain the excess fat).

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Combine the Base ingredients in a bowl and mix until smooth and combined.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Spread the Base in a 20 cm / 8 inch base with a 24 cm / 9 inch rim pie dish.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Spread the pizza sauce over the Base, then sprinkle with the onion mixture.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Sprinkle over the tasty cheese, then the mozzarella cheese.

steps.title: Step 10
steps.description: Place sliced pepperoni over the cheese.

steps.title: Step 11
steps.description: Bake in the oven for 15 to 20 minutes, until golden brown and bubbling. Check it at 15 minutes.

steps.title: Step 12
steps.description: Serve immediately with Garlic Toast.

steps.title: Step 13
steps.description: Garlic Toast

title: Pulled Pork Enchiladas
description: Using leftover Pork Carnitas (Mexican Pulled Pork) or other shredded meat, it takes a mere 15 minutes to assemble this dish to pop into the oven, making this a sensational mid week meal!

ingredients.name: (packed) Pork Carnitas (Mexican Pulled Pork) or other shredded meat (see notes)
tinned black beans or red kidney beans (, drained)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 350F/180C.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a pan over high heat. Add the pork carnitas and cook until the bottom is nicely browned - about 1 1/2 minutes. Do not turn, just make the bottom crispy (to keep the pulled pork as moist as possible), then remove the pulled pork into a bowl. It does not matter if the top isn't heated through, it will heat in the oven.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Add the corn, black beans, 1/2 cup enchilada sauce and 1/2 cup cheese into the bowl and mix to combine.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Spread 1/2 cup of Enchilada Sauce on the bottom of the baking dish.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Place 1/2 packed cup of filling (from step 3) into a tortilla and roll up and place in the baking dish.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Pour over the remaining Enchilada Sauce, and bake for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Remove from oven and scatter the cheese on, then bake for a further 10 to 15 minutes until the cheese is bubbling and golden.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.

title: Spinach Artichoke White Cheese Pizza
description: My pizza dough recipe yields about 2 pounds of dough, which is enough for two 12-inch pizzas. Toppings listed below are enough for one 12-inch spinach & artichoke white cheese pizza.

ingredients.name: recipe homemade pizza dough (or 1 lb. store-bought pizza dough)
(20g) grated or shredded parmesan cheese, plus more for sprinkling on top
one 13 ounce can artichoke hearts, drained and quartered
optional: freshly ground black pepper, to taste

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Prepare pizza dough through step 3. If using store-bought frozen pizza dough, make sure it’s thawed.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Preheat oven to 475°F (246°C). Allow it to heat for at least 15–20 minutes as you shape the pizza in the next step. If using a pizza stone, place it in the oven to preheat as well. Lightly grease a large baking sheet or pizza pan with 1/2 Tablespoon of olive oil. Sprinkle lightly with cornmeal, which gives the crust extra crunch and flavor.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: When the homemade dough is ready, punch it down to release any air bubbles. Divide the dough in half and freeze half the dough for another time—see freezing instructions in the pizza dough recipe. On a lightly floured work surface using lightly floured hands or rolling pin, gently flatten the dough into a disc. Place on prepared pan and, using lightly floured hands, stretch and flatten the disc into a 12-inch circle, about 1/2-inch thick. If the dough keeps shrinking back as you try to stretch it, stop what you’re doing, cover it lightly and let it rest for 5–10 minutes, then try again. Once shaped into a 12-inch circle, lift the edge of the dough up to create a lip around the edges. I simply pinch the edges up to create the rim. If using a pizza stone, place the dough directly on a baker’s peel dusted with cornmeal. Cover dough lightly with plastic wrap or a clean kitchen towel and allow to rest for a few minutes as you gather the pizza toppings.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Using your fingers, push dents into the surface of the dough to prevent bubbling. Brush remaining olive oil all over the dough. Top the dough evenly with chopped roasted garlic, then add parmesan cheese, mozzarella cheese, artichokes, and spinach on top. Finish with an extra sprinkle of parmesan cheese on top, if desired.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Bake for 14–15 minutes or until the crust is golden brown. Remove from the oven, and sprinkle with freshly ground black pepper, if desired.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Slice hot pizza and serve immediately. Cover leftover pizza tightly and store in the refrigerator for up to 1 week. Freezing and reheating instructions below.

title: Vegetable Fritters with Garlic Herb Dipping Sauce
description: Use up your leftover frozen and fresh vegetables in this easy and flavorful vegetable fritters recipe, with a side of homemade garlic herb dipping sauce!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Make the garlic herb dipping sauce first, so the flavors have some time to blend. In a small bowl, stir together the sour cream, dried parsley, dried oregano, dried basil, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and pepper. Refrigerate the dip until ready to eat.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Allow the broccoli and corn to thaw, or use the defrost function on a microwave thaw to them. Finely chop the broccoli. Peel and grate the carrot using a large-holed cheese grater. Slice the green onions.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Add the broccoli, corn, carrots, and green onion to a large bowl. Also add the flour, eggs, garlic powder, and salt. Stir until everything is evenly combined.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Heat 1 Tbsp cooking oil in a large non-stick skillet (cast iron, ceramic, or teflon) over medium heat. Once the skillet is hot and the oil is shimmering, add the vegetable fritter batter to the skillet in ¼ cup dollops, pressing the mixture down to a flat pancake once it's in the skillet. Cook the fritters for about 3 minutes on each side, or until deep golden brown on both sides. Cook 3 or 4 fritters in the skillet at a time, adding another tablespoon of oil between batches. Transfer the cooked fritters to a paper towel lined plate.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Once all the fritters are cooked, serve while still warm, with the garlic herb sauce for dipping.

title: Mint Chocolate Swirl Bark
description: Easy chocolate bark swirled with mint flavored white chocolate.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Line a large baking sheet with parchment paper or a silicone baking mat. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Melt the white chocolate and green candy melts together. Use a double boiler or microwave. If using microwave, stir the chocolate every 20 seconds to help avoid seizing. Once melted and smooth, stir in oil and peppermint extract. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Melt the semi-sweet chocolate in the same manner you melted the chocolate in step 2. Pour onto prepared baking sheet and spread out into a large rectangle. Drizzle the white chocolate mixture on top in lines. See photo above for a visual. Use a toothpick or knife to swirl the layers together. Sprinkle the top of the bark with Andes mints, if using.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Allow the chocolate to set at room temperature in a cool, dry environment. My swirled barks usually take around 45 minutes. If needed, you can stick it in the refrigerator to help speed things up. Once hardened, break into pieces as large or as small as you want.

title: White Beans with Mushrooms and Marinara
description: White beans make a fiber-filled swap for gnocchi in this cheesy, indulgent skillet full of white beans, mushrooms, and marinara.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat the oven to 400ºF. Wash and slice the mushrooms. Add the mushrooms, olive oil, and a pinch of salt and pepper to a deep skillet. Sauté the mushrooms until they have wilted and all the moisture in the skillet has evaporated.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: While the mushrooms are sautéing, mince the garlic, drain and rinse the butter beans. Add the garlic to the skillet with the mushrooms and sauté for 2 minutes more.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Add the rinsed butter beans, marinara, basil, and red pepper to the skillet. Stir everything to combine, then allow it to heat through, stirring occasionally.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: While the skillet is heating through, shred the mozzarella. Top the skillet with the mozzarella, then cover the skillet with foil. Transfer the skillet to the oven* and bake for 5-7 minutes, or until the cheese is melted.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Once the cheese has melted, remove the foil, switch the oven to broil, and broil the skillet for a few minutes more to brown the cheese (watch closely, as browning can happen quickly with the broiler). Serve hot, with garlic bread for dipping!

title: Corn Fritters (with Zesty Greek Yogurt Sauce)
description: Enjoy hot and crispy corn fritters with a zesty, creamy, yet spicy Greek yogurt sauce. This recipe is really easy, and makes for a wonderful vegetarian meal or side dish. Feel free to adjust the seasonings and herbs to your liking.

ingredients.name: (120g) plain Greek or regular yogurt (or sour cream)
of a jalapeño, finely chopped (seeds and ribs removed)
freshly ground black pepper, to taste
cooked corn kernels (from about 4-5 cooked ears of corn – see Note)
(125g) all-purpose flour or whole wheat flour
of a jalapeño, finely chopped (seeds and ribs removed)
garlic cloves, minced (or 1/2 teaspoon garlic powder)
(30ml) olive oil (or avocado oil, vegetable oil, or coconut oil)
optional for garnish: flaky sea salt and chopped cilantro

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Whisk all of the yogurt sauce ingredients together. Taste, then add more salt and/or some pepper to taste. Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve, or up to 3 days.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Mix all of the fritter ingredients together in a large bowl. Set in the refrigerator, uncovered, as you heat the oil.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Once the skillet is hot, scoop up around 3 Tablespoons of the corn mixture. Place the mixture onto the hot skillet and gently flatten with a spatula. Repeat with a few more, making sure not to overcrowd the skillet. Cook until golden brown, about 3 minutes. Flip, then cook for 3 more minutes on the other side. Transfer to a paper towel-lined plate, then repeat with the remaining corn mixture.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Serve warm fritters with yogurt sauce and optional garnishes.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Cover and store leftovers in the refrigerator for up to 1 week. Reheat in the microwave, or use an air fryer at 375°F (191°C) for 3–4 minutes. You can also place them on a lined baking sheet and bake at 375°F (191°C) for 8–10 minutes.

title: Middle Eastern Roasted Vegetables with Tahini Sauce
description: A simple Middle Eastern dish that's perfect for using up left over veggies at the end of a week. You can use any vegetables you want, just make sure to cut them to size so they cook in roughly the same time.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 350F/180C.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Combine Roasted Vegetable ingredients, spread on baking tray and bake for 30 to 40 minutes.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Combine Tahini Sauce ingredients. Mix until smooth, and use water to adjust to the consistency of honey.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Pile roasted vegetables onto a plate. Sprinkle with za'atar, drizzle with Tahini Sauce, scatter over roasted pine nuts and coriander.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Serve with lebanese bread wedges or pita bread.

title: Red Velvet Cheesecake Swirl Brownies
description: Chewy, moist, decadent red velvet brownies swirled with cheesecake.

ingredients.name: and 1/2 teaspoons red gel food coloring*
(226g) full-fat brick cream cheese, softened to room temperature

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat the oven to 350°F (177°C). Spray an 8-inch square baking pan with nonstick spray. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: In a small bowl, beat the 2 eggs together. Set aside. Melt the butter in a large microwave safe bowl in 30 second increments until melted. Stir in 1 cup sugar, 2 teaspoons vanilla extract, cocoa powder, salt, food coloring, and vinegar. Mix each of those ingredients into the batter in that order. Whisk in the eggs, then fold in the flour until completely incorporated. Do not overmix. Pour the brownie batter into prepared baking pan, leaving about 3-4 Tablespoons for the top.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: With a handheld mixer on medium speed, beat the softened cream cheese, 1/4 cup sugar, egg yolk, and 1/2 teaspoon vanilla in a medium bowl until completely smooth—about 1 minute. Dollop spoonfuls of the cream cheese mixture on top of the prepared brownie batter. Cover with the last few Tablespoons of brownie batter. Glide a knife through the layers as best you can (both layers are pretty thick), creating a swirl pattern.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Bake the brownies for 28-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the middle comes out clean. Allow the brownies to cool completely before cutting into squares. Cover brownies and store at room temperature for 3 days or in the refrigerator for up to 6 days.

title: Spicy Sweet Potato Fries
description: These Spicy Sweet Potato Fries are an easy side dish with a sassy sweet and salty flavor combination, plus a spicy Creole seasoning kick!

ingredients.name: Creole seasoning or spicy seasoning salt* ($0.10)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat the oven to 400ºF. Line a large baking sheet with parchment paper.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Peel and slice the sweet potatoes into 1/4-1/2 inch wide fries. Place the cut fries on the prepared baking sheet and drizzle with cooking oil. Toss the fries until they are well coated in oil. Spread the sweet potatoes back out over the baking sheet so they're in a single layer.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Transfer the baking sheet to the fully preheated oven and bake for about 45 minutes, stirring every 20 minutes or so, or until the the sweet potatoes are browned and blistered.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: After the sweet potato fries have baked, season to your liking with Creole seasoning or spicy seasoning salt. Serve immediately.

title: Jalapeno Popper Dip
description: Jalapeno Poppers - in dip form! This dip is warm, creamy and cheesy with a lovely kick from the Jalapeños. It's not overly spicy because the jalapeño is balanced out by the creaminess.

ingredients.name: / 180g Philadelphia cream cheese (, at room temperature)
each onion powder and garlic powder ((or 1 tsp of one of these))
grated cheddar cheese ((or tasty, Monterey Jack or other flavoured cheese))
- 1 cup canned jalapeños (, drained and finely chopped)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 180C/350F.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Cut the top off the bread, use a small knife to cut a ring and pull out the bread to form a bowl (leaving a 1cm / 1/2" border/crust). Place bread on foil.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Mix together cream cheese, mayonnaise and sour cream. Add remaining Dip ingredients, mix combine. Pour into bread bowl.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Mix together butter and panko. Sprinkle over top of dip.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Wrap bread in foil. Bake for 30 minutes, then roll foil edges down and bake for a further 10 to 15 minutes until the panko is golden, the dip is bubbling and the bread is golden (insert knife into centre to ensure it is hot). (Note 1)

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Serve with corn chips and the bread pulled out of the bread bowl (cut into chunks. Toasting is optional)

title: Honey Mustard Baked Chicken with Potatoes & Bacon
description: This is one of those dishes that is easy enough for mid week but fancy enough for a dinner party. The flavour of the sauce is incredible. It's got the chicken juices mixed in as well as bacon. A fully loaded one pan meal!

ingredients.name: / 1kg potatoes (, peeled and cut into large chunks)
- 2 1/2 lb / 1 - 1.25 kg chicken thighs ((5 pieces), skin on and bone in (Note 1))
onion (, finely diced (brown, white or yellow))
dried thyme ((or 2 tsp fresh thyme leaves))
milk or cream ((I used milk. This is just for colour))
Fresh thyme leaves or finely chopped parsley

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Potatoes

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Chicken

title: Lentils with Creamy Mushroom Gravy
description: These Lentils with Creamy Mushroom Gravy are an easy, hearty, and comforting vegan weeknight dinner, perfect for cold winter nights.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Mince the garlic and slice the mushrooms. Add the olive oil and garlic to a large skillet and sauté for about one minute. Add the sliced mushrooms and continue to sauté until the mushrooms have released all their moisture and begin to brown.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Add the lentils, sage, thyme, freshly cracked pepper, and vegetable broth to the skillet with the mushrooms. Stir to combine. Place a lid on the skillet, let the broth come up to a boil, then turn the heat down to medium-low. Let the lentils simmer for 20 minutes (with lid), stirring occasionally.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: After simmering for 20 minutes, the lentils should be tender and most of the broth absorbed. Add the coconut milk, stir to combine, turn the heat back up to medium, and let the lentils simmer for about five more minutes (without lid), or until the mixture in the skillet has thickened to a gravy.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Once the mixture has thickened, turn the heat off. Taste the mixture and add salt to your liking. I added about 1/2 tsp. The salt will help the herbal flavors pop and reduce the sweetness of the coconut milk.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Serve hot with crusty bread for dipping or over mashed potatoes, rice, or pasta.

title: Nutella Stuffed Pancakes
description: Pancakes stuffed with Nutella! Best eaten warm but still fabulous at room temperature. Great treat for special occasions! Makes 6 to 7 pancakes.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Frozen Nutella Disc

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Pancakes

title: Mint Chocolate Chip Cheesecake Brownies
description: Enjoy the best of cheesecake and a batch of brownies combined—and with less work! These mint chocolate chip cheesecake brownies come together with 2 simple batters. Be sure to cool the brownies completely before slicing and serving.

ingredients.name: (226g) full-fat brick cream cheese, softened to room temperature
drops liquid or gel green food coloring

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Adjust the oven rack to the lower-third position and preheat the oven to 350°F (177°C). Line the bottom and sides of an 11×7-inch baking pan with parchment paper, leaving an overhang on the sides to easily lift the bars out of the pan. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
