title: Parmesan Shortbread Biscuits
description: These buttery biscuits have the texture of shortbread with the kick of parmesan cheese flavour. The biscuits are buttery and have a "soft crumble" when you bite into them. IMPORTANT: Please ensure you measure the ingredients by weight.

ingredients.name: rosemary leaves (, roughly chopped (or 2 1/2 tsp dried rosemary))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Two Ways To Make The Dough

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Make the biscuits

title: Cheeseburger Salad with Animal Sauce Dressing
description: When you're got to have your burger, but you're trying to do better, make a Cheeseburger Salad!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Prepare the animal sauce dressing by stirring together the mayonnaise, ketchup, relish, cider vinegar, sugar, olive oil, salt, sugar, and some freshly cracked pepper in a bowl. Set the dressing aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Rinse the Romaine lettuce well, let it drain, and then cut it into 2-inch pieces. Set the prepared lettuce aside.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Place the ground beef in a bowl, add the seasoning salt, and mix with your hands until the seasoning salt is evenly incorporated. Divide the meat into four portions, then divide each portion into four small ping-pong-sized balls. Flatten the balls into mini burger patties.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Add a little cooking oil to a non-stick skillet and heat over medium flame. Once hot, add some of the mini burgers and cook on each side until well browned (3-5 minutes each side). Transfer the cooked burgers to a paper towel lined plate and cook the next batch.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: While the burgers are cooking, thinly slice the red onion, cut the tomato into wedges, and shred the cheddar cheese.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Once all of the mini burgers are cooked, build the salads. Place 1/4 of the lettuce in each of four large bowls and sprinkle the sliced onion and shredded cheddar over top. Add tomato wedges to each bowl along with 3-4 of the mini burger patties. Drizzle the animal sauce dressing over top and enjoy!

title: Glazed Lemon Poppy Seed Donuts
description: Baked and so easy! These deliciously glazed lemon poppy seed donuts are full of flavor and ready in a snap.

ingredients.name: (28g) unsalted butter, melted and slightly cool

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 350°F (177°C). Spray donut pan with non-stick spray. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Whisk the flour, baking powder, baking soda, poppy seeds, and salt together in a medium bowl. Set aside. Whisk the melted butter, egg, sugar, milk, sour cream, vanilla, lemon juice, and zest until completely combined. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and mix until just combined. Do not overmix. The batter will be thick.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Spoon the batter into the donut cavities—I highly recommend using a large zipped-top bag for ease. Cut a corner off the bottom of the bag and pipe the batter into each donut cup, filling 2/3 to 3/4 of the way full.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Bake for 9-10 minutes or until the edges are lightly browned. Allow to cool for about two minutes then transfer to a wire rack set on a large piece of parchment paper. Bake the remaining donut batter (there is usually enough batter for 1-2 more donuts) and once baked, transfer to the wire rack. Allow donuts to cool down until you can handle them.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Whisk all of the glaze ingredients together. I usually use 2 Tablespoons of milk, but for a slightly thicker glaze you can use 1 Tablespoon. Dip each donut into the glaze and place back on the wire rack as the glaze sets. (The parchment paper can catch the glaze dripping down.)

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Donuts are best served immediately. Leftovers keep well covered tightly at room temperature or in the refrigerator for 2 days.

title: Pesto Pizza Rolls
description: These Pesto Pizza Rolls are a fun way to change up your pizza routine with swirls of cheese, pesto, and pepperoni, plus lots of crispy edges!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Combine the warm water, yeast, and sugar, and stir until the yeast is dissolved. Let the mixture sit for about five minutes or until the yeast has developed a layer of foam on top of the water.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Meanwhile, add 1 cup of the flour to a large bowl along with the salt.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Once the yeast has become foamy, add the olive oil to the yeast mixture, then pour the mixture into the bowl with the flour and salt. Stir until a thick batter forms. Begin to stir in more flour, a little at a time, until it forms a ball of dough that you can no longer stir with a spoon.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Turn the ball of dough out onto a clean surface dusted with flour. Knead the dough, adding a small amount of flour as you go, for about five minutes. You should have used around 2 cups flour total from the very beginning, give or take a little.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Place the kneaded dough back in the bowl, cover it loosely, and let it rise until double in volume. Once doubled, begin preheating the oven to 400ºF.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Punch the dough down, scrape it out of the bowl, and onto a floured surface. Stretch the dough out into roughly shaped rectangle, approximately 10x16 inches. Try to avoid using a rolling pin, if possible, as this will compress the dough and prevent it from being nice and fluffy.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Once shaped, spread the pesto over the surface of the dough from edge to edge. scatter the sliced pepperoni over the surface, then sprinkle half of the cheese on top.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Roll the dough up into a log, then use a very shape knife to slice it into 8 (or more) equal sized slices. Place the sliced rolls in a casserole dish that has been coated in non-stick spray (or oil if you prefer). Make sure to use a dish large enough to allow the rolls room to expand as they bake. Sprinkle the remaining cheese over top of the rolls in the dish, allowing some to fall around the edges and between the rolls.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Bake the Pesto Pizza Rolls in the preheated oven for about 30 minutes, or until they are puffed up, golden brown on top, and the pesto and cheese are bubbling around the edges. Serve warm with pizza sauce for dipping.

title: Ricotta and Spinach Puff Pastry Bites
description: A cute twist on the typical cheese and spinach triangles. These are great because you get more out of one sheet of puff pastry because the ration of filling to pastry is higher than usual!

ingredients.name: / 200g ricotta ((preferably full fat but low fat also works) (Note 1))
/ 250g frozen chopped spinach (, thawed and squeezed of excess water)
grated cheddar cheese ((or tasty or gruyere or any other melting cheese with flavour))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 180C/350F.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Spray 2 standard muffin / cupcake tins with oil.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Filling

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Pastry

title: Mango Coconut Chia Pudding
description: These Mango Coconut Chia Pudding cups are a fast and easy make-ahead breakfast with tons of fiber and protein.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: If the mango chunks are in large pieces, chop them into smaller, 1/4-inch pieces. Place half of the mango chunks , the coconut milk, and sugar in a blender and process until smooth.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Divide the remaining mango chunks between 4 small containers (10-12oz. containers). Add 1.5 Tbsp of chia seeds to each container. Finally, pour the mango coconut milk mixture into the containers, dividing it evenly between all four.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Stir the contents of each container to make sure all the chia seeds have adequate exposure to the liquid. Place lids on the containers and refrigerate over night, or up to 4-5 days.

title: Greek Yogurt Lemon Poppy Seed Pancakes
description: Start your mornings right with these whole wheat Greek yogurt lemon poppy seed pancakes. The flavor and texture is out of this world!

ingredients.name: (246g) whole wheat flour or white whole wheat flour (spooned & leveled)
poppy seeds (or chia seeds work too!)
(4 Tbsp; 56g) unsalted butter, melted & slightly cooled

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Microwave butter until melted. Set aside to slightly cool. You do not want it piping hot.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: In a large bowl, preferably with a pour spout, toss the flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and poppy seeds together until combined. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: In another large bowl, whisk the yogurt, milk, butter, eggs, lemon zest, lemon juice, and vanilla until combined. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and gently whisk to combine. Make sure there are no patches of dry flour at the bottom of the bowl. The batter is thick and a few lumps are fine.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Heat a griddle or large skillet over medium heat. Coat generously with butter or nonstick cooking spray. Once it’s hot, drop/pour a heaping 1/4 cup of batter on the griddle. Cook until the edges look set and you notice holes in the pancake’s surface around the border, about 2 minutes. Flip and cook the other side until cooked through, about 1–2 more minutes. Coat griddle/skillet with butter or nonstick spray again, if needed, for each batch of pancakes.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Keep pancakes warm in a preheated 200°F (93°C) oven until all pancakes are cooked. Serve pancakes immediately with toppings of choice.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Cover and store leftover pancakes in the refrigerator for up to 5 days.

title: Garlic Bread Mini Pizzas (Muffin Tin)
description: These mini pizzas are made using bread! Brushed with garlic butter so this really does taste like a cross between garlic bread and pizza. The filling options are endless - use your favourite pizza toppings.

ingredients.name: grated cheese (, melting (I used a mix of mozzarella and tasty, equal amounts))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 180C/350F.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Use a large empty can (800g/28oz canned tomato can) to cut out rounds from the bread. (Note 4)

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Mould into a muffin tin.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Place butter, garlic and salt in a microwave-proof bowl or mug and microwave in 30 second increments until the butter is melted.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Brush cups with butter, ensuring you use the garlic too.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Divide the pizza sauce between the cups, then top with onion and mushrooms.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Top with cheese then with pepperoni.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Bake for 10 to 15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bread is golden on the edges.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Serve warm!

title: Sweet Potato Grain Bowls with Green Tahini Sauce
description: These Sweet Potato Grain Bowls with Green Tahini Sauce are prefect for meal prep and bursting with color, texture, and flavor!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Add the uncooked bulgur to a sauce pot and place it over medium heat. Cook and stir the dry bulgur over medium heat for 2-3 minutes, or until it smells toasty or nutty, then remove it from the heat. Add two cups of water, stir to combine, place a lid on top, then bring it to a boil over high heat. Once it reaches a boil, turn the heat down to low and let it simmer for about 12 minutes with the lid in place. Turn the heat off and let the bulgur rest for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Remove the lid from the pot and fluff the bulgur with a fork. Allow the bulgur to cool (I like to place it in the refrigerator without a lid to cool quickly and dry slightly).

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: While the bulgur is simmering, preheat the oven to 400ºF. Peel and dice the sweet potatoes into 3/4-inch cubes. Place the cubed sweet potatoes on a large baking sheet and drizzle with olive oil. Add a pinch of salt and pepper, then toss the cubes until they are coated with oil. Roast the sweet potatoes in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, give them a stir, then roast for an additional 10 minutes or until they are soft and slightly browned on the edges.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: While the sweet potatoes are roasting, prepare the green tahini sauce. Place all the ingredients in a blender or food processor, and blend until the herbs are in very small pieces and the sauce becomes a light green color. Taste and adjust the salt if needed.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Slice the avocado and jalapeño. Rinse and drain the black beans.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: To assemble the bowls, place 3/4-1 cup cooked and cooled bulgur in each bowl. Divide the sweet potatoes, black beans, avocado, and jalapeño even among the bowls. Sprinkle about 1 Tbsp pepitas over each bowl, then drizzle the green tahini sauce over everything. Be generous with the green tahini sauce as it is responsible for much of the flavor in this dish. If meal prepping, keep the green tahini sauce separate until just before serving.

title: Death by Chocolate Cupcakes
description: Dark chocolate cupcakes topped with dark chocolate frosting. Chocolate lovers only!

ingredients.name: (85g) unsalted butter, softened to room temperature
optional: 1/3 cup (60g) semi-sweet chocolate chips for decoration

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat the oven to 350°F (177°C). Line a 12-count cupcake pan with cupcake liners. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Melt the butter and chocolate together in the microwave. Microwave in 30 second increments, stirring between each time. You may also melt the butter and chocolate over low heat on the stovetop. Stir until smooth and set aside to slightly cool.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: In a medium sized bowl, toss the cocoa powder, flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt together until thoroughly combined. Set aside. In a large bowl, whisk the eggs, sugar, brown sugar, and vanilla together until smooth. Add the cooled butter/chocolate and whisk until smooth. Add half of the flour mixture, then half of the buttermilk. Repeat until everything is added. Stir until *just* combined; do not overmix. The batter will be very thick like pudding.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Fill the cupcake liners 2/3 of the way full with batter. Bake for 18 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Allow to cool completely before frosting.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Sift together the confectioners’ sugar and cocoa powder to assure there are no lumps. Set aside. With a handheld or stand mixer fitted with a paddle attachment, beat the butter on medium speed until creamy—about 2 minutes. Gradually add the sifted sugar/cocoa powder alternately with the heavy cream and vanilla. Beat on low speed after each addition. Once all added, beat on high speed until creamy and combined for at least 2 minutes. Add a pinch of salt if frosting is too sweet.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Frost cooled cupcakes and top with chocolate chips as desired. Cupcakes stay fresh at room temperature in an airtight container for up to 4 days. Store covered in the refrigerator is desired for up to 1 week.

title: Caesar Salad Wonton Cups
description: Everything tastes better in miniature form!

ingredients.name: fresh parsley (, finely chopped (optional - for garnish))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 180C/350F. Fit the wonton wrappers into each hole of a standard size muffin / cupcake tin (not mini and not Texas muffin tins!). Spray the wontons lightly with olive oil. Bake for 8 to 12 minutes, until golden and crispy. Remove from oven and set aside to cool.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Heat a small non stick pan over high heat. Spray with oil, add bacon and sauté until crispy, then remove and drain on absorbent paper towel.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Return pan to stove, reduce heat to medium high and spray pan with oil. Add finely diced bread. Shake pan (or stir) to brown evenly. Remove mini croutons from pan, scatter over a pinch of salt and set aside.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Place Dressing ingredients in a blender or food processor and whizz until smooth. If it seems too thick, use a tiny splash of milk to adjust the consistency.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Place cos lettuce, chicken and bacon in a bowl with 6 to 8 tbsp of dressing (depending on how much dressing you want to use) and toss gently to combine.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Divide the salad between the wonton cups, top with croutons, a pinch of parmesan and a sprinkle of parsley.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Serve immediately.

title: Spinach White Bean Enchiladas
description: White beans make an inexpensive and fiber filled alternative to chicken in these creamy Spinach White Spinach White Bean Enchiladas.

ingredients.name: Handful fresh chopped cilantro for garnish (optional) ($0.13)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Toast the tortillas on each side in a dry skillet over medium-low heat until they are a slightly stiff and have browned just a bit on the edges. Stack them on a plate until ready to use. Toasting the tortillas increases the flavor and helps prevent them from cracking. Shred an 8oz. block of pepper jack cheese. Half will be used for the enchilada filling and half will be used for the sauce.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Defrost the frozen spinach in a microwave or take it out of the freezer before beginning to allow it time to defrost naturally. Squeeze as much moisture out of the thawed spinach as possible. Place the spinach in a large bowl. Rinse and drain the white beans, then add them to the bowl with the spinach. Also add 4oz. of the shredded cheese, garlic powder, cumin, salt, and a little freshly cracked pepper. Stir until the mixture is evenly combined.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Preheat the oven to 350ºF. Begin preparing the pepper jack sauce by adding the butter and minced garlic to a small sauce pot. Sauté the garlic in the butter for one minute over medium heat. Add the milk and cream cheese to the pot. Stir and heat until the cream cheese has fully melted into the milk and the mixture has thickened slightly. Season with salt. Begin adding the remaining shredded pepper jack, a handful at a time, and stirring it in until fully melted before adding more. Once all the cheese has been melted into the sauce, turn the heat off and allow it to cool slightly.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Coat the inside of a casserole dish with non-stick spray. Begin filling the toasted tortillas with the spinach and white bean mixture and rolling them closed. Line up the filled tortillas in the casserole dish, seam sides facing down. Choose a casserole dish that fits 12 of the rolled enchiladas snugly to help keep them from unrolling.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Once the tortillas are filled and in the casserole dish, pour the pepper jack sauce over top. Bake the enchiladas in the preheated oven for 35-40 minutes, or until the edges of the tortillas are brown and the pepper jack sauce is thick and browned on the edges. Sprinkle chopped cilantro over top, if desired.

title: Easy Homemade Pesto Recipe
description: This is how I make classic basil pesto at home. It's incredibly simple and flavorful and uses only a handful of fresh ingredients.

ingredients.name: (25g) freshly grated or shredded parmesan cheese
small cloves garlic (raw or roasted, see recipe Note below)
freshly ground black pepper, to taste

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Pulse the basil, pine nuts, cheese, and garlic together in a food processor or blender. Scrape down the sides, then add the oil, lemon juice, and salt. Pulse until everything is blended together and relatively smooth. Add a drizzle more olive oil to thin out, if desired. Taste and add pepper (and/or more salt) if desired. I always add a pinch of pepper.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Store pesto in a jar or sealable container, tightly seal, and refrigerate for up to 1 week.

title: Roasted Sweet Potato Rainbow Salad with Lime Crema
description: This Roasted Sweet Potato Rainbow Salad combines a medley of vibrant colors and flavors, brought together by a bright and creamy dressing.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: If you haven't yet, take the corn out of the freezer and allow it to begin thawing. Preheat the oven to 400ºF.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Peel the sweet potatoes, then cut them into a small dice (1/4-1/2 inch cubes). Place the cubes on a baking sheet, drizzle with cooking oil, cumin, and a pinch or two of salt. Toss the sweet potato cubes until they are all coated in oil and spices. Roast the sweet potatoes for about 30 minutes, or until they are soft and slightly browned on the edges. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: While the sweet potatoes are roasting, prepare the lime crema. Use a small-holed cheese grater or a zester to remove the thin layer of green zest from the lime. Add about 1 tsp of the zest and 1 Tbsp of the lime juice to the sour cream, along with the minced clove of garlic and 1/4 tsp of salt. Stir to combine. Taste and adjust the lime juice as desired. Refrigerate the crema until ready to use.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Heat a large skillet over medium to medium-high heat. Once hot, add 2 Tbsp cooking oil and swirl to coat the surface of the skillet. Add the thawed corn and let cook until the corn is blistered and charred on the edges. Avoid stirring too often to allow it to blacken a bit. Let the corn cool slightly.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Finely dice the red bell pepper and red onion. Rinse and drain the black beans. Pull the cilantro leaves from their stems and then roughly chop.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Combine the roasted sweet potatoes, blackened corn, black beans, red bell pepper, red onion, and cilantro in a large dish. Stir to combine. Add some of the lime crema and toss until the salad is lightly coated. Add a little more lime crema on top just before serving.

title: Orange Creamsicle Smoothie
description: This creamy, healthy 5 ingredient smoothie tastes like an orange julius and a creamsicle pop combined. Vitamin C has never tasted so good!

ingredients.name: frozen ripe banana, previously peeled & sliced

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Make sure you have a strong, powerful blender to break down the frozen banana and orange. I like this smaller Ninja or this regular Ninja blender.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: On high, blend the frozen banana chunks, vanilla, and orange juice together until thick, creamy, and smooth – about 3 minutes. Scrape down the sides of the blender as needed. Add the yogurt, orange, and orange zest (if using). Blend until combined.

title: Mini Pizza Potato Skins
description: These are great for entertaining as they are "one bite" appetisers that can be prepared ahead. I make these my "express" way by microwaving the potatoes, then crisping them in the oven.

ingredients.name: baby potatoes (, about the size of a golf ball (chat, new or salad potatoes))
grated melting cheese ((I used mozzarella. Tasty, cheddar, gruyere and swiss would also also well))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 220C/430F.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Prick each potato 2 to 3 times with a fork. Spread them out evenly around the edge of the microwave turntable (or in a circle for microwaves without a turntable). Microwave on high for 2 minutes. Turn potatoes over then microwave for a further 2 minutes, or until just cooked. Remove from microwave.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Cut each potato in half, then use a teaspoon to scoop the filling out, leaving a thin layer of potato.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Place the potatoes on a baking tray, skin side up.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Brush with olive oil (or spray) then sprinkle with a pinch of salt.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Bake skins for 10 minutes or until the skin is browned and a bit crispy.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Turn the grill (broiler) on.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Flip the potato skins over so the bowl side is facing up.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Fill each potato skin with about 1 1/2 tsp of pizza sauce, then top with grated cheese.

steps.title: Step 10
steps.description: Place 2 to 3 pepperoni's on each, then place under the grill (broiler) for 3 to 5 minutes until the cheese is melted and the pepperoni is just starting to brown.

steps.title: Step 11
steps.description: Sprinkle with parsley, if using, and serve immediately.

title: Sparkling Champagne Sangria
description: A crowd-pleasing bubbly, fruity white sangria that is perfect for any occasion!

ingredients.name: bottle sweet white wine (I use Riesling)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Place all fruit and orange juice in a large pitcher or bowl, add wine and allow to sit in the refrigerator for 3 – 24 hours. Right before serving, add champagne.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Taste; if you’d like it to be sweeter, add 1/4 cup granulated sugar, honey, or agave. Serve and enjoy!

title: Hummus Breakfast Bowls
description: Hummus Breakfast Bowls are a medley of colors, flavors, and textures, and a great way to work vegetables into the most important meal of the day.

ingredients.name: large egg, soft boiled or fried ($0.27)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Soft boil or fry one egg, leaving the yolk runny to provide extra "sauce" for the bowl.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: While the egg is cooking, add the pre-cooked rice and broccoli florets to a bowl. Microwave on high for one minute, or until the rice is hot and the florets are warmed through.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Add the hummus, cooked egg, and a pinch of salt and pepper to the bowl with the rice and broccoli. Drizzle with sriracha and sprinkle sesame seeds over top. Enjoy!

title: Spicy Little Muffin Tin Chicken Tostadas
description: A great little party appetiser that are really fast to prepare! The tostada cups will stay fresh in an airtight container for around 3 days. The chicken filling can be made 2 days ahead and stored in the refrigerator.

ingredients.name: sliced shallots/scallions ((or 1/4 cup finely diced red onion))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 180C/350F.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Cut out 10 rounds using a 7.5cm/3" round cutter OR 400g/14oz empty, clean can. You should be able to get 5 out of each tortilla.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Mould into standard size muffin tins. Spray with oil, then bake for 10 to 15 minutes until golden brown and crisp. Allow to cool in the muffin tin then set aside until required in an airtight container.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Place all the Filling ingredients except the chicken in a bowl and mix to combine. Then add the chicken and toss gently to coat.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: To serve, divide the chicken filling between the tostada cups. Sprinkle with coriander/cilantro leaves and avocado.

title: Creamy Black Bean Taquitos
description: Creamy Black Bean Taquitos are an easy, tasty, and inexpensive appetizer for football parties or just for fun!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Rinse and drain the black beans. Drain the diced green chiles. Slice the green onions. Add the cream cheese, black beans, green chiles, green onion, hot sauce, garlic powder, and salt to a bowl. Stir together until evenly combined, then taste and adjust the salt or hot sauce to your liking.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Stack 5 tortillas on a plate, cover with a damp paper towel, and microwave for about 20 seconds to soften (this helps prevent them from cracking when rolled). Heat a large non-stick or cast iron skillet over medium heat. Working quickly as the skillet heats, place about 2 Tbsp of the black bean filling in each tortilla then roll tightly closed.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Once all five are filled, add about 1 Tbsp cooking oil to the skillet, give it a few seconds to heat (it should shimmer), then add the filled taquitos seam side down. Cook the taquitos on each side until brown and crispy, then transfer to a clean plate.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Repeat the process in small batches of five, adding a little more oil to the skillet each time, until all the filling has been used (about 15 taquitos). Serve while still hot.

title: Chocolate Peanut Butter Protein Smoothie
description: There's a whopping 28 grams of protein in this chocolate peanut butter cup smoothie-- no protein powders either!

ingredients.name: large banana, peeled, sliced, and frozen
Chobani 0% Greek yogurt (or 2%, flavored or unflavored)
skim milk (or your favorite kind of nondairy or dairy milk)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Make sure you have a strong, powerful blender that will blend up the frozen banana. I like this Ninja or this Vitamix.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Put all of the ingredients into the blender, in the order listed, and blend on high until thick and smooth. I would start with only 2 Tablespoons of cocoa powder, blend, and then add 1 more for a stronger chocolate taste. You may need to stop and stir/scrape down the sides of the blender a few times.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Drizzle glass with 1 teaspoon of chocolate syrup (optional) and enjoy!

title: Mexican Spring Rolls (Egg Rolls)
description: These Mexican spring rolls are so scrumptious you should make a double batch! Made healthier by baking, and stuffed full of the flavours of Mexico.

ingredients.name: spring roll wrappers or 16 egg roll wrappers (, defrosted (Note 2))
grated cheese ((cheddar, tasty or any other good melting cheese))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat the oven to 350F/180C.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Combine the filling ingredients and mix well.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Place a wrapper diagonally in front of you. Place 1/4 cup of the filling on the bottom half of the wrapper and shape into a log. If you are using egg roll wrappers, use 3 tablespoons per wrapper.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Roll up the wrapper to halfway, then fold in the left and right sides, then roll to the end, using a little water to seal.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Spray the spring rolls lightly, then turn each spring roll and lightly spray the other side.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Bake for 30 minutes, turning once, until golden.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Serve with Enchilada Sauce as the dipping sauce.

title: Baked Chicken with Artichokes and Tomatoes
description: Baked Chicken with Artichokes and Tomatoes is an easy last minute dinner you can make with pantry staples.

ingredients.name: boneless, skinless chicken breast halves (about 1 lb. total) ($4.04)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Drain the diced tomatoes. In a medium bowl, combine the drained tomatoes with the olive oil, lemon juice, minced garlic, oregano, salt, and some freshly cracked pepper. Stir well, then set the tomato mixture aside. Preheat the oven to 400ºF.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Place the chicken breasts on a cutting board and cover them with a sheet of plastic wrap. Use a mallet or rolling pin to carefully pound the chicken breasts to an even thickness. Don't pound with too much force or the breasts may split. Start at the thickest part of the breast and work your way out toward the edges. Once pounded, slice each chicken breast into two portions and season each side with a pinch of salt and pepper.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Drain the can of artichoke hearts and roughly chop them into smaller, bite-sized pieces. Place a handful of the artichoke pieces in the bottom of a casserole dish, then lay the chicken pieces over top. Cover the chicken with the remaining artichoke pieces. Pour the tomato mixture over top.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Bake the chicken, uncovered, in the fully preheated oven for 30 minutes. After 30 minutes, sprinkle one cup of mozzarella over top. Switch oven's setting from bake to broil and broil the dish (on the middle rack) for about 5 minutes or until the cheese is bubbly and browned. Serve immediately.

title: Satay Chicken Noodle Salad
description: Chicken satay tossed in a noodle salad loaded with plenty of veggies with a creamy peanut satay dressing! Serve this warm or at room temperature.

ingredients.name: sriracha (, or 2 tsp chili paste/sauce + 2 tsp vinegar)
scallion/shallot stems (, finely sliced on the diagonal)
large red chilli ((not very spicy), deseeded and finely sliced (Note 2))
/ 350g chicken breast (, cut in half vertically and thinly sliced)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Mix dressing ingredients in a bowl until smooth.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Prepare noodles according to packet instructions.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Place both cabbages and carrots in a bowl, add 1/4 tsp salt, toss to combine and set aside for 5-10 minutes to wilt lightly.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Place the Satay Chicken ingredients EXCEPT the oil in a bowl and toss to coat.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Heat oil in a non stick fry pan over high heat. Add the chicken and cook for 3 minutes until golden, then transfer to a plate.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Toss noodles and remaining salad ingredients with chicken and Dressing, then serve. Serve at room temperature or warm.

title: Chocolate Lava Cakes
description: Chocolate lava cakes with their deliciously rich molten chocolate center come together with 6 simple ingredients. Ready in just 25 minutes, this surprisingly easy and quick dessert always impresses.

ingredients.name: optional for topping: ice cream, berries, and/or chocolate syrup

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Spray four 6-ounce ramekins with nonstick cooking spray and dust with cocoa powder. This ensures the cakes will seamlessly come out of the ramekins when inverted onto a plate in step 7. Or spray half of a 12-count muffin pan and dust with cocoa powder. If baking in a muffin pan, the recipe will yield 6 cakes.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Preheat oven to 425°F (218°C).

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Coarsely chop the chocolate. Place butter in a medium heat-proof bowl, then add chopped chocolate on top. Microwave on high in 10-second increments, stirring after each until completely smooth. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Whisk the flour, confectioners’ sugar, and salt together in a small bowl. Whisk the eggs and egg yolks together until combined in another small bowl. Pour the flour mixture and eggs into the bowl of chocolate. Slowly stir everything together using a silicone spatula or wooden spoon. If there are any lumps, gently use your whisk to rid them. The batter will be slightly thick.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Spoon chocolate batter evenly into each prepared ramekin or muffin cup.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Place ramekins onto a baking sheet and bake for 12–14 minutes until the sides appear solid and firm; the tops will still look soft. *If baking in a muffin pan, the cakes only take about 8–10 minutes.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Allow to cool for 1 minute, then cover each with an inverted plate and turn over. Use an oven mitt because those ramekins are hot! The cakes should release easily from the ramekin. *If you used a muffin pan, use a spoon to release the cakes from the pan and place each upside down on plates.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Add toppings. Serve immediately.

title: Easy Chocolate Cinnamon Buns
description: A 5 ingredient dough makes these chocolate cinnamon buns fast, easy, soft, and fluffy. The perfect treat for lazy weekend mornings!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: In a large bowl stir together the flour, salt, sugar, and baking powder until evenly combined. Pour in the heavy whipping cream and stir until a dough forms.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Dust a clean work surface with flour and turn the dough out onto the surface. Work the dough slightly, if needed, to make it cohesive, smooth, and evenly mixed. Avoid kneading the dough. Form the dough into a small rectangle with your hands, then use a rolling pin to flatten and enlarge the dough into a 9x16" rectangle. Make sure the work surface is well floured as you roll to prevent the dough from sticking.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Begin to preheat the oven to 400ºF. To make the chocolate cinnamon filling, place the butter in a bowl and microwave for 30 seconds. Stir and then heat more, in 15 second intervals, until completely melted. Stir in the brown sugar and cinnamon. Spread the cinnamon sugar mixture over the surface of the rolled dough, from edge to edge. Sprinkle the chocolate chips on top of the cinnamon sugar mixture.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Roll the dough up, working from one long side to the other, so you have a 16" long roll. Use a very sharp knife, thread, or floss to cut the roll into 12 equal sized pieces. Coat the inside of a casserole dish or pie plate with non-stick spray (or butter), then arrange the cut chocolate cinnamon buns in the dish. The pieces should be close and touching slightly, but not squeezed together.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Bake the buns for 20-25 minutes, or until they are golden brown on top (the total cooking time will depend on the dish and how many buns you're cooking at once). Allow the buns to cool.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: While cooling, prepare the chocolate glaze. Place the powdered sugar in a bowl and add the cocoa powder, vanilla extract, and milk. Stir the ingredients until they form a thick, chocolatey glaze. Once the buns are mostly cooled, drizzle the glaze over top and enjoy.

title: No Bake Cheesecake Jars
description: This jar dessert recipe combines a 2 ingredient graham cracker crust with an easy no-bake cheesecake filling. For best results, read through the recipe and watch the video tutorial above before beginning.

ingredients.name: (240ml) heavy cream or heavy whipping cream, cold
(226g) full-fat brick cream cheese, softened to room temperature

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Have your jars ready to go and lined up. This recipe yields about 6 8-ounce jars or 10 6-ounce jars.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Melt the butter in the microwave in a medium heat-proof bowl or use the stove. Stir in the graham cracker crumbs. The mixture will resemble wet sand. Spoon a generous spoonful into each jar, about 2 Tablespoons into the 8-ounce jars and 1 and 1/2 Tablespoons into the 6-ounce jars. If there’s any crust leftover, sprinkle into the jars to use up or discard. Set jars aside.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Using a hand mixer or a stand mixer fitted with a whisk attachment, whip the cold heavy cream into stiff peaks on medium-high speed, about 3-4 minutes. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Using a hand mixer or a stand mixer fitted with a whisk or paddle attachment, beat the cream cheese, sugar, sour cream, lemon juice, and vanilla extract together on medium-high speed until smooth and creamy. Make sure there are no large lumps of cream cheese. If there are lumps, keep beating until smooth.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Using your mixer on low speed or a silicone spatula, fold the whipped cream into the cheesecake filling until combined. This takes several turns of your silicone spatula. Combine slowly as you don’t want to deflate all the air in the whipped cream.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Layer a couple large spoonfuls of filling on top of the crust in the jars. Use about 1/4 – 1/3 cup filling in the 8 ounce jars and 3 Tablespoons (or however much you can pack in!) into the 6 ounce jars. Make sure to leave room for the topping.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: The cheesecake jars are at room temperature at this point, but if you’d like to serve chilled, chill for at least 30 minutes and up to 3 days before adding the topping. (Cover if chilling for longer than 30 minutes.) I recommend adding the topping when serving or up to 2 hours in advance. The topping can seep down into the layers, so that’s why I recommend adding it soon before serving.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Spoon topping and garnishes on top of filling, then serve.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Cover and store leftover cheesecake jars in the refrigerator for up to 5 days.

title: Spicy Seafood Pasta with Tomato Butter Sauce
description: Spicy Seafood Pasta with Tomato Butter Sauce is a simple go-to weeknight dinner that can be made with pantry staples.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Add 2 Tbsp butter to a large skillet and place over medium heat. Once the butter is melted and sizzling add the frozen seafood mix. Stir and cook until the shrimp have turned pink and opaque (3-5 minutes). Be careful not to overcook the seafood. It should still be soft and supple. Remove the seafood from the skillet to a clean bowl and set it aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Mince the garlic and add it to the skillet with two additional tablespoons butter. Sauté the garlic in the butter and the juices from the seafood for 1-2 minutes, or just until it has softened and becomes very fragrant.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Add the can of whole peeled tomatoes with their juices and 1/4 tsp red pepper flakes (optional). Use a spatula or spoon to break the tomatoes into pieces. Let the skillet come up to a simmer over medium heat, then turn the heat down to meidum-low. Continue to simmer the skillet, stirring occasionally, for 30 minutes. Continue to break the tomatoes into smaller bits every time you stir.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: After simmering the sauce for about 15 minutes, bring a large pot of water to a boil for the pasta. Cook the pasta in the boiling water for 7-10 minutes, or until al dente. Drain the pasta in a colander.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Once the sauce is finished simmering, add 1/2 tsp of salt. Stir to combine, taste, and adjust the salt more if needed.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Add the cooked seafood back to the skillet along with any juices that may have accumulated in the bowl. Also add the cooked and drained pasta. Toss the pasta and seafood in the sauce until everything is evenly coated. Top the pasta with a handful of chopped fresh parsley, if desired.

title: Nachos Pie
description: Nachos - in lasagne form! This is how to get your midweek Nachos fix with far less guilt! You can substitute the spices for a packet Nachos mix if you prefer. The Pico De Gallo adds freshness but is not essential!

ingredients.name: / 28 g packet Taco Seasoning OR make your own - see Note 1
/ 24oz tomato passata or pureed canned tomatoes ((Note 2))
/ 400 g canned red kidney beans ((or any other beans), drained)
- 4 soft tortillas ((flour or corn) - for layering)
grated cheese ((I used mozzarella, but any melting cheese is fine))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat the over to 350F/180C.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Filling

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Assemble & Bake

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Pico de Gallo

title: Homemade Strawberry Sauce (Topping)
description: You can use fresh or frozen strawberries in this versatile strawberry topping sauce. This topping is fresh, quick, & easy and gives desserts that little something extra!

ingredients.name: strawberries, hulled and sliced in half (you can use frozen; don’t thaw)
zest and juice from 1/2 small lemon (see note)*

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Whisk the cornstarch and water together until all the cornstarch has dissolved. (I just use a fork to mix—very easy.)

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Place the cornstarch mixture, along with the rest of the ingredients, into a small saucepan over medium heat. Using a wooden spoon or rubber spatula, stir the mixture as it cooks. Break up some of the strawberries as you stir.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Bring it to a simmer and allow to simmer for 5 minutes, stirring constantly. After 5 minutes, remove pan from the heat and allow to cool. The mixture will thicken as it cools.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: You can serve the sauce warm before it cools completely if desired, or store in the refrigerator for up to 1 week. Strawberry topping will be thick after refrigeration, so microwave for 15 seconds or warm on the stove to thin out, if desired.

title: Mexican Grilled Chicken Tacos
description: Wonderfully authentic Mexican flavours, a homestyle version of Sinaloa chicken, a popular Mexican street food. Adapted from Bobby Flay's "Mexican Red Chicken" recipe from his cookbook "Bobby Flay's Barbecue Addiction". (Note 1)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Place Marinade ingredients in a ziplock bag. Add chicken, massage to coat then refrigerate to marinate for at least 3 hours, preferably overnight.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Remove chicken from Marinade, discard Marinade.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Heat oil in a skillet over medium high heat (or even better, do this on the BBQ on medium high). Cook chicken for 4 minutes on each side, until dark golden brown.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Remove chicken onto plate, cover loosely with foil and rest for 3 minutes.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Cut into strips and use for tacos. (See Note 5 for more serving options)

title: Harissa Roasted Vegetables
description: Harissa Roasted Vegetables are a spicy, slightly sweet, and smoky vegetable medley that makes a great side for meat or fish.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat the oven to 400ºF. Prepare a large baking sheet by lightly spritzing with non-stick spray or covering with foil.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: In a small dish, stir together the harissa, olive oil, honey, salt, and lemon juice. Set the marinade aside.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Wash the potatoes well and cut into one-inch cubes. Wash and peel the carrots, then slice into one-inch sections. Cut the broccoli into florets, and chop the onion into large sections. Place the potatoes, carrots, broccoli, and onion on the prepared baking sheet.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Pour the harissa marinade over the vegetables and use your hands to toss the vegetables until they are evenly coated in the marinade.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Roast the vegetables in the preheated oven for 30 minutes, stir, and then continue roasting for another 10 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender and the edges have achieved a nice deep brown color. Top with chopped cilantro just before serving.

title: Breakfast Enchiladas
description: Fully loaded breakfast enchiladas! Tortillas wrapped around scrambled eggs, bacon and beans cooked with a fragrant tomato sauce and gooey melted cheese. Serve with plenty of toppings for optimal experience!

ingredients.name: small onion ((red, brown, white, yellow), diced)
/ 14 oz canned black beans or red kidney beans (, drained)
large eggs ((or 6 normal eggs), lightly whisked)
soft tortillas ((standard size around 20cm/8" in diameter))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 180C/350F.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over high heat. Add garlic and onion and saute until the onion is translucent.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Add the capsicum and cook for another 1 minute.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Add remaining Filling ingredients. Stir then turn the heat down to medium and let it cook for 5 minutes or so until thickened. Transfer to a bowl and let it cool slightly.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Wipe the pan clean and return to high heat. Add bacon and cook until light golden brown. Drain fat if there is excess. Turn heat down to medium Add the eggs and gently stir and fold them into the bacon mixture until the eggs almost set but are still watery.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Remove pan from heat. The eggs will continue cooking in the residual heat.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Lay the tortillas on a work surface. Divide the Filling mixture between them, then top with Bacon and Egg mixture. Sprinkle with cheese then roll the Enchiladas up.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Place in a baking dish (or tray) and bake for 10 to 15 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and you can see that the cheese has melted.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Serve with desired garnished. I highly recommend sour cream and avocado.

title: White Chicken Enchiladas
description: This white sauce version of Enchiladas gives the classic a serious run for its money!

ingredients.name: finely chopped jalapeños OR canned green chilies ((Note 2))
shredded cooked chicken ((I used poached chicken breast))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: White Sauce

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Enchiladas

title: White Chocolate Strawberry Cupcakes
description: Strawberry cupcakes made with real strawberries and zero artificial flavor topped with white chocolate strawberry buttercream!

ingredients.name: (8 Tbsp; 113g) unsalted butter, softened to room temperature
large egg whites, at room temperature
(60g) sour cream or plain yogurt, at room temperature
(16 Tbsp; 226g) unsalted butter, softened to room temperature
(170g) white chocolate, melted and slightly cooled (see note)*
(60ml) heavy cream, half-and-half, or milk, at room temperature
optional: fresh strawberries coated with 2 ounces melted white chocolate

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: and allow it to cool completely. See Note for instruction.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Preheat the oven to 350°F (177°C). Line a 12-cup muffin pan with cupcake liners. Line a second pan with 2 or 3 liners—this recipe makes 14–15 cupcakes. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Whisk the cake flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt together. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Using a handheld or stand mixer fitted with a whisk attachment, beat the butter and sugar together on high speed until smooth and creamed, about 2 minutes. Scrape down the sides and up the bottom of the bowl with a rubber spatula as needed. Beat in the egg whites on high speed until combined, about 2 minutes. Beat in the sour cream and vanilla extract. Scrape down the sides and up the bottom of the bowl as needed. With the mixer on low speed, add the dry ingredients until just incorporated. With the mixer still running on low, slowly pour and mix in the milk *just* until combined. Do not overmix. Whisk in 1/4 cup of reduced strawberry puree, making sure there are no lumps at the bottom of the bowl. Batter will be slightly thick.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Pour/spoon the batter into the liners. Fill only 2/3 full to avoid spilling over the sides when baking. Bake for 20–22 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. For about 35 mini cupcakes, bake for about 11–13 minutes, same oven temperature.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Allow the cupcakes to cool completely before frosting.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: When the cupcakes are nearly cool, melt the white chocolate for the frosting: Place chopped white chocolate in a microwave-safe bowl (I usually use a glass liquid measuring cup), and microwave in 20-second increments, stirring after every 20 seconds until completely smooth. Set it aside to cool at room temperature for 20 minutes. (Be sure the melted white chocolate has cooled for 20 minutes, so it’s still melted but not scorching hot, which would melt the butter.)

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Using a blender or food processor, process the freeze-dried strawberries into a powdery crumb. You should have around 1/2 cup. Set aside. In a medium bowl using a handheld or stand mixer fitted with a paddle attachment, beat the butter on medium speed for 1 minute. Switch the mixer to low speed and slowly add the confectioners’ sugar and strawberry powder. Stir the cooled white chocolate so that it is smooth, and then add it to the butter/sugar mixture. Switch the mixer to medium speed and beat for 2 minutes until combined and creamy. Add the cream, vanilla extract, and salt. Beat for 1 minute until combined. Taste. Add 1 more Tablespoon of heavy cream/milk if needed to thin out, if desired. Add another pinch of salt if frosting is too sweet.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Frost cooled cupcakes and serve. I used Wilton 8B piping tip and nestled a white chocolate-covered strawberry in the center.

steps.title: Step 10
steps.description: Cover and store leftovers in the refrigerator for up to 5 days.

title: Anne Byrn's 1917 Applesauce Cake
description: The 1917 Applesauce Cake from Anne Byrn's new book American Cake is light, sweet, and full of warm spices. No Eggs, one easy swap to make dairy-free!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Allow the butter to come to room temperature. Preheat the oven to 350ºF. Coat the inside of an 8x8-inch baking dish with butter.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: In a large bowl, cream together 2 Tbsp of butter and the sugar using a hand mixer or mixing by hand with a wooden spoon. Add the applesauce and stir to combine.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: In a separate bowl, stir together the flour, baking soda, cinnamon, cloves, salt, and nutmeg until well combined.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Pour the flour mixture into the applesauce mixture and stir just until combined.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: In a separate small bowl, toss the raisins with about 1 Tbsp flour until they are lightly coated. Fold the flour coated raisins into the cake batter. Spread the cake batter into the prepared baking dish.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Bake the cake for 30-35 minutes, or until the the center springs back when pressed. Let the cake cool for 15 minutes before slicing into 9 pieces.

title: Angel Food Cupcakes
description: This recipe for light-as-air angel food cupcakes is a wonderful choice if you’re looking for a delightful summer dessert.

ingredients.name: large egg whites, at room temperature

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Adjust the oven rack to the lower position and preheat oven to 325°F (163°C). Line a 12-count muffin pan with cupcake liners. Line a second pan with 2-4 liners – this recipe makes about 14-16 cupcakes. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: In a food processor or blender (I use this one), pulse the sugar until fine and powdery. Remove 1/2 cup and set aside to use in step 3; keep the rest inside the food processor. Add the cake flour and salt to the food processor. Pulse 5-10 times until sugar/flour/salt mixture is aerated and light.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: In a large bowl using a hand mixer or a stand mixer fitted with a whisk attachment, whip egg whites, water, and cream of tartar together on medium low until foamy, about 1 minute. Switch to medium-high and slowly add the 1/2 cup of sugar. Whip until soft peaks form, about 5-6 minutes. See photo above for visual. Add the vanilla extract and beat just until incorporated.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: In several additions, slowly sift the flour mixture into the egg white mixture using a fine-mesh strainer, gently folding after each addition. To avoid the cupcakes from deflating or tasting dense, don’t add the flour mixture all at once. Sift and very slowly fold in several additions. This is important! Spoon batter into liners, filling only 2/3 full to avoid spilling over the sides.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Bake the cupcakes until very lightly browned around the edges and a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean, about 18-20 minutes. For around 3 dozen mini cupcakes, bake for about 10-12 minutes, same oven temperature.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Allow the cupcakes to cool for 10 minutes in the pan, then remove and place on a wire rack to cool completely before frosting.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Spread or pipe homemade whipped cream onto cupcakes. I used a small icing spatula for some, but a Wilton 8B tip looks wonderful (see picture above!). Garnish with fresh berries.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Store leftovers in the refrigerator for up to 5 days.

title: Tomato Herb Rice with White Beans and Spinach
description: Tomato Herb Rice with White Beans and Spinach is a hearty and flavorful vegan dinner that will be loved by meat eaters and vegetarians alike.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Place the spinach in a bowl and allow it to thaw slightly as you prepare the beginning of the recipe.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Dice the onion and mince the garlic. Set the onion aside. Add the olive oil, minced garlic, oregano, basil, thyme, rosemary, a pinch of crushed red pepper, and a little freshly cracked black pepper (about 10 cranks of a pepper mill) to a heavy bottomed pot or deep skillet. Sauté the garlic and spices over medium-low heat for about one minute.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Add the tomato paste and brown sugar to the pot and continue to sauté for 2-3 minutes, or until the tomato paste takes on a deep burgundy color. Add the onion and salt and continue to sauté for a few minutes more, or until the onions become soft and transparent.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Meanwhile, drain and rinse the cannellini beans in a colander. Add the diced tomatoes (with juices), cannellini beans, spinach, and uncooked rice to the pot. Pour in the vegetable broth and stir briefly to combine the ingredients.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Place a lid on the pot and turn the heat up to medium-high. Allow the contents to come up to a boil. Once it reaches a boil, turn the heat down to the lowest setting that allows the liquid to maintain a simmer. Let the pot simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until most of the liquid is absorbed (there may still be some around the edges. Turn the heat off and let the pot rest, undisturbed, for 10 additional minutes.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Finally, fluff the contents of the pot with a fork, making sure to not stir vigorously. Serve immediately.

title: Pavlova
description: Pavlova is crisp on the edges, chewy on top, and marshmallow soft and creamy in the centers. Pile high with lemon curd, whipped cream, and fresh fruit to make a delicious, naturally gluten-free dessert!

ingredients.name: large egg whites (use the yolks for lemon curd!)*
Homemade whipped cream, fresh fruit, strawberry topping, lemon curd, or any desired topping (see post for suggestions)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat the oven to 350°F (177°C). Line a large baking sheet with parchment paper or a silicone baking mat. (Preliminary note: you will quickly reduce the oven to 200°F (93°C) in step 4.)

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: With a handheld mixer or a stand mixer fitted with a whisk attachment, beat the egg whites on medium-high speed until soft peaks form, about 5 minutes. Add the sugar in 2 additions, beating for 30 seconds between. Once all of the sugar has been added, turn the mixer up to high speed and continue beating until glossy stiff peaks form, about 2 minutes. The peaks should be stiff enough that you can hold the whisk upright and the peaks won’t move. Add the vanilla extract and beat for 1 more minute. The peaks should still be very stiff. If not, keep on mixing on high speed. Using a rubber spatula, fold in the cream of tartar and cornstarch.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Spread the pavlova mixture into an 8-9-inch circle (see note for mini size). You can make decorative peaks with the back of a large spoon if desired. Make sure the edges are relatively tall and there is a nice dip in the center.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Place pavlova in the oven. As soon as you close the oven door, reduce heat to 200°F (93°C). The pavlova will stay in the oven as it cools down to 200°F (93°C). Bake until the pavlova is firm and dry, about 90 minutes total. Rotate the baking sheet if you notice some spots browning. Try to limit how many times you open the oven as the cool air will interrupt the baking.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Turn the oven off and let the pavlova cool inside the oven. Once the pavlova is cool, you can store it covered at room temperature for up to 2 days. Or serve right away.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Once cool, top the pavlova with whipped cream and assorted toppings. Slice and serve.

title: Shredded Beef Burritos
description: Crispy burritos filled with juicy Mexican Shredded Beef with a rich sauce, Mexican red rice and cheese. These are MADE for freezing - perfect standby meal! This recipe is for 8 burritos.

ingredients.name: to 2 cups shredded cheese ((I used Monterey Jack))
to 4 cups Mexican Shredded Beef plus sauce (, tossed or separated (Note 1))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Microwave half the tortillas very briefly to warm them up (15 seconds or so). This ensures they don't crack when you roll them.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Place 1 tortilla on a workbench - cover the rest with a tea towel to keep them warm.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Place cheese down the middle of the tortilla, then top with 1/3 cup of beef, some corn, beans, then 1/4 cup rice.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Roll the burrito up. (Note 2) Wrap in foil to hold it together.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: If you are serving it immediately, heat a skillet over medium heat. Cook the burritos for around 4 to 5 minutes on each side to make the tortilla brown and heat the inside through.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: If freezing, place in the freezer. To reheat, you can either bake from frozen (with foil on) at 350F/180C for about 40 to 45 minutes, or thaw and cook in the skillet per above. You could microwave it (remove the foil) but I like my burritos a bit crispy!

title: Garlic Butter Cauliflower Pasta with Pangritata
description: A handful of humble ingredients transforms into an incredible easy midweek meal. The key step is emulsifying the pasta (step 7) which is when the oils in the pan react with the starch in the pasta to form a sticky, luscious sauce that…

ingredients.name: to 2 slices bread (, crusts removed, preferably stale (enough to make 1/2 cup))
large head of cauliflower (, broken/cut into florets about 2"/5cm long (about 4 to 5 cups) (Note 2))
lemon (: 2 tbsp lemon juice + zest of 1/2 the lemon)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Pangrattato

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Cauliflower Pasta

title: Cheddar Grits Breakfast Bowls
description: Cheddar Grits Breakfast Bowls are an easy but indulgent breakfast or brunch treat that you can whip up in no time.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Add the water and salt to a medium sauce pot. Place a lid on top, turn the heat on to high, and bring the water up to a rolling boil. Once boiling, stir in the grits. Turn the heat down to low, replace the lid, and let simmer for 5-7 minutes, or until thickened.*

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Add the butter and milk to the grits and stir until the butter has melted and the grits are smooth. Stir in the grated cheddar, one handful at a time, until fully melted in and smooth. Leave the lid on the pot with the burner turned off to keep the grits warm.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Cook four eggs using your favorite method (fried, scrambled, soft boiled, etc.). Slice the green onions.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: To build the bowls, place one cup of the cheddar grits in a bowl, top with one egg, 1/4 cup salsa, some freshly cracked pepper, and a sprinkle of sliced green onions.

title: Beef Burrito Casserole
description: This Beef Burrito Casserole is totally customizable and can include all your favorite burrito or nacho toppings. Leftovers reheat great for lunch!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat the oven to 350ºF. Add the cooking oil, beef, garlic, and a pinch of salt to a skillet. Cook the beef over medium heat until fully browned. Drain the excess fat, if necessary.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Rinse and drain the canned beans in a colander. Slice the green onions. Add the beans, half of the green onions, cooked rice, browned beef, salsa, and chili powder to a large bowl. Stir to combine.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Coat a 3 quart casserole dish with non-stick spray. Spread half of the rice and beef mixture into the bottom of the casserole dish. Add small dollops of the cream cheese evenly across the surface, then cover with the remaining rice and beef mixture.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Cover the dish with foil to prevent the rice from drying out while baking, and bake for 25 minutes in the preheated oven. After 25 minutes, remove the foil and top with the shredded cheddar cheese. Bake for an additional 5-10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted. Top with the remaining sliced green onions just before serving.

title: Chocolate Chip Cookie Brownie Bars
description: Here's what happens when you combine the delicious forces of soft chocolate chip cookies, fudgy brownies, and peanut butter cups in one pan! Feel free to use the homemade brownie batter below or prepare your favorite boxed brownie batter.

ingredients.name: (12 Tbsp; 170g) unsalted butter, softened to room temperature
(150g) packed light or dark brown sugar
unwrapped miniature peanut butter cups (or 2 cups chopped peanut butter cups)
two 4 ounce (226g) semi-sweet chocolate bars, coarsely chopped*

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 350°F (177°C). Line the bottom and sides of a 9×13-inch baking pan with parchment paper, leaving an overhang on the sides to lift the finished brownies out (makes cutting easier!). Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Melt the butter and semi-sweet chocolate together in a medium saucepan on medium heat, stirring constantly (about 5 minutes). Remove from heat and let cool to room temperature. This takes about 15 minutes. Use this 15 minutes to make the chocolate chip cookie layer! Whisk sugar into cooled chocolate/butter mixture until combined. Add in the eggs one at a time, whisking until smooth after each addition. Whisk in the vanilla extract, then use a silicone spatula or wooden spoon to fold in the flour and salt until combined.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: In a large bowl using a handheld mixer or stand mixer fitted with paddle attachment, cream the butter and sugars together on medium speed until combined and creamy. Beat in the egg and vanilla extract until combined. Scrape down the sides and up the bottom of the bowl as needed. Add the flour, cornstarch, baking soda, and salt. Beat on low speed until combined, then beat in the chocolate chips. Dough will be thick and sticky. Using a silicone spatula sprayed with cooking spray (to reduce sticking), spread the cookie dough all over the prepared baking pan. The layer will be thin, but will puff up as it bakes. Top with peanut butter cups, then pour the brownie batter on top and smooth with a knife or rubber spatula.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Bake the bars for 40-45 minutes, or until the center no longer jiggles and a toothpick inserted in the middle comes out relatively clean (a few brownie crumbs are OK). During bake time, tent pan with foil if the edges look like they are cooking a lot faster than the center.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Allow the bars to cool completely in the pan. Once cool, lift the parchment paper out of the pan using the overhang on the sides, then cut into squares.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Cover and store leftover brownies at room temperature for up to 1 week.

title: Cinnamon French Toast Sticks
description: French toast you can eat with your fingers and tastes like cinnamon doughnuts!

ingredients.name: thick slices white bread, preferably stale ((Note 1))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Remove crust of each slice, then cut each into 3 equal thick batons.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Combine the eggs, milk and a pinch of salt in a bowl large enough to roll the bread sticks in.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Combine the cinnamon and sugar on a plate.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Melt 2 tbsp of the butter in a large pan over medium high heat.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Roll the sticks in the egg mixture quickly (do not soak them), shake off excess and place in pan. Cook in 2 batches.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Turn to cook each side until golden.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Immediately transfer to the plate with the cinnamon sugar and roll to coat. It's important to do this quickly while they are hot straight out of the pan so it sticks.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Melt remaining butter and cook the remaining french toast sticks.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Serve immediately with maple syrup to dunk the sticks in.

title: Roasted Summer Vegetables
description: Roasted Summer Vegetables are a super easy side dish and can be served as a simple side, or added to enhance several other dishes.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat the oven to 400ºF. Wash and chop the vegetables into approximately 1-inch pieces.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Spread the vegetables out over a large baking sheet (or two, if needed) so they're in a single layer and not piled on top of one another. Drizzle the olive oil over top, then add the basil and a pinch of salt and pepper. Toss the vegetables until they're evenly coated in oil and spices.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Roast the vegetables for 30-40 minutes, stirring once or twice (every 15-20 minutes or so), until the vegetables are soft and browned on the edges. Taste the vegetables and add another pinch of salt if desired. Sprinkle fresh chopped parsley over top just before serving.

title: Crispy Coconut Chicken with Spicy Honey Orange Sauce
description: Crispy, flavorful, and simple coconut chicken using convenient pantry ingredients to make one memorable meal everyone will love.

ingredients.name: and 1/2 pounds (680g) skinless, boneless chicken breasts or tenders
optional for garnish: chopped cilantro or parsley

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: If using chicken breasts, pound down and cut into strips. If using boneless, skinless chicken tenders (chicken tenders are the lean strips of meat found attached to the underside of chicken breasts—they can also be purchased separately), cut in half lengthwise.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Preheat oven to 400°F (204°C). Line a large baking sheet with parchment paper or a silicone baking mat. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Pulse the shredded coconut in a food processor or blender to break it down into smaller pieces. Alternatively, you can chop it up. Mix it with the Panko in a medium bowl. Set aside. In a second medium bowl, whisk the flour, salt, and pepper together. In a third bowl, whisk the eggs together.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Coat each chicken strip in flour, shaking off any excess. Then, dip in egg and let any excess drip off. Then generously roll in the coconut mixture, shaking off any excess. Add more Panko to the dish if you are running low.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Fry 4-6 chicken strips at a time in the coconut oil—only about 2 minutes per side until the crust is golden brown. Once each is done, place strips onto prepared baking pan.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Bake for 6-10 minutes or until chicken is completely baked through.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Whisk all of the sauce ingredients together except for the salt. Taste. Add salt as needed.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Serve chicken warm with the dipping sauce. Add an optional garnish like a little chopped cilantro or parsley. Store any leftover chicken in the refrigerator for up to 5 days. Reheat in a 350°F (177°C) oven for 10 minutes or until warmed through.

title: Slow Cooker Salsa Chicken Verde Bowls
description: Slow Cooker Salsa Verde Chicken is a fast, easy, and flavorful dinner full of southwest flavors. Serve over rice or build it into a bowl meal.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Slice the onion and bell pepper, then lay them into the bottom of a 4-quart or larger slow cooker. Place the chicken pieces on top of the onion and bell peppers. Sprinkle the cumin, salt, garlic powder, and some freshly cracked pepper onto the chicken pieces. Pour the salsa over top.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Cover the slow cooker and cook on high for four hours or low for 8 hours.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: After cooking, carefully remove the chicken pieces with tongs. Use the tongs to retrieve the onion an d bell peppers from the liquid in the slow cooker. Serve the chicken with the onion and bell pepper, and a spoonful or two of the juices from the slow cooker.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: To build the bowls, thinly slice the jalapeño and crumble the queso fresco. Drain and rinse the black beans. Place a cup of cooked rice in a bowl, add one or two pieces of chicken, 1/4 of the beans, a few slices of jalapeño, a little crumbled queso fresco (about 1/2 oz.), and some fresh cilantro leaves. Cut a lime into wedges and squeeze the juice over top just before serving.

title: Fast French Toast with Cinnamon Apples
description: French toast dripping with apple cinnamon syrup - it's simply incredible that you can get this on the table in 15 minutes!

ingredients.name: small red apples (, or 1 large red apple)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Put the sugar, butter and cinnamon in a small saucepan over medium high heat.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Meanwhile, cut the apple into 1/4" / 7mm thick wedges, leaving the skin on.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Add the apple and water to the saucepan - it doesn't matter if the butter/sugar hasn't completely melted yet.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Stir gently every now and let it simmer away until the apples have slightly softened and the syrup turns into a maple syrup consistency. Remove from heat and set aside.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: While the sauce is simmering away, whisk together the egg, milk, butter and salt into a bowl.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Melt half the butter in a large pan over medium high heat (or all if you are cooking them in a large pan that will fit al 4 pieces of bread).

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Submerge each bread into the mixture, then remove, allowing the excess egg to drip off. Don't soak the bread in the egg mixture, you don't want it to be completely soaked through, just coated.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Place in pan and cook until golden brown on each side - about 1 1/2 minutes.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: To serve, place french toast on a plate and top with the apple mixture, spooning over the syrup.

title: S'mores Cookie Bars
description: Graham cracker and brown sugar cookie dough sandwiches a thick layer of marshmallow creme and plenty of chocolate chips in these undeniably delicious s'mores cookie bars. Feel free to use store-bought or homemade marshmallow creme.

ingredients.name: (8 Tbsp; 113g) unsalted butter, softened to room temperature*
(150g) packed light or dark brown sugar
(120g) graham cracker crumbs (about 8 full-sheet graham crackers)
heaping cup marshmallow creme (store-bought “Fluff” or 1/2 recipe of homemade marshmallow creme)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 350°F (177°C). Line an 8-inch square baking pan or 9-inch square baking pan with parchment paper, leaving enough overhang on the sides to easily remove the bars when they have cooled. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: In a large bowl using handheld or stand mixer fitted with a paddle attachment, cream the butter and brown sugar together on medium-high speed, about 3 minutes. (Here’s a helpful tutorial if you need guidance on how to cream butter and sugar.) Add the egg and vanilla extract and beat until combined. Scrape down the sides and up the bottom of the bowl as needed. Mixture may appear curdled and that’s ok.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Whisk the flour, graham cracker crumbs, baking powder, and salt together in a medium bowl. Pour the flour mixture into the wet ingredients and then beat on medium speed until combined.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Press/spread 2/3 of the graham cookie dough into prepared pan. (Doesn’t have to be exact, just eyeball it.) It will be a thin layer and the dough is sticky, so use your hands if needed. Spread the marshmallow creme evenly on top. This will be tricky since the marshmallow creme is sticky, but do the best you can to get an even layer. Layer chocolate chips evenly on top. Mold the remaining cookie dough into flat pieces and layer on top of the chocolate chips, as pictured and shown in the video above. You won’t have enough dough to make one single layer, so some chocolate chips/marshmallow will be exposed.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Bake the bars for 25-30 minutes or until the top is lightly golden brown. Remove from the oven and place the pan on a wire rack. Cool bars completely.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Lift the bars out using the parchment paper overhang on the sides. Cut into squares.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Cover and store leftover bars at room temperature for up to 1 week.

title: Chili Garlic Tofu Bowls
description: Chili Garlic Tofu Bowls are a fiber and flavor filled healthy lunch that you can pre-pack for your week ahead

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Remove the tofu from its package and wrap it in a clean, lint-free kitchen towel or a few layers of paper towel. Place the wrapped tofu between two plates and place something heavy on top (like a pot full of water). Let the tofu press for at least 30 minutes.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: While the tofu is pressing, prepare the kale. Remove the stems from the kale, then cut the leaves into one-inch wide strips. Rinse the leaves well in a colander with cool water. Let drain.

steps.title: Step 3
