steps.description: If needed for extra visuals, see my How to Make a Cheesecake Water Bath; the visual guide will assist you in this step. Boil a pot of water. You need 1 inch of water in your roasting pan for the water bath, so make sure you boil enough. I use an entire kettle of hot water. Place the pan inside of a large roasting pan. Carefully pour the hot water inside of the pan and place in the oven. (Or you can place the roasting pan in the oven first, then pour the hot water in. Whichever is easier for you.)

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: (Note: if you notice the cheesecake browning too quickly on top, tent it with aluminum foil halfway through baking.) Bake cheesecake for 55-70 minutes or until the center is almost set. When it’s done, the center of the cheesecake will slightly wobble if you gently shake the pan. Turn the oven off and open the oven door slightly. Let the cheesecake sit in the oven for 1 hour as it cools down. Remove cheesecake from the oven and allow to cool completely at room temperature, then refrigerate the cheesecake for at least 4 hours or overnight.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Use a knife to loosen the chilled cheesecake from the rim of the springform pan, then remove the rim. Add toppings, if desired. Using a clean sharp knife, cut into slices for serving. For neat slices, wipe the knife clean and dip into warm water between each slice.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Cover and store leftover cheesecake in the refrigerator for up to 5 days.

title: Roasted Red Pepper Hummus Wraps
description: These quick and flavorful Roasted Red Pepper Hummus Wraps are a great no-cook, no-reheat lunch idea. A fresh and light lunch for summer! Budetbytes.com

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: To make the hummus, drain the chickpeas and add them to a food processor along with the lemon juice, tahini, olive oil, cumin, garlic powder, and salt. Pulse until the mixture is crumbly, then slowly add up to 1/4 cup water until the mixture is smooth and fluffy.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Remove the red peppers from the jar and slice them thinly. Cut the feta into 1/2 oz. cubes. Thinly slice the cucumbers.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Spread about 1/4 cup hummus inside or over the surface of a pita. Add a few roasted red pepper strips, one of the feta cubes (crumbled), some sliced cucumber, and a cup or so of baby spinach. Fold up the sides of the pita and eat!

title: My Favorite Cornbread Recipe
description: I was never a fan of cornbread until this recipe! After lots of recipe testing, I found the perfect ratio of ingredients for soft, moist, and buttery cornbread with crisp-crunchy edges.

ingredients.name: (8 Tbsp; 113g) unsalted butter, melted and slightly cooled
(67g) packed light or dark brown sugar

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 400°F (204°C). Grease an 8-inch square baking pan or 9-inch square baking pan. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Whisk the cornmeal, flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt together in a large bowl. Set aside. In a medium bowl, whisk the melted butter, brown sugar, and honey together until completely smooth and thick. Then, whisk in the egg until combined. Finally, whisk in the buttermilk. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and whisk until combined. Avoid over-mixing.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Pour batter into prepared baking pan. Bake until golden brown, about 20 minutes for a 9-inch pan and 25 minutes for an 8-inch pan. Use a toothpick to test for doneness—if the toothpick comes out clean, the cornbread is done. Allow to slightly cool before slicing and serving. Serve cornbread with butter, honey, jam, or whatever you like.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Wrap leftovers up tightly and store at room temperature for up to 1 week.

title: Mexican Fried Rice
description: Super fast, super versatile, super tasty - a super mid week meal to add to your rotation!

ingredients.name: red bell pepper / capsicum (, diced (about 1 cup))
Optional: 1 1/2 cups protein ((chicken, pork, beef), shredded or diced)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Combine the Sauce ingredients in a small bowl and mix.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Heat the oil in a pan over high heat. Add garlic and cook for 10 seconds until fragrant.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Add the onion and bell pepper and cook until the onion becomes translucent - about 2 minutes.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: If you are using uncooked protein, add it and sauté until just cooked through.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Add the black beans and corn. If you are using cooked proteins (like shredded cooked chicken) add it at the same time. Cook for 1 minute just to heat through.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Add the rice and Sauce and stir quickly to coat the rice evenly.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Check seasoning and add more salt if you require it. Amount of salt required depends on the saltiness of the enchilada sauce you are using.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Season with black pepper and serve immediately.

title: Middle Eastern Lamb and Lentil Rice Pilaf
description: Coriander, cumin and cinnamon is a classic Middle Eastern spice combination that goes fabulously with lamb. It also works very well with beef.

ingredients.name: (loosely packed) spinach or silverbeet/chard, roughly shredded
chilli powder (, or cayenne pepper or other hot chilli powder (not American Chilli Powder) (optional))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Heat oil in a large pot over medium high heat.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Add garlic and onion. Sauté for 2 to 3 minutes until golden and translucent.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Turn up heat to high and add lamb. Use spatula to break mince up and cook until browned.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Add Spice Mix and cook for 30 seconds until spices are fragrant and mixed through the mince.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: If using silverbeet/chard, add half the silverbeet into the pan and sauté for 15 seconds until starting to wilt. (If using spinach, do not add any at this stage).

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Add rice, water and lentils and stir. Bring to simmer, then put lid on and turn down heat to medium low.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Cook for 10 to 12 minutes until water is absorbed.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Remove pot from heat, take lid off and quickly spread the remaining silverbeet or all the spinach on top of the rice, then put the lid back on.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Rest rice for 10 minutes. Remove lid, stir through silverbeet/spinach and fluff up the rice.

steps.title: Step 10
steps.description: Spoon rice into serving dish, top with Fried Asian Shallots and parsley if desired. Serve the sliced tomatoes on the side.

title: Hash Brown Crust Quiche Lorraine
description: A mash up of two of my favourite brunch dishes - hash brown and quiche! This can be made using frozen shredded hash browns or you can shred your own (directions provided for both).

ingredients.name: / 600g starchy potatoes ((Note 1) OR 4 cups (not packed) frozen shredded hash browns, thawed)
milk ((preferably full cream, but low fat will also work))
/ 180g bacon (, cut into large dice (about 1cm x 0.5cm / 2/3" x 1/5"))
small onion (, diced (or half a large onion))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 425F/220C with the oven shelf in the top 1/3 of the oven.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Grease a 9"/ 23cm pie dish (Note 2)

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Hash Brown Crust

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Prepare Filling & Egg Mixture

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Fill Quiche

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Baking the Quiche

title: Garden Vegetable Lasagna Roll Ups
description: With a rainbow of vegetables and a trio of cheeses, these Garden Vegetable Lasagna Roll Ups are a flavorful and filling meal. Freezer friendly, too!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Boil a large pot of water. Once the water is boiling, add the lasagna noodles and boil just until tender. Drain the pasta in a colander and set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: While the lasagna noodles are boiling, prepare the vegetable mix. Mince the garlic and dice the onion. Add the cooking oil to a large skillet, along with the garlic and onion, and sauté over medium heat until the onions are transparent.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: While the onions are cooking, rinse and thinly slice the mushrooms. Add the mushrooms to the skillet and continue to sauté. While the mushrooms are cooking, grate the zucchini and carrots on a large holed cheese grater. Add the zucchini and carrots to the skillet, along with the oregano, about 1/4 tsp salt, and some freshly cracked pepper. Continue to sauté until most of the moisture has evaporated (juice should no longer pool on the bottom of the skillet). Remove the skillet from the heat and allow it to cool slightly.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Next, prepare the cheese mix. In a large bowl, combine the ricotta, mozzarella, Parmesan, and 1/4 tsp salt. Stir until they are evenly combined. Add the slightly cooled sautéed vegetables and stir to combine again. Taste and adjust the salt or pepper if needed.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Carefully lay out a few lasagna noodles at a time on a flat surface. Add approximately 1/3 cup of the vegetable and cheese mixture to each noodle, then spread the mixture from end to end, leaving about a 1/2 inch bare at each end of the noodle. Once covered in the filling, roll the noodles up. You should get approximately finished 12 roll ups (you may have extra noodles).

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: To bake the roll ups, preheat the oven to 350ºF. Coat a 9x9 casserole dish with non-stick spray. Spread about 1/4 of the pasta sauce in the bottom of the casserole dish, then arrange the roll ups on top. Pour the remaining sauce over top. Bake for 40 minutes, or until heated through.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: To freeze the roll ups, Place two roll ups each in a freezer and microwave safe container, then pour sauce over top. Freeze for up to three months. Reheat in the microwave when ready to eat.

title: Salted Caramel Pretzel Crunch Bars
description: Shortbread, caramel, pretzels, and chocolate meet to create these completely addicting salted caramel pretzel crunch bars.

ingredients.name: (142g) unsalted butter, slightly soft (see important note!)*
large egg yolk, at room temperature
(170g) chopped semi-sweet chocolate (or 1 cup (180g) semi-sweet chocolate chips)*

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat the oven to 350°F (177°C). Line an 8-inch or 9-inch square baking pan with parchment paper with enough overhang on the sides to easily remove the bars from the pan. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Using a handheld or stand mixer fitted with a paddle attachment, beat the butter on high speed until smooth and creamy—about 1 minute. Add the flour, sugar, salt, egg yolk, and vanilla extract and beat on high speed for 2 minutes until crumbly. Get your hands in there to make the dough come together. Press tightly into prepared pan. Press pretzel pieces evenly on top. Bake for 20 minutes. Allow to cool completely before adding the caramel (I stick it in the refrigerator to speed this up).

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Prepare the salted caramel and wait for it to cool until it slightly thickens. Pour/spoon over crust. Allow to cool and set completely before topping with chocolate. Again, I stick it in the refrigerator to speed it up.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Melt the chocolate and coconut oil in the microwave in 15 second increments, stopping and stirring until completely melted. Pour over cooled caramel. Top with sea salt. Stick in the refrigerator to cool completely.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Lift the parchment paper out of the pan using the overhang on the sides and cut into squares. Store in an airtight container at room temperature for up to a week.

title: Mocha Nutella Cupcakes
description: These easy mocha Nutella cupcakes have it all! They're moist and fluffy topped with creamy Nutella frosting.

ingredients.name: (85g) unsalted butter, softened to room temperature
(16 Tbsp; 226g) unsalted butter, softened to room temperature

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat the oven to 350°F (177°C). Line a 12-count muffin pan with cupcake liners. Line a second pan with 2 liners—this recipe makes about 14 cupcakes. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Whisk the flour, baking powder, and salt together. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Using a handheld or stand mixer fitted with a paddle attachment, beat the butter on high speed until smooth and creamy—about 1 minute. Add the granulated sugar and beat on high speed for 2 minutes until creamed together. Scrape down the sides and up the bottom of the bowl with a silicone spatula as needed. Add the egg whites and vanilla extract. Beat on high speed until combined, then beat in the sour cream. Scrape down the sides and up the bottom of the bowl as needed so everything is incorporated.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Stir the espresso powder and hot water together until smooth, then stir this into the milk. Set aside for a second.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: With the mixer running on low speed, add the dry ingredients until just incorporated. With the mixer still running on low, slowly pour in the espresso/milk mixture until combined. Do not overmix. You may need to whisk it all by hand to make sure there are no lumps at the bottom of the bowl. The batter will be on the thin side.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Pour/spoon the batter into the liners—fill only halfway with batter to avoid spilling over the sides. Bake for 18-20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Allow to cool completely before frosting.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: In a large bowl using a handheld or stand mixer fitted with a paddle attachment, beat the butter on medium speed until smooth, about 2 minutes. Stop the mixer and add confectioners’ sugar, Nutella, heavy cream, and vanilla extract. Beat on low speed for 30 seconds, then increase to medium-high speed and beat for 2 full minutes. Add up to 1/2 cup more confectioners’ sugar if frosting is too thin or another Tablespoon of cream if frosting is too thick. Add a pinch of salt if frosting is too sweet. (I always add 1/8 teaspoon salt.)

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Frost and decorate cooled cupcakes. I used a Wilton 1M piping tip for these photos. (Another favorite is this Wilton #12 round tip.)

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Serve immediately. Store leftover cupcakes in the refrigerator for up to 5 days. I recommend a cupcake carrier for storing and transporting decorated cupcakes.

title: Peanut Butter S'mores Pots
description: Get your favorite gooey s'mores flavors in a layered, oven baked S'mores Pot. Graham cracker crust, peanut butter, chocolate chips, and toasted marshmallows.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat the oven to 350ºF. Place three whole graham crackers (rectangles, not the square half) and place them in a zip top bag. Use a rolling pin to crush the graham crackers into crumbs.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Melt the butter in a medium bowl. Once melted, stir in the sugar and graham cracker crumbs. Stir the mixture until it looks like damp, coarse sand. Divide the mixture between two 8oz. ramekins and use the back of a spoon to pack the mixture into a solid layer.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Drop about 1 Tbsp of peanut butter onto each graham cracker crust, followed by a sprinkle of chocolate chips (1 to 1.5 Tbsp for each ramekin). Arrange the marshmallows in a single layer in the ramekin. Use enough marshmallows so that they are touching each other, but not packed in tight. They will spread as they melt.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Bake the s'mores pots for 15 minutes, or until the marshmallows are puffy and light golden brown. Serve hot (use a pot holder or wrap the ramekin in a towel because it will be hot!).

title: Italian Sausage Quiche
description: This isn't traditional Italian but it is sure packed with Italian flavours! This must be made using Italian sausages as it is a key flavouring component for the filling.

ingredients.name: sheets frozen shortcut pastry ((Note 1), thawed OR one 9"/23cm ready made pie crust)
grated cheddar cheese ((or tasty, provolone, monterey jack or any other flavoured melting cheese))
cherry tomatoes (, halved and seeds scooped out)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 180C/350F.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Lightly spray a 9"/23cm quiche flan or pie dish with oil.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Line with the pastry, trimming the excess. Use the extra 1/2 sheet to fill in any gaps as 1 sheet of pastry is slightly too small for a standard flan. Press to seal well.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Cover pastry with parchment (baking) paper, then fill with raw rice or dried beans to weigh it down.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Place in the oven and bake for 20 minutes, then remove parchment paper and rice/beans. Return to the oven for a further 10 minutes until golden. Remove from oven.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Prepare Filling

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Assemble And Bake Quiche

title: Tropical Yogurt Parfaits
description: Tropical Yogurt Parfaits are the perfect healthy summer breakfast when you're short on time. Prepare them on the weekend and eat good all week.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Add 1/4 cup rolled oats to the bottom of four 12oz. mason jars, or another container of comparable size. Add 1/3 cup of yogurt on top of the oats in each jar.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Slice the bananas, drain the pineapple (the juice can be saved for smoothies), and dice the mango. Divide the sliced bananas, pineapple chunks, and mango between the four jars. Layering the bananas between the yogurt and pineapple will help prevent the banana from browning. Top each jar off with a tablespoon of shredded coconut.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Refrigerate the jars overnight to allow the oats time to soak and soften. Use a spoon to stir the ingredients in the jar just before eating. Refrigerate the parfaits for up to five days.

title: Vegetarian Garlic Stuffed Mushrooms
description: These mushrooms are a great side for 4, a light meal for 2 or as an appetiser to pass around at a party because they are small enough to be eaten whole. They are best served warm but still delicious at room temperature.

ingredients.name: fresh thyme leaves (, chopped (or 1/4 tsp dried thyme) (see notes))
to 3 pinches of salt ((to your taste))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 180C/350F.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Break the stalks off the mushrooms, being careful to keep the caps in one piece.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Pile the caps into a baking dish or tray. Drizzle over 1 tbsp olive oil and toss to coat. Spread the mushrooms out on the tray, cup side up.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Finely chop the stalks.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a fry pan over medium high heat.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Add the mushroom stalks and garlic and sauté for 1 1/2 to 2 minutes until softened.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Add the panko bread crumbs and sauté for 1 to 2 minutes until it becomes a light golden colour.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Remove pan from heat and toss through salt, pepper, parsley and thyme leaves.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Use a teaspoon to spoon panko filling into each mushroom cup. Don't worry about spillage! Just pile the filling into each cup as well as you can.

steps.title: Step 10
steps.description: Drizzle over remaining 1 tbsp of olive oil and bake for approximately 10 minutes, or until the mushrooms are softened (but not soft. They will go soggy and lose their shape).

steps.title: Step 11
steps.description: Serve warm or at room temperature.

title: The Best Black Bean Burgers I've Ever Had
description: Between homemade, restaurant, and store-bought, these are the best black bean burgers I've ever tried. These burgers are not vegan or vegetarian.

ingredients.name: (14-ounce) cans black beans, drained, rinsed, and patted dry
(100g) finely chopped bell pepper (1/2 of a pepper)
(130g) finely chopped yellow onion (1/2 of a large onion)
large eggs (see note for vegan substitution)
Worcestershire sauce (see note for vegan & vegetarian version)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 325°F (163°C). Spread beans evenly onto a lined baking sheet and bake for 15 minutes until slightly dried out.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Meanwhile, sauté olive oil, chopped pepper, onion, and garlic over medium heat until peppers and onions are soft, about 5-6 minutes. Gently blot some of the moisture out. Place in a large bowl or in a food processor with the remaining ingredients (cumin, chili powder, garlic powder, smoked paprika, bread crumbs, cheese, eggs, worcestershire, ketchup, salt, and pepper). Stir or pulse everything together, then add the black beans. Mash with a fork or pulse the mixture, leaving some larger chunks of beans.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Form into patties, about 1/2 cup (130g) of mixture each, about 3/4-inch thick.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: To bake: Place patties on a parchment paper-lined baking sheet and bake at 375°F (191°C) for 10 minutes on each side, 20 minutes total. To grill: Place patties on greased aluminum foil and grill 8 minutes on each side. Heat temperature is personal preference as all grills differ. Generally, black bean burgers should grill on medium-high heat about 350°F (177°C) – 400°F (204°C).

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Serve with your favorite toppings. Store leftovers in the refrigerator for up to 5 days.

title: Quiche Toast Cups
description: Cute mini quiches made using plain old sandwich bread. Who can possibly resist these? Makes 6 quiches (3 servings).

ingredients.name: rasher of bacon (, rind removed, diced (50g / 1.5 oz))
onion (, finely diced (brown, white or yellow))
cheese (, grated (tasty, gruyere, cheddar - any good melting cheese))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 180C/350F.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Heat 1 tsp oil in small pan over high heat. Add onion and bacon and sauté until bacon is crisp - about 2 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside (you can just leave it in the pan).

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Cut bread into rounds or just cut crusts off. I use a 800g/28oz tomato can (emptied and washed) - the perfect size to cut rounds to fit into muffin tins out of bread, pastry etc.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Use a rolling pin to flatten the bread.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Lightly spray 6 muffin tin holes with oil spray, then press the bread into the muffin tin.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Place in oven for 3 minutes. Remove from oven and set aside. The toast cups should not be browned, just a bit dry (like "toast").

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Whisk together the egg, milk, parsley and a pinch of salt and pepper.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Divide the bacon mixture between the 6 toast cups, then the cheese.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Pour 2 1/2 tbsp of egg mixture into each cup, then immediately place in the oven. If you take too long between pouring the egg mixture into the toast cups and putting it in the oven, the egg will start soaking into the bread.

steps.title: Step 10
steps.description: Bake for 12 to 15 minutes until the top is lightly golden and the filling is set.

steps.title: Step 11
steps.description: Remove from oven and rest for 5 minutes before serving. The filling will be puffed up but it will deflate while resting.

steps.title: Step 12
steps.description: Garnish with extra parsley if desired. Serve warm.

title: Skillet Pot Pie
description: This easy skillet pot pie is a delicious one pan dinner for your family. It's hearty and satisfying and you can use chicken or leftover Thanksgiving turkey!

ingredients.name: Store-bought or homemade pie crust (my recipe makes 2 crusts; you can halve the crust recipe or freeze the 2nd half)
regular or reduced sodium chicken broth
2-3 cups cooked shredded or cubed chicken or turkey
egg wash: 1 large egg beaten with 1 Tablespoon (15ml) milk

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Prepare my pie crust recipe through step 5. Do this in advance to save time!

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Heat the butter in a 10–12-inch oven-safe skillet over medium heat. Add the onion, garlic, carrots, and celery. Cook for 5 minutes or until vegetables have softened and released some liquid. Add flour, thyme, salt, and pepper. Stir and cook for 2 minutes as the flour soaks up the liquid.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Pour in the chicken broth and milk. Bring to a boil, reduce heat to low and allow to simmer for 5 minutes. Gravy will thicken. Stir in the vegetables and chicken/turkey. Cook for 1 more minute. Remove from heat and allow to slightly cool for 10 minutes (and up to 1 day—cover and store in the refrigerator).

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Preheat oven to 375°F (191°C).

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: On a floured work surface, roll out one of the discs of chilled dough (you can freeze the 2nd for later use, see note). Turn the dough about a quarter turn after every few rolls until you have a circle 12 inches in diameter. If your skillet is 12 inches, roll out the pie dough to about 13 inches so it fits. Carefully lay the dough over the filling. Cut slits in the top to form steam vents. Crimp or flute the edges to seal. Lightly brush the top of the pie crust with the egg wash.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Bake for 35–40 minutes or until the top of the crust is golden brown. After the first 20 minutes of bake time, I place a pie crust shield on top of the skillet to prevent the edges of crust from burning.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Remove from the oven and allow to cool for 5 minutes before serving. Leftovers keep well in the refrigerator in an airtight container for up to 5 days. Reheat as desired.

title: Kale Chicken Caesar Wraps
description: This easy Kale Chicken Caesar Wrap is a great no-cook, no-reheat lunch idea. A big deli-style wrap made at home for a LOT less money.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Remove the stems from the kale leaves by running a sharp knife along each side of the stem from top to bottom. Stack the de-stemmed leaves, then cut crosswise into thin strips. Place the chopped kale into a colander and rinse well with cool water. Let as much water drain away as possible. Use a salad spinner of blot with a clean, lint-free towel to remove as much moisture as possible. Place the cleaned and dried kale into a large bowl.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Drain and rinse the chickpeas. Peel the carrots, then shred them using a large holed cheese grater. Remove the chicken meat from the carcass, then roughly chop into small pieces. Add the chickpeas, carrots, chopped chicken, and Parmesan to the bowl with the kale.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Add 1/4 cup Caesar dressing to the bowl, then stir until everything is evenly coated. Add one heaping cup of the salad mix to the center of a large tortilla. Add some freshly cracked pepper, if desired. Fold in the sides of the tortilla, then roll it up like a burrito. Serve immediately or refrigerate up to a day.

title: Grilled Mexican Corn with Chipotle Adobo Sauce (Mexicano Restaurant Copycat)
description: This is the best corn I have ever had. It is a copycat of corn I had at a modern Mexican restaurant in Narrabeen, Sydney, called Mexicano (which I think is the second best corn! :) ) !

ingredients.name: chipotle in adobo sauce ((1 chipotle + sauce totalling 1 1/2 tbsp) (Note 4))
ancho chili powder (, chipotle powder or smoky paprika)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Place the Chipotle Adobo Mayo ingredients in a small food processor and blend until smooth. (Note 3)

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: BBQ: Heat the grill side on high. Grill corn for around 8 minutes, or until charred all over and cooked through.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Stovetop: Boil a large pot of water. Add the corn and boil for 10 minutes. Drain and let the corn steam dry in the colander for a few minutes. Heat a skillet with 1 tbsp of olive oil over high heat. Add the corn and cook all over until nicely charred.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Allow the corn to cool slightly.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Place the parmesan in a shallow dish.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Use a pastry brush to generously slather each corn with the Chipotle Adobo Mayo.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Roll the corn in the parmesan.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Sprinkle with a pinch of ancho chili powder, and serve with lime wedges on the side.

title: Plum Salad with Lemon Ginger Dressing
description: This fresh plum salad with lemon ginger dressing is a great way to use up leftover cooked grains and the summer's fresh produce.

ingredients.name: cooked bulgur, quinoa, couscous, or rice (chilled) ($0.74)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Grate about one tsp of fresh ginger into a jar or small bowl. Add the lemon juice, salad oil, honey, salt, and some freshly cracked pepper. Shake the jar (or whisk) until the ingredients are combined. Let the dressing sit while you prepare the rest of the salad.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Rinse the parsley well to remove any dirt or debris. Shake off as much water as possible. Pull the leaves from the stems and then give them a rough chop. Place the chopped parsley in a bowl.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Thinly slice the plums and remove the sections from the pit. Add the plum slices and sliced almonds to the bowl with the parsley. Give the dressing a quick stir, then add it to the salad (start with half and add more as needed). Toss the salad until everything is coated in the dressing, then serve.

title: Three Pepper Pasta with Crispy Pepperoni
description: This Three Pepper Pasta boasts a colorful trio of peppers and crispy pepperoni for extra flavor. It's like pizza in your pasta bowl!

ingredients.name: lb. thin spaghetti or angel hair pasta ($1.55)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Thinly slice the green and red bell peppers. Remove about 1/2 cup of the banana peppers from the brine. Set the peppers aside until ready to use.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Begin to boil a large pot of water for the pasta. Break the long pasta in half and then add it to the boiling water. Cook until al dente, then drain in a colander.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the pepperoni and sauté the slices until they become crispy on the edges (about 5 minutes). Remove the crispy pepperoni to a plate covered with paper towel to drain.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Mince the garlic and add it to the oil in the skillet. Sauté for about one minute or just until the garlic is soft and fragrant, but not brown. Add the sliced peppers and continue to sauté for 5-7 minutes more, or until the peppers have just begun to soften.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Add the pasta sauce, basil, oregano, and red pepper flakes to the skillet with the peppers. Stir to combine and allow the sauce to heat through.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Return the drained pasta to the large pot, then add the pasta sauce and peppers. Stir until everything is evenly combined and coated in sauce. Add the crispy pepperoni and stir to combine again. Serve warm.

title: Homemade Everything Bagels
description: Here's a complete recipe and tutorial for hot & fresh homemade everything bagels. Skip the store-bought and bakery because bagels are easier than you think!

ingredients.name: and 3/4 teaspoons instant or active dry yeast*
packed light or dark brown sugar (or barley malt syrup)*
coating the bowl: nonstick spray or 1 Tablespoon olive oil
coarse sea salt or flaky sea salt
egg wash: 1 egg white beaten with 1 Tablespoon water

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Whisk the warm water and yeast together in the bowl of your stand mixer fitted with a dough hook attachment. Cover and allow to sit for 5 minutes. *If you don’t have a stand mixer, simply use a large mixing bowl and mix the dough with a wooden spoon or silicone spatula in the next step.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Add the flour, brown sugar, and salt. Beat on low speed for 2 minutes. The dough is very stiff and will look somewhat dry.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Keep the dough in the mixer and beat for an additional 6-7 full minutes, or knead by hand on a lightly floured surface for 6-7 full minutes. (If you’re new to bread-baking, my How to Knead Dough video tutorial can help here.) If the dough becomes too sticky during the kneading process, sprinkle 1 teaspoon of flour at a time on the dough or on the work surface/in the bowl to make a soft, slightly tacky dough. Do not add more flour than you need because you do not want a dry dough. After kneading, the dough should still feel a little soft. Poke it with your finger—if it slowly bounces back, your dough is ready to rise. You can also do a “windowpane test” to see if your dough has been kneaded long enough: tear off a small (roughly golfball-size) piece of dough and gently stretch it out until it’s thin enough for light to pass through it. Hold it up to a window or light. Does light pass through the stretched dough without the dough tearing first? If so, your dough has been kneaded long enough and is ready to rise. If not, keep kneading until it passes the windowpane test.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Lightly grease a large bowl with oil or nonstick spray. Place the dough in the bowl, turning it to coat all sides in the oil. Cover the bowl with aluminum foil, plastic wrap, or a clean kitchen towel. Allow the dough to rise at room temperature for 60-90 minutes or until double in size.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Line two large baking sheets with parchment paper or silicone baking mats.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: When the dough is ready, punch it down to release any air bubbles. Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces. (Just eyeball it– doesn’t need to be perfect!) Shape each piece into a ball. Press your index finger through the center of each ball to make a hole about 1.5 – 2 inches in diameter. Watch video below for a visual. Loosely cover the shaped bagels with kitchen towel and rest for a few minutes as you prepare the water bath.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Preheat oven to 425°F (218°C).

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: struction-step-8">Water bath

title: Chili Lime Cantaloupe
description: This quick and refreshing Chili Lime Cantaloupe is a unique way to dress up summer fruit. Pairs well with any southwest or Asian inspired meal.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Cut the cantaloupe in half and scrape out the seeds with a spoon. Reserve half of the cantaloupe for breakfast or other meals. Take the remaining half and cut it into quarters. Using a sharp knife, carefully run the knife between the flesh and the rind. Once the rind is removed, slice the melon into thin pieces.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: In a small bowl, combine the juice of half a lime (about 1.5-2 Tbsp), honey, salt, and crushed red pepper. Stir until the honey is dissolved.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Pour the dressing over the sliced cantaloupe and toss to coat the melon in the dressing. Serve immediately, or chill until ready to eat. Give the melon a brief stir before serving.

title: Rice recipes - rice meal recipes for dinner
description: Here's a quick link list of the rice recipes listed in this post! I've also included directions for how to cook plain white rice, just for convenience.

ingredients.name: One Pot Greek Chicken and Lemon Rice
One Pan Chicken Shawarma with Chickpea Rice Pilaf
One Pot Chinese Chicken and Rice
One Pan Baked Chicken and Rice
Chicken and Rice Pilaf with Nuts and Dried Fruit
rice ((white rice - long grain, medium grain, short grain, Jasmin, basmati))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Place water and rice in a medium saucepan over medium high heat.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Bring to a simmer so the entire surface is rippling.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Place tight fitting lid on, then reduce heat to medium low so it's simmering gently (or low for strong stoves).

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Cook for 13 minutes - do not stir, do not remove lid.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Water should now be absorbed - QUICKLY tilt pot, lift lid to check.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Put lid back on, remove from stove, leave 10 minutes.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Remove lid, fluff with fork. Serve!

title: Homemade Cinnamon Raisin Bagels
description: Learn how to make homemade cinnamon raisin bagels with this simple recipe tutorial. Don't skip the water bath and egg wash- both provide an extra chewy and golden brown crust.

ingredients.name: and 3/4 teaspoons instant or active dry yeast*
(520g) bread flour (spooned & leveled), plus more for work surface and hands*
(13g) packed light or dark brown sugar (or barley malt syrup)*
coating the bowl: nonstick spray or 1 Tablespoon olive oil
egg white beaten with 1 Tablespoon water

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Whisk the warm water and yeast together in the bowl of your stand mixer fitted with a dough hook attachment. Cover and allow to sit for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Add the flour, brown sugar, salt, and vanilla extract. Beat on low speed for 2 minutes, then beat in the raisins until combined. The dough is very stiff and will look somewhat dry.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Mix the sugar and cinnamon together and sprinkle onto a clean surface. Place the dough on top. Knead the dough for 5 minutes, picking up all that cinnamon sugar. Work as much of the cinnamon sugar mixture as you can into the dough. The dough may become a little wet from the added sugar– that’s ok.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Lightly grease a large bowl with oil or nonstick spray. Place the dough in the bowl, turning it to coat all sides in the oil. Cover the bowl with aluminum foil, plastic wrap, or a clean kitchen towel. Allow the dough to rise at room temperature for 60-90 minutes or until double in size.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Line two large baking sheets with parchment paper or silicone baking mats.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: When the dough is ready, punch it down to release any air bubbles. Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces. (Just eyeball it– doesn’t need to be perfect!) Shape each piece into a ball. Press your index finger through the center of each ball to make a hole about 1.5 – 2 inches in diameter. Watch video below for a visual. Loosely cover the shaped bagels with kitchen towel and rest for a few minutes as you prepare the water bath.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Preheat oven to 425°F (218°C).

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Fill a large, wide pot with 2 quarts of water. Whisk in the honey. Bring water to a boil, then reduce heat to medium-high. Drop bagels in, 2-4 at a time, making sure they have enough room to float around. Cook the bagels for 1 minute on each side.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Using a pastry brush, brush the egg wash on top and around the sides of each bagel. Place 4 bagels onto each lined baking sheet.

steps.title: Step 10
steps.description: Bake for 20-25 minutes, rotating the pan halfway through. You want the bagels to be a dark golden brown. Remove from the oven and allow bagels to cool on the baking sheets for 20 minutes, then transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.

steps.title: Step 11
steps.description: Slice, toast, top, whatever you want! Cover leftover bagels tightly and store at room temperature for a few days or in the refrigerator for up to 1 week.

title: Baked Apple Pie Fries with Salted Caramel Dipping Sauce
description: Your favourite apple pie....as fries!! These are a great finger food dessert for casual entertaining.

ingredients.name: canned Apple Pie Filling ((increase to 1 3/4 cups if using US refrigerated pie crust) (Note 1))
sheets frozen shortcrust pastry ((25cm/10" square) (do not thaw) OR 14 oz refrigerated pie crust (Note 1))
sugar granules ((or ordinary sugar) (optional - for sprinkling))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Place Apple Pie Filling, sugar and cinnamon in the food processor and whizz until smooth.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Working quickly so the pastry does not defrost, place one sheet of pastry on a cutting board or other flat surface. Spread the filling over the pastry, leaving a thin border. Place the other sheet on top. Brush with egg wash, sprinkle with sugar granules (if using) then place the pastry in the freezer for at least 1 hour (Note 3).

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Preheat oven to 180C/350F. Spray large baking tray with oil (or 2 small ones).

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Remove pastry from the freezer. Let it defrost for 5 to 10 minutes, until the pastry is softened - it doesn't need to thaw completely but it can't be frozen stiff otherwise it will crack when you cut it. DO NOT let the pie filling defrost!

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Use a large knife to cut it into "fries". I cut mine into 12 strips vertically (2cm / 4/5" wide) then 3 horizontally (8cm/3" long) to make 36 fries.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Carefully transfer to baking tray and set them aside to come to room temperature while the oven heats up.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Bake for 15 to 25 minutes, until golden brown on top. (Note 4)

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Remove from oven, let it rest for 5 minutes then transfer to cooking rack.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Serve with Salted Caramel Sauce.

steps.title: Step 10
steps.description: Salted Caramel Sauce

title: Easy Spinach Ricotta Pasta
description: This quick and luxurious Spinach Ricotta Pasta boasts a creamy and garlicky spinach sauce made easy with ricotta cheese.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Place the frozen spinach in a colander to thaw while you work on the pasta and sauce.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and then add the pasta. Let the pasta boil until al dente, then drain in a colander. Reserve about 1/2 cup of the pasta cooking water to help loosen the sauce later if needed.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: While the pasta is boiling, prepare the ricotta sauce. Mince the garlic and add it to a large skillet with the olive oil. Cook over medium-low heat for 1-2 minutes, or just until soft and fragrant (but not browned). Add the milk and ricotta, then stir until relatively smooth (the ricotta may be slightly grainy). Allow the sauce to heat through and come to a low simmer. The sauce will thicken slightly as it simmers. Once it's thick enough to coat the spoon (3-5 minutes), season with salt and pepper.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Squeeze the thawed spinach to remove as much excess water as possible (squeeze it in your fist), then add it to the ricotta sauce. Stir until the spinach is distributed throughout the sauce. Taste and adjust salt or pepper if needed. Turn the heat off.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Add the cooked and drained pasta to the sauce and toss to coat. If the sauce becomes to thick or dry, add a small amount of the reserved pasta cooking water. Serve warm.

title: Spiced Pumpkin Seed Cranberry Snack Bars
description: Chewy, crunchy, and wholesome pumpkin spice snack bars filled with texture and flavor. Grain-free fall snacking at its best!

ingredients.name: and 1/3 cups (187g) whole almonds, roughly chopped

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 300°F (149°C). Line an 8-inch or 9-inch square baking pan with parchment paper with enough overhang on the sides to easily remove the bars from the pan. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Using a silicone spatula or wooden spoon, mix the honey, vanilla, almond meal, salt, pumpkin pie spice, and almond butter together until combined. Fold in the almonds, dried cranberries, and pepitas until combined.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Transfer mixture to prepared baking pan and press very firmly into an even layer. You really want it packed in tight- as tight as possible. Bake for 20-22 minutes. Remove from the oven and allow to cool completely in the pan set on a wire rack for 1 hour, then transfer to the refrigerator to chill for 1 more hour. This helps firm up the bars which makes them stay compact. Remove bars from the pan using the overhang on the sides and cut into bars. Individually wrap each bar in plastic wrap or parchment. Store at room temperature for 1 week or in the refrigerator for up to 2 weeks. I find they get a little sticky at room temperature over a few days, so I prefer the refrigerator.

title: Cinnamon French Toast Bites
description: French toast in bite size form! These are really fun to make - you "sauté" them as though they are cubes of tofu or chicken, then toss in cinnamon sugar. And it goes without saying they are also fun to eat!

ingredients.name: thick slices of slightly stale white bread ((1"/2.5cm thick) (Note 1))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Cut the crust off the bread, then cut each piece into 9 equal cubes.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Whisk the eggs, milk and salt in a medium bowl.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Combine sugar and cinnamon in a shallow bowl.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Melt 1 1/2 tbsp of butter in a fry pan over medium high heat. Don't let the butter brown.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Quickly toss half the bread cubes in the egg mixture and use your hands to shake off excess egg mixture. Place the bread cubes in the fry pan and use a wooden spoon to "sauté" them until browned on all sides - about 2 to 3 minutes.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Remove the bread cubes from the fry pan straight into the sugar mixture. Toss to coat, then remove onto a plate.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Repeat with remaining bread cubes.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Serve immediately, with maple syrup for dipping.

title: Sweet n' Spicy Chicken Bowls
description: These Sweet n' Spicy Chicken Bowls assemble quickly and provide a lot of flavor, color, and texture. Low sugar, high fiber, and loaded with deliciousness!

ingredients.name: Freshly Cracked black Pepper to taste ($0.05)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Begin by cooking the rice. Combine the uncooked rice and chicken broth in a small pot. Place a lid on top and bring to a boil over high heat. As soon as it reaches a full boil, turn the heat down to low and let simmer for 25 minutes. After 25 minutes, turn the heat off and let it sit undisturbed, with the lid in place for 10 minutes. Fluff with a fork.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Prepare the honey spice mix by combining the chili powder cumin, garlic, smoked paprika, cayenne, freshly cracked pepper, salt, honey, olive oil, and apple cider vinegar in a bowl.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Chop the chicken breast into small pieces. Add it to the bowl with the honey spice mix and toss to coat. Set the seasoned meat aside while you prepare the rest of the bowl ingredients.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Rinse and drain the black beans. Drain the pineapple, then chop the tidbits into smaller pieces. Slice the green onions. Rinse and roughly chop the cilantro. Cut the avocado in half, then use a pairing knife to slice or cube the flesh.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Heat a large non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add the chopped and seasoned chicken pieces and sauté until cooked through and slightly browned (5-7 minutes).

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Build the bowls by adding 3/4 cup cooked rice to each bowl, followed by 1/4 of each of the following: cooked chicken, black beans, pineapple, avocado, green onions, and cilantro.

title: Ultimate Marble Cupcakes
description: Chocolate and vanilla marble cupcakes with chocolate and vanilla swirl frosting on top! These cupcakes are perfect for when you can't decide between a chocolate or vanilla treat!

ingredients.name: (8 Tbsp; 113g) unsalted butter, softened to room temperature
(8 Tbsp; 113g) unsalted butter, softened to room temperature

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 350°F (177°C). Line a 12-count muffin pan with cupcake liners and an additional pan with 2 liners. This recipe makes about 14 cupcakes. Set them aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: in a medium bowl, mix together flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Set aside. In a large microwave-safe bowl, melt butter in the microwave. Whisk in sugar—mixture will be gritty. Chill in the refrigerator for 1 minute. Stir in egg, yogurt, 3/4 cup milk, and vanilla extract until combined. Slowly mix in dry ingredients until no lumps remain. Batter will be thick. Transfer 3/4 cup of batter to another medium bowl. Mix in cocoa powder and 1 Tablespoon milk until combined. Chocolate batter will be thick.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Spoon 1 Tablespoon of vanilla batter into each cupcake liner. Top with a spoonful of chocolate batter, then more vanilla batter on top until all batters have been used up. At this point you may swirl the batters together very lightly using a toothpick or leave them as is, as I explained in the post. Bake the cupcakes for 20-24 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Allow cupcakes to cool completely before frosting.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Sift together the confectioners’ sugar and cocoa powder to assure there are no lumps. Set aside. With a handheld or stand mixer fitted with a paddle attachment, beat the butter on medium speed until creamy—about 2 minutes. Gradually add the sifted sugar/cocoa powder alternately with the heavy cream and vanilla. Beat on low speed after each addition. Once all added, beat on high speed until creamy and combined for at least 2 minutes. Add a pinch of salt if frosting is too sweet.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: With a handheld or stand mixer fitted with a paddle attachment, beat the butter on medium speed until creamy—about 2 minutes. Add confectioners’ sugar, cream, and vanilla extract with the mixer running on low. Increase to high speed and beat for 3 full minutes. Add more confectioners’ sugar if frosting is too thin or more cream if frosting is too thick. Add a pinch of salt if frosting is too sweet.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Frost cooled cupcakes with a knife or with a piping bag/tip. If you’d like to just make 1 kind of frosting and not both, make sure you double the frosting recipe of your choice to make sure there is enough for all cupcakes. To swirl the two frostings like I did, here is how to make swirled frosting. There may be leftover frosting depending how much you use on each cupcake.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Store cupcakes in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 2 days and in the refrigerator up to 5. I recommend a cupcake carrier for storing and transporting decorated cupcakes.

title: Classic Yellow Cupcakes with Milk Chocolate Frosting
description: Homemade yellow cupcakes topped with creamy milk chocolate frosting and extra sprinkles!
tags: yellow cupcakes with milk chocolate frosting

ingredients.name: (16 Tbsp; 226g) unsalted butter, softened to room temperature
half-and-half or milk or heavy cream (I used fat free half + half)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat the oven to 350°F (177°C). Line a 12-count muffin pan with cupcake liners. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Whisk the flour, baking powder, and salt together in a medium bowl. Set aside. In another medium bowl, beat the eggs and sugar with a stand mixer (with paddle attachment) or electric handheld mixer until light and foamy, about 2 minutes. While beating, slowly pour in the butter and then the vanilla. While mixing, add half the dry ingredients, then add all the milk, and follow with the rest of the dry ingredients. Do NOT overmix the batter. Gently fold in 1/2 cup sprinkles.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Divide the batter evenly in the prepared cupcake liners. Bake for about 20-25 minutes until a toothpick inserted in the middle comes out clean. Allow cupcakes to cool completely before frosting.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Sift 3 cups confectioners’ sugar & cocoa powder into a medium bowl. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: On medium speed, cream butter for a few minutes in a stand mixer with the paddle attachment. Turn speed to LOW and slowly pour in the dry ingredients. Be careful so that the dry ingredients do not blow everywhere! Mix until sugar/cocoa are absorbed by the butter.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Turn up mixer to medium speed and add the vanilla and salt. Slowly add in the half + half (or milk or cream) and beat for about 2 minutes or until the frosting reaches a desired thickness. Add the last 1/2 cup of confectioners’ sugar if needed to increase frosting thickness (I did not need it).

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Pipe or spread the frosting onto the cooled cupcakes. Decorate with additional sprinkles, if desired.

title: Balsamic Chicken Thighs
description: These easy Balsamic Chicken Thighs are a tasty and juicy answer to "what's for dinner?" Prepare the marinade in the morning and bake when you get home.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Mince the garlic and combine it in a bowl with the olive oil, balsamic vinegar, brown sugar, soy sauce, and a healthy dose of freshly cracked pepper (about 20 cranks of a pepper mill). Place the chicken thighs in a shallow dish or heavy duty zip top bag and pour the marinade over top. Marinate the chicken in the refrigerator for 1 to 8 hours. (You can do this before you leave for work in the morning.)

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees. Pour the chicken and marinade into a baking dish. Place the chicken in the oven and bake for 45 minutes. Use a spoon or baster to bathe the chicken with the juices from the bottom of the dish once or twice during baking.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Remove the chicken from the oven after 45 minutes and sprinkle a handful of freshly chopped parsley over top.

title: Parmesan & Pepper Kale Pasta
description: Parmesan & Pepper Kale Pasta is a quick and easy weeknight meal. Just a few ingredients transform boring pasta into a fancy meal.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Mince the garlic and slice the mushrooms. Place the butter, garlic, and mushrooms in a large pot and sauté the mushrooms over medium heat until they are soft and dark (about 5 minutes).

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: While the mushrooms are sautéing, tear or cut the kale leaves from the stems, then chop them into small pieces. Rinse the kale well.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Add the kale to the pot along with 1/2 cup chicken broth. Stir the kale as it cooks until it is fully wilted. Let the wilted kale simmer in the broth without a lid over medium heat until most of the broth has evaporated (about 10 minutes).

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: While the kale is simmering, bring a medium pot of water to a boil, add the pasta, and cook until al dente (7-10 minutes). Drain the pasta and let it cool slightly, or until it looks a little dry and tacky in texture.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Remove the pot with the kale and mushrooms from the heat. Add the pasta and stir to combine. The pot should be warm, but not steaming hot. If it's still steaming, let it cool for about 5 minutes.* Once slightly cooled, add 1/2 tsp salt, about 20 cranks of a pepper mill (or more if desired), and the grated Parmesan. Stir until all the pasta and vegetables are coated in Parmesan and pepper. Taste the pasta and add more salt or pepper if needed.

title: Cinnamon Sugar Tortilla Crisps
description: Sweet treats in a flash!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 350F/180C.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Spread butter onto each tortilla, like you are buttering toast. Alternatively, melt the butter and brush onto tortillas.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Sprinkle generously with cinnamon sugar.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Stack the tortillas, then cut into strips, or triangles.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Spread in a single layer on a baking tray (3 tortillas should almost perfectly fit).

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Bake for 5 to 8 minutes until golden and crisp.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Eat warm or at room temperature.

title: Strawberry Nutella French Toast Roll Ups
description: These french toast roll ups taste like an awesome doughnut!

ingredients.name: fresh white sandwich bread (, crusts removed)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Combine Egg Mixture in a bowl with a flat base large enough to lie the roll up in. Whisk to combine.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Spread sugar out in a small dish.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Use a rolling pin to roll the bread flat. This makes them easier to roll up (and stay rolled up).

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Spread each piece of bread with around 3/4 tbsp of Nutella.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Sprinkle strawberries along the bottom of each piece of bread.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Roll up bread. The Nutella will keep it sealed.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Melt butter in pan over medium high heat.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Roll each roll up in the Egg Mixture, shake off excess then place in the pan. Repeat with remaining roll ups.

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Cook for around 4 minutes until each side is golden, rotating every 1 minute or so.

steps.title: Step 10
steps.description: Remove from pan and immediately place in the sugar. Roll to coat in sugar, then remove. Repeat with remaining roll ups.

steps.title: Step 11
steps.description: Serve immediately, while warm.

title: Man Candy: Candied Bacon and Nuts
description: Easy to make, and a great gift for any bacon lover. Just be careful who you give it to. Because they will be begging you to make it again and again and again!!

ingredients.name: centre cut or middle bacon ((about 200g / 6 oz) (Note 1))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 180C/350F.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Line a baking tray with baking paper (parchment paper).

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Cut the bacon into 1.5cm / 0.6" pieces (remove rind if it has it).

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Combine with remaining Candied Bacon ingredients in a bowl and use your fingers to coat the bacon.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Combine the Candied Nuts ingredients in a bowl and toss to combine.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Spread the Candied Bacon onto a baking tray and bake for 10 minutes, or until the sugar is bubbling and the bacon is starting to turn brown (i.e. almost cooked).

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: Remove the bacon from the tray using a slotted spatula (so you don't get too much bacon fat) and transfer it into the bowl with the nuts. Mix to combine.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Use a spatula to scrape and pour the excess oil off the parchment paper (this is what I did).

steps.title: Step 9
steps.description: Pour the nuts back onto the baking tray and bake for 15 minutes, stirring once at half time.

steps.title: Step 10
steps.description: Turn the oven off and open the door slightly. Leave for at least 15 minutes, then remove and allow to cool.

steps.title: Step 11
steps.description: Break the candy into chunks. To store, place into an airtight container and keep in the refrigerator. (Note 4)

title: Fudge Brownie Pots (for two)
description: When you want just enough indulgence for two, these rich fudge brownie pots are just what the doctor ordered.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.Cut the butter into chunks and place it in a large microwave safe bowl. Microwave on high for 30 seconds, then stir until the butter is fully melted. Add the sugar and microwave for 15 seconds. Stir again, then repeat the 15 second intervals until the sugar and butter no longer separate from each other after being stirred (about 30-45 seconds total).

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Add the vanilla extract and egg to the melted butter and sugar, then stir to combine.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: In a separate bowl, stir together the flour, cocoa powder, baking powder, and salt until well combined.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Pour the bowl of dry ingredients into the bowl of wet ingredients and stir just until a smooth, chocolatey batter has formed. Pour the batter into two 8oz. ramekins.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Bake the brownies in the preheated 350 degree oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the center of each brownie has risen up into a dome and the surface looks glossy and cracked. Let the brownies cool slightly before eating.

title: Middle Eastern Roasted Eggplant with Couscous
description: Eggplant slathered in a fragrant chermoula paste, then roasted until soft and gooey, and piled high with a fresh couscous. Easy to prepare and absolutely divine.

ingredients.name: flaked almonds (, dry toasted on stove or in oven)
chopped cilantro ((coriander) and mint (1/4 cup together))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat the oven to 350F/180C.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Slice the eggplant lengthwise, then use small knife to make diagonal criss cross scores deep into the eggplant, making sure you don't cut the skin. (See notes)

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Combine the chermoula ingredients and mix into a paste. Slather onto the eggplant.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Place on baking tray, flesh side up, and roast for 40 minutes until completely soft. The cooking time will vary depending on the size of the eggplant you are using.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Place the couscous, salt and sultanas into a bowl, add the boiling water and cover for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Fluff the couscous with a fork, add the remaining ingredients and toss through to combine. Adjust seasoning to your taste.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: To serve, pile each eggplant high with couscous, finish with a dollop of yoghurt (see notes for vegan alternative) and garnish with cilantro. Best served warm but also delicious at room temperature.

title: JP's Iceberg Lettuce Dill Salad
description: My favourite iceberg lettuce salad! Light and refreshing, this is by far the salad I make the most often using iceberg lettuce.

ingredients.name: iceberg lettuce (, chopped or torn into bite size pieces)
Handful of finely sliced red cabbage ((just for a bit of colour))
snow peas (, diagonally sliced (adds crunch to the salad))
eschalot / french onion ((US: shallots), finely chopped)
extra virgin olive oil ((or use lemon infused and skip the zest))

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Mix Dressing together in screw top jar and shake.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Mix eschalot and herbs together in the salad bowl. Drizzle with 1/3 of dressing about 20 mins before serving.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Lay rest of salad ingredients on top.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Just before serving, add rest of dressing and toss

title: Pasta with Creamy Pumpkin Sauce
description: This super simple creamy pumpkin sauce drenches your favorite pasta for a quick, warm, and comforting weeknight dinner.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Begin boiling a large pot of water for your pasta. Once the water is boiling, add the pasta and boil until al dente (7-10 minutes). Drain in a colander.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: While waiting for the water to boil, prepare the sauce. Mince two cloves of garlic and add them to a large skillet with one tablespoon of butter. Sauté over medium-low heat for 1-2 minutes, or just until the garlic is soft and fragrant.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Add the pumpkin purée and chicken broth to the skillet and stir to combine. Add the nutmeg, chili powder, cayenne pepper, and some freshly cracked black pepper. Stir in the spices and let the sauce simmer over medium-low heat while the pasta cooks (about 10 minutes), stirring occasionally.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Once the pasta is finished cooking and is draining in a colander, add the half and half or cream to the skillet and stir it into the pumpkin sauce. Taste the sauce and add salt if needed (this will depend on the type of broth you use). Finally, stir the drained pasta in to the sauce and serve.

title: Biscoff White Chocolate Blondies
description: Buttery, brown sugar blondies flavored with Biscoff spread and full of white chocolate. Quick and easy!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 350°F (177°C). Line the bottom and sides of an 8-inch square baking pan with aluminum foil or parchment paper, leaving enough overhang on all sides. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: In a medium sized bowl, toss together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: In a large bowl, stir the melted butter and brown sugar together until combined. Whisk in the egg and egg yolk, then add the vanilla. Stir in the Biscoff spread. Gently fold the dry ingredients into the wet ingredients. Be careful not to overmix, which will result in crumbly, hard blondies. The batter will be very thick. Fold in the white chocolate chips.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Spoon the batter into the prepared baking dish. Bake for 25-26 minutes. The blondies may appear very soft, but they will set up as they cool. Allow the blondies to cool completely- about 3 hours. Lift the foil or parchment out of the pan using the overhang on the sides and cut into bars.

title: Whole Wheat Mini Pumpkin Muffins
description: Here's my simple recipe for whole wheat mini pumpkin muffins. They're only 60 calories each!

ingredients.name: and 3/4 cups (220g) whole wheat flour* (spooned & leveled)
store-bought or homemade pumpkin pie spice*
(71g) unsalted butter, melted and slightly cooled*
(80ml) milk (I use almond milk; any milk is OK)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 350°F (177°C). Grease/spray two mini muffin pans with nonstick cooking spray. This recipe makes around 36 muffins, so you will only use half of the 2nd pan. If using mini liners, grease/spray them with cooking spray. Set pans aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: In a large bowl, whisk the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and pumpkin pie spice together. Set aside. In a medium bowl, whisk the eggs, brown sugar, pumpkin puree, melted butter, vanilla, and milk together until combined. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients, stir a few times, then add the mini chocolate chips. Fold everything together gently just until combined.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Fill muffin cups around 3/4 – all the way full. Go for about 1 heaping Tablespoon of batter per muffin. Bake for 12-14 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. If your oven has hot spots, be sure to rotate the pans during bake time. My muffins took 12 minutes. Remove pans from the oven. Allow muffins to slightly cool before enjoying.

title: Green Chile Breakfast Quesadillas
description: Gooey Monterrey Jack, zesty green chiles, and a crispy tortilla dress up your morning eggs in these quick and easy Green Chile Breakfast Quesadillas.

ingredients.name: oz. Monterrey Jack or Pepper Jack, shredded ($1.25)
oz. can diced mild green chiles ($0.87)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Drain the green chiles well. Add them to a bowl with the shredded cheese and chopped cilantro, and stir until everything is evenly mixed.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Cook the four large eggs over easy (or your favorite method) in a large skillet.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Spread 1/4 of the cheese and chile filling over half of each tortilla, then top each with an egg. Fold the tortillas closed to make a half circle.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Cook two quesadillas at a time in the large skillet over medium heat until the outsides are golden brown and crispy and the cheese is melted inside (cook on each side). Cut each quesadilla in half or into thirds to form triangles. A pizza cutter works well for this job. Serve hot.

title: Honey Mustard Dressing
description: Creamy, tangy with a touch of sweet. A true crowd pleaser, use for leafy greens and roasted vegetables. It goes fantastic with my Roasted Sweet Potato Salad!

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Place ingredients in a jar and shake well until you can't see any honey on the base of the jar. Adjust sweet (honey), sour (vinegar) and salt to taste.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Keep for 3 weeks in the fridge in an airtight jar. (As long as the shelf life of your ingredients is greater than 3 weeks).

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Single side salad: Drizzle over 4 big handfuls of leafy greens and other salad of choice.

title: Pumpkin Spice Truffles
description: Like most candy recipes, there isn't room for ingredient substitution. I always recommend following the recipe as written.

ingredients.name: (57g) full-fat brick cream cheese, softened to room temperature
and 3/4 cups (175g) graham cracker crumbs (about 12 full sheet graham crackers)
store-bought or homemade pumpkin pie spice*
(113g) white chocolate, coarsely chopped and melted
(283g) semi-sweet or white chocolate, coarsely chopped
optional garnish: extra graham cracker crumbs or cinnamon/sugar

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: With a handheld or stand mixer fitted with a paddle attachment, beat the cream cheese and sugar together in a large bowl until creamy—about 2 minutes. Add the pumpkin and beat on high until combined. Add the graham cracker crumbs, pumpkin pie spice, cinnamon, and melted chocolate. Beat on medium speed for 2 minutes until everything is combined. The mixture is supposed to be soft and thick. Cover mixture tightly and refrigerate for 1 hour or up to 24 hours. Chilling is mandatory.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Line two large baking sheets with parchment paper or silicone baking mats. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Begin rolling chilled mixture into balls (about 1 teaspoon per ball) and place the balls on the baking sheets. You should have around 35 total. Chill balls in the refrigerator for 30 minutes or up to 24 hours.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: During the last few minutes of the chilling time, begin melting the chocolate. You can melt the chocolate in a double boiler or the microwave. If using the microwave: place the chocolate in a medium heat-proof bowl. I like to use a liquid measuring cup. Its depth makes it easier for dipping the truffles. Melt in 30 second increments in the microwave, stirring after each increment until completely melted and smooth. Let the warm chocolate sit for 5 minutes to slightly cool before dipping. Alternatively, you can temper the chocolate. If tempering, do not place or store truffles in the refrigerator.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Remove balls from the refrigerator and dip them in the chocolate using a dipping tool. When lifting the truffle out of the chocolate, remember to tap the dipping tool gently on the side of the bowl to allow excess chocolate to drip off. Top truffles with a sprinkle of graham cracker crumbs, if desired.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Place balls back onto the baking sheet after you dip each one. Allow chocolate to completely set in the refrigerator before serving. Truffles are OK at room temperature for a few hours for serving.

title: White Beans with Tomato and Sausage
description: These hearty White Beans with Tomato and Sausage make a quick and delicious weeknight meal. Serve it in a bowl like stew or spooned over toast.

ingredients.name: oz. frozen chopped spinach (1/4 of a 1 lb. bag) ($0.40)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Add the olive oil and sausage links to a large pot and cook over medium-low heat until golden brown on the outside and slightly firm (about 5 minutes). Remove the sausage to a cutting board and slice them into rounds. Return the sausage slices to the pot.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Continue to sauté the sausage until fully browned. While the sausage is cooking, dice the onion and mince the garlic. Add the onions and garlic to the pot and continue to sauté until the onions are soft and transparent. The moisture from the onions should dissolve any browned bits of sausage from the bottom of the pot.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Once the onions are soft, add the can of crushed tomatoes, dried basil, oregano, red pepper flakes, and a healthy dose of freshly cracked pepper (15-20 cranks of a pepper mill). Stir to combine.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Empty the two cans of Great Northern beans into a colander and rinse with cool water. Let the excess water drain away, then add the beans to the pot along with the frozen chopped spinach (no need to thaw). Stir the contents of the pot and allow them to heat through, stirring occasionally

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: (about 10 minutes). Taste and add salt if needed (1/4-1/2 tsp). If a thicker mixture is desired, let the pot simmer longer until the sauce has reduced. Serve hot with crusty bread for dipping.

title: Foolproof Poached Chicken Noodle Soup
description: This recipe uses a foolproof method of poaching chicken breast so you'll never, ever overcook it. The soup stock is a refreshingly light and the flavour is enhanced by poaching the chicken in the same liquid.

ingredients.name: chinese cooking wine ((or sub with 2 tsp sherry or sake (rice wine)))
scallion/shallot (, light green and green part only, sliced)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Combine Soup Stock ingredients in a medium saucepan large enough to hold the 2 chicken breasts side by side (without being crammed in). Bring to boil, taste and adjust if necessary.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Add chicken to soup, bring back to boil. Remove from heat and put aside covered for 20 - 25 mins. Don't worry if you leave it for longer, it won't over cook.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: When the chicken is poached, remove from the soup and slice into 1/4" / 0.5cm slices.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Cook noodles according to the packet instructions - usually for fresh noodles soaking them in boiling water is sufficient.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: Cut the bok choy leaves from the stems, cut the stems vertically into 1/3" / 1cm wide sticks.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Bring the soup (without the poached chicken in it) back to boil, add the bok choy stems, boil for 30 seconds then remove from heat, add the bok choy leaves and bean sprouts.

steps.title: Step 7
steps.description: To assemble place noodles in bowl, top with bok choy, chicken and spoon over soup.

steps.title: Step 8
steps.description: Garnish with scallions/shallots and fried shallots.

title: Mini Cinnamon Sugar Pumpkin Muffins
description: Made with pure pumpkin, whole wheat flour, and extra cinnamon spice, these mini cinnamon sugar pumpkin muffins are a cross between a muffin and a dense cake-style donut.

ingredients.name: and 3/4 cups (220g) whole wheat flour or all-purpose flour, or mix of both*
(4 Tbsp; 56g) unsalted butter, melted and slightly cooled
(100g) packed light or dark brown sugar

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: Preheat oven to 350°F (177°C). Spray a 24-count mini muffin pan with nonstick spray. Set aside.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: In a large bowl, whisk the flour, baking powder, pumpkin pie spice, cinnamon, and salt together. In a medium bowl, whisk the melted butter and brown sugar together. Add the egg, vanilla extract, pumpkin puree, and milk and whisk to combine. Pour wet ingredients into the dry ingredients, then whisk until just combined. Avoid over-mixing. Batter is thick.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: Using a small spoon, spoon the batter into the muffin tins, filling each about 2/3 full.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.description: Bake for 12-14 or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean or when lightly poked, the muffin bounces back. Remove from the oven and cool in the muffin pan for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Step 5
steps.description: In a small bowl, mix the granulated sugar and cinnamon together. Use a spoon to help remove the warm muffins from the pan. Lightly dunk a muffin (they can still be a bit warm) in the melted butter. Submerge in the cinnamon-sugar to coat the surface generously. Set upright on cooling rack and repeat with remaining mini muffins.

steps.title: Step 6
steps.description: Muffins taste best eaten on the same day. Cover and store leftover muffins at room temperature for up to 1 day, or in the refrigerator for up to 4 days. To help prevent the coating from turning mushy and wet, only loosely cover them, which will allow a little airflow.

title: Southwest Shredded Beef
description: Use your slow cooker to slowly tenderize beef with a flavorful mixture of herbs, spices, tomato, and broth. Perfect for tacos, burritos, and more.

ingredients.name: boneless beef rump or shoulder roast ($13.94)

steps.title: Step 1
steps.description: In a medium bowl, whisk together the tomato paste, garlic, chili powder, cumin, oregano, cayenne pepper, brown sugar, cornstarch, and beef broth.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.description: Remove any large pieces of fat from the beef roast, then cut the meat into 2-inch chunks. Place the beef in the slow cooker, then pour the sauce over the meat. Put the lid on the slow cooker, turn the heat onto high, and let cook for 4-5 hours (or 8 hours on low).

steps.title: Step 3
steps.description: After cooking for four hours on high, use tongs to stir and shred the meat in the sauce (if the meat is not yet tender, let it cook longer.
